en: Kneel, grip ab wheel below shoulders.
Roll forward — extend arms, brace core.
Pull back to start, don't let hips sag.
zh-Hans: 跪姿, 双手握轮置肩下.
向前推 — 手臂伸展, 核心紧绷.
拉回起点, 髋部不下垂.

en: Don't arch lower back — keep ribs tucked.
zh-Hans: 不要塌腰 — 收紧肋骨.

en: Stand, bend at hips, grip ab wheel.
Roll forward — body extends, no sag.
Pull back to standing — full control.
zh-Hans: 站立, 髋部前屈, 握腹轮.
向前推 — 身体伸展, 不塌腰.
拉回站立 — 全程控制.

en: Master kneeling version first — high injury risk.
zh-Hans: 先掌握跪姿 — 受伤风险高.

en: Ankle strap on cable, side stance.
Cable from inside, pull leg out.
Squeeze hip at top.
Return controlled.
zh-Hans: 脚踝绑绳索, 侧向站立.
绳索在内侧, 腿向外抬.
顶部收紧髋部.
控制返回.

en: Sit in machine, pads on outer thighs.
Press thighs outward against pads.
Squeeze hard at peak contraction.
Return controlled.
zh-Hans: 坐器械, 护垫在大腿外侧.
大腿对抗护垫向外推.
峰收缩强烈收紧.
控制返回.

en: Sit in machine, lean torso forward.
Pads on outer thighs.
Press out — biases glute medius.
Squeeze and return controlled.
zh-Hans: 坐器械, 躯干前倾.
护垫在大腿外侧.
向外推 — 偏重臀中肌.
收紧, 控制返回.

en: Sit in machine, work one leg at time.
Press outer thigh out against pad.
Squeeze hard, return slowly.
Switch legs after set.
zh-Hans: 坐器械, 单腿训练.
大腿外侧推护垫.
强烈收紧, 缓慢返回.
完成后换腿.

en: Ankle strap on cable, side stance.
Cable pulls outside leg out.
Pull leg across body inward.
Squeeze, return controlled.
zh-Hans: 脚踝绑绳索, 侧向站立.
绳索拉外侧腿向外.
腿向身体内侧拉.
收紧, 控制返回.

en: Sit in machine, pads on inner thighs.
Squeeze thighs together against pads.
Hold contraction briefly.
Return controlled.
zh-Hans: 坐器械, 护垫在大腿内侧.
大腿向内夹紧护垫.
短暂保持收缩.
控制返回.

en: Sit in machine, lean torso forward.
Pads on inner thighs.
Squeeze thighs together.
Slight lean targets adductor magnus.
zh-Hans: 坐器械, 躯干前倾.
护垫在大腿内侧.
大腿向内夹紧.
前倾偏重大内收肌.

en: Stand, dumbbells at sides, palms forward.
Curl one arm up, lower, alternate.
Supinate at top.
zh-Hans: 站立, 哑铃在体侧, 掌心向前.
单臂弯举, 下放, 交替.
顶部外旋.

en: Stand tall, legs straight.
Bounce up off ankles only.
Minimal knee bend.
Quick, springy hops.
zh-Hans: 站直, 腿伸直.
仅靠踝部弹跳.
膝盖几乎不弯.
快速弹跳.

en: Sit or stand, lift one foot.
Rotate ankle in full circles.
10 reps each direction, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 坐或站, 单脚抬起.
踝关节大范围画圈.
每方向 10 次, 换边.

en: Stand toes 10 cm from wall.
Drive knee forward to touch wall — heel down.
10-15 reps per side, work farther each session.
zh-Hans: 脚趾距墙 10 cm.
膝盖前推触墙 — 脚跟着地.
每侧 10-15 次, 每次远一点.

en: Half-kneel beside cable, hold handle.
Press straight out — fight rotation.
Hold 2-3s, return, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 半跪侧对绳索, 握把手.
直推 — 抗旋转.
停顿 2-3 秒, 收回, 换边.

en: Stand on pedals, hold rails lightly.
Forward arc motion, smooth glide.
Lower joint impact than treadmill.
zh-Hans: 站在踏板上, 轻扶把手.
前向弧线运动, 顺畅滑动.
比跑步机对关节冲击更小.

en: Face down, arms straight over head.
Lift chest and thighs, body arched.
Hold — counterpart to hollow body.
zh-Hans: 俯卧, 双臂在头部前方伸直.
胸部和大腿抬起, 身体反弓.
保持 — 空心支撑的反向.

en: Arms straight out at shoulder height.
Small circles forward, build to large.
Reverse direction — 20-30 s total.
zh-Hans: 双臂平伸至肩高.
向前画小圆, 渐进至大圆.
反向画 — 共 20-30 秒.

en: Start with neutral grip, dumbbells at sides.
As you curl, rotate palms to face you.
Lower while rotating back to neutral.
zh-Hans: 中立握起始, 哑铃在体侧.
弯举时翻转掌心向自己.
下放时翻回中立.

en: Start with palms facing you at shoulder height.
Rotate palms outward as you press up.
Top: palms forward, arms locked.
Reverse path back to start.
zh-Hans: 起始掌心朝自己, 哑铃在肩高.
上推过程中掌心向外旋转.
顶部掌心朝前, 手臂锁定.
原路返回.

en: Sit upright on bench, dumbbells at shoulders, palms in.
Press up while rotating palms forward.
Lock out at top, reverse to start.
zh-Hans: 坐直立凳, 哑铃在肩高, 掌心朝内.
上推同时掌心向外旋转.
顶部锁定, 原路返回.

en: Lie on bench, dumbbells at sides of hips.
Sweep in arc up and around to overhead.
Return along same arc — chest stays engaged.
zh-Hans: 平躺凳上, 哑铃置髋两侧.
弧线划过, 上举至头顶.
沿原路径回程 — 胸部持续发力.

en: Grip handles, push and pull aggressively.
Drive legs at the same time.
Common for HIIT: 30s on, 30s off.
zh-Hans: 握住把手, 强力推拉.
同时蹬腿发力.
适合 HIIT: 30 秒训练, 30 秒休息.

en: Brutal output — ease in if you're new.
zh-Hans: 强度极高 — 新手循序渐进.

en: Axle bar (thick-bar) at thighs, underhand grip.
Curl up to shoulders.
Lower with control — grip is key.
zh-Hans: 轴杠 (粗杠) 于大腿, 反握.
弯举至肩.
控制下放 — 握力关键.

en: Hips on pad, ankles secured.
Lower torso forward at hips.
Raise back to straight line.
Squeeze glutes at top.
zh-Hans: 髋部在垫上, 脚踝固定.
髋部铰链躯干前倾.
起身回到身体直线.
顶部收紧臀部.

en: Don't hyperextend at top.
zh-Hans: 顶部不要过度反弓.

en: 45° bench, hips on pad, ankles secured.
Hinge forward, then extend to neutral.
Squeeze at top, lower with control.
zh-Hans: 45度凳, 髋贴垫, 脚踝固定.
前屈, 然后伸展至中立.
顶部收紧, 控制下放.

en: Lie chest down on Swiss ball, feet braced.
Hinge over ball, then extend to neutral.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 俯卧瑞士球, 双脚支撑.
前屈过球, 然后伸至中立.
控制下放.

en: Hang from bar facing away — inverted start.
Lower body to horizontal, face down.
Body straight, parallel to ground.
zh-Hans: 悬挂背对杠 — 反向起始.
身体下放至水平, 面朝下.
身体笔直, 与地面平行.

en: Bicep tendon strain risk — go very slowly.
Progress through tuck variations.
zh-Hans: 易拉伤肱二头肌腱 — 慢慢练.
通过团身进阶.

en: Hang passively from bar, body relaxed.
Feel stretch through lats.
Hold 30-60 seconds.
zh-Hans: 被动悬挂杠上, 身体放松.
感受背阔肌拉伸.

en: Hold band in front at shoulder height, arms straight.
Pull band apart — squeeze shoulder blades.
Band touches chest at top of squeeze.
Slow return.
zh-Hans: 弹力带在身前肩高, 手臂伸直.
向两侧拉开 — 收紧肩胛.
顶部弹力带触胸.
缓慢还原.

en: Mini-band above knees, half-squat.
Step sideways against band tension.
Keep tension on band continuously.
Walk laterally back and forth.
zh-Hans: 迷你弹力带在膝上, 半蹲位.
对抗弹力带侧向迈步.
弹力带持续保持张力.
侧向来回走动.

en: Wide grip on band in front of body.
Pull band up, over head, behind back.
Reverse — slow, no shrugging.
zh-Hans: 弹力带宽握于身前.
上举, 过头, 至身后.
反向 — 缓慢, 不耸肩.

en: Start wide grip — narrow as mobility builds.
zh-Hans: 从宽握开始 — 灵活度增加再握窄.

en: Start with bar at thighs, slight bend.
Explosively shrug + pull bar to chest height.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 杠在大腿, 微屈.
爆发耸肩+上拉至胸高.
控制下放.

en: Use explosive technique — don't try heavy slow reps.
zh-Hans: 爆发动作 — 不要慢速大重量.

en: Set bar at hip height in rack, heavy load.
Grip bar, lift off pins.
Hold for time, set back down.
zh-Hans: 杠铃架于髋高, 大重量.
握杠, 卸下.
保持时间, 放回.

en: Lie on bench, grip bar slightly narrower than shoulders.
Lower bar in arc behind head, slight elbow bend.
Pull back to over chest.
zh-Hans: 平躺凳上, 握距略窄于肩.
弧线下放杠铃至头后, 肘部微屈.
拉回至胸上方.

en: Start with light weight — heavy shoulder demand.
zh-Hans: 从轻重量开始 — 对肩压力大.

en: Hinge at hips, torso 45° to floor, grip bar.
Pull bar to lower chest, elbows back.
Lower under control to full extension.
zh-Hans: 髋部前屈, 躯干与地面成45度, 握杠.
拉杠至下胸, 肘部后拉.
控制下放至完全伸展.

en: Don't round lower back — keep neutral spine.
Avoid using momentum — strict form.
zh-Hans: 不要圆背 — 脊柱保持中立.
不要借力 — 严格动作.

en: Bar on floor, hinge over, full grip.
Pull explosively to chest.
Lower fully to floor, pause, reset.
zh-Hans: 杠在地面, 前屈, 满握.
爆发拉至胸.
完全下放至地面, 暂停, 重置.

en: Reset between reps — no bounce off floor.
zh-Hans: 每次重置 — 不要利用反弹.

en: Stand beside barbell, hinge forward.
Grip center of bar one hand, row to hip.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 站于杠铃旁, 前屈.
单手握杠中部, 拉至髋.
控制下放.

en: Hinge at hips, grip bar underhand shoulder-width.
Pull to lower abs, elbows tight to body.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 髋部前屈, 反握杠与肩同宽.
拉至下腹, 肘部贴身.
控制下放.

en: Keep wrists neutral — don't let bar pull them back.
zh-Hans: 手腕中立 — 不要被杠拉后.

en: Quarter squat, grip ropes firmly.
Alternate arm waves — one up, one down.
Generate fast, even rhythm.
zh-Hans: 四分之一蹲, 双手握绳.
交替手臂波浪 — 一上一下.
节奏快速均匀.

en: Hold ropes, make small or large circles.
Switch direction every 15-20 s.
Engage shoulders and core throughout.
zh-Hans: 握住绳子, 画大圈或小圈.
每 15-20 秒换方向.
全程肩部和核心收紧.

en: Both arms move up and down together.
Drive waves from shoulders and core.
Stay athletic in low quarter squat.
zh-Hans: 双手同步上下运动.
肩膀和核心带动波浪.
保持运动姿势四分之一蹲.

en: One hand on one rope, free arm to side.
Generate fast wave from shoulder.
Switch arms each set.
zh-Hans: 单手握单绳, 另一臂自然下垂.
肩部带动快速波浪.
每组换手.

en: Raise ropes overhead, full extension.
Slam down hard, hinge at hips.
Reset and explode again, rhythmic.
zh-Hans: 双绳举过头, 充分伸展.
强力砸下, 髋部铰链.
重置再爆发, 富有节奏.

en: Low pulley behind you, single handle.
Arm extended back, curl forward to shoulder.
Slow return, max biceps stretch.
zh-Hans: 低位滑轮在身后, 单手把.
手臂后伸, 向前弯举至肩.
缓慢回, 二头最大拉伸.

en: On all fours, knees off floor 5 cm.
Crawl forward — opposite hand & foot move.
Hips low, back flat, slow controlled steps.
zh-Hans: 四肢撑地, 膝盖离地 5 cm.
向前爬 — 对侧手脚同步.
髋部放低, 背部平直, 缓慢稳定.

en: Stand sideways to low pulley, cable behind body.
Grip single handle, curl forward.
Maintains tension at peak.
zh-Hans: 侧站低位滑轮, 绳索在身后.
握单手把, 前弯举.
峰值张力.

en: Bar on upper traps, wide grip.
Press straight up to lockout.
Lower behind neck only as far as shoulder mobility allows.
zh-Hans: 杠铃放上斜方, 宽握.
垂直推举至锁定.
下放至肩部活动度允许的位置.

en: Requires excellent shoulder mobility — skip if tight.
Don't bounce the bar off neck.
Use lighter weight than front press.
zh-Hans: 需要良好的肩关节灵活性 — 紧不要做.
杠铃不要弹颈部.
比前推使用更轻重量.

en: Bar on upper traps, wide grip in Smith.
Press straight up, lower behind neck.
Stop at ear level — protect shoulders.
zh-Hans: 史密斯杆放上斜方, 宽握.
垂直推举, 下放至颈后.
停在耳高 — 保护肩部.

en: Don't go below ear level if mobility is limited.
zh-Hans: 灵活性差不要低于耳高.

en: Belt around hips, weight hangs below.
Stand on platform, hands on handles.
Squat to depth — chest up.
Drive up through heels.
zh-Hans: 腰带固定髋部, 重量下垂.
站平台, 双手扶把手.
下蹲到深度 — 挺胸.
脚跟发力起身.

en: Sit on bench edge, hands beside hips, feet on floor.
Slide off bench, lower body by bending elbows.
Press back up — keep hips close to bench.
zh-Hans: 坐凳边, 双手撑髋两侧, 脚着地.
离开凳子, 屈肘下降身体.
推起 — 髋部贴近凳子.

en: Don't go too low — protects shoulders.
zh-Hans: 不要下放过低 — 保护肩部.

en: Hands on one bench, feet on second bench.
Lower body, elbows bend to 90°.
Press back up — increased difficulty vs floor.
zh-Hans: 双手撑一凳, 双脚搭另一凳.
下降身体, 肘部 90°.
推起 — 比脚着地更难.

en: Watch shoulder strain — limit depth if uncomfortable.
zh-Hans: 注意肩部压力 — 不适时减少深度.

en: Bench dip setup, weight plate on lap.
Lower until arms at 90°, control descent.
Press up — keep plate balanced.
zh-Hans: 椅上臂屈伸姿势, 大腿上放杠片.
下降至大臂 90°, 控制下放.
推起 — 保持杠片平衡.

en: Don't shrug shoulders — keep them down and back.
zh-Hans: 不要耸肩 — 双肩下沉后展.

en: Lie on bench, both dumbbells at chest.
Press one up, lower while other presses.
Alternate continuously.
zh-Hans: 平躺凳上, 双哑铃置胸口.
推起一只, 推另一只时下放.
持续交替.

en: Lie on bench, grip bar slightly wider than shoulders.
Unrack, lower bar to mid-chest under control.
Press up to lockout — feet planted, glutes tight.
zh-Hans: 平躺卧推凳, 握距略宽于肩.
出杠, 控制下放至胸口中部.
推至锁定 — 双脚踩实, 臀部收紧.

en: Always use a spotter or safety pins on heavy sets.
Don't flare elbows 90° — tuck slightly to protect shoulders.
Keep wrists straight, bar over base of palm.
zh-Hans: 大重量时务必使用保护或安全杠.
肘部不要 90° 外翻 — 略微内收保护肩部.
保持手腕直立, 杠铃压在掌根.

en: Bench between low cable pulleys, handles at chest.
Press cables up and slightly inward.
Hold and squeeze at top, control eccentric.
zh-Hans: 卧推凳置于低位绳索之间, 手柄置胸口.
向上推, 略向内合拢.
顶部收紧, 控制下放.

en: Grip bar shoulder-width — not narrower.
Lower to lower chest, elbows tucked close.
Press up — focus on triceps lockout.
zh-Hans: 握距与肩同宽 — 不要更窄.
下放至下胸, 肘部贴近身体.
推起 — 三头发力锁定.

en: Don't grip narrower than shoulder-width — wrist strain.
Use spotter on heavy sets.
zh-Hans: 握距不要比肩窄 — 容易伤手腕.
大重量需要保护.

en: Grip narrower than shoulder-width on Smith bar.
Lower to lower chest with elbows tucked.
Press in fixed path — squeeze triceps at lockout.
zh-Hans: 史密斯杠上窄握, 略窄于肩.
下放至下胸, 肘部内收.
沿固定轨迹推起 — 顶部收紧三头.

en: Lie on flat bench, dumbbells at chest level.
Press up until arms fully extended.
Lower under control — feel the chest stretch.
zh-Hans: 平躺卧推凳, 哑铃放胸口高度.
推到手臂完全伸直.
缓慢下放, 感受胸部拉伸.

en: Don't bounce dumbbells off chest at bottom.
zh-Hans: 底部不要让哑铃砸在胸口.

en: Adjust seat so handles align with mid-chest.
Press handles forward to full extension.
Return under control — don't let stack slam.
zh-Hans: 调整座椅, 手柄与胸口中部齐平.
向前推至完全伸展.
控制回程 — 不要让配重砸下.

en: Lie on bench, palms face each other.
Press dumbbells up with neutral grip.
Lower to chest, elbows tucked.
zh-Hans: 平躺凳上, 掌心相对.
中立握推起哑铃.
下放至胸口, 肘部内收.

en: Standard bench setup, grip just past shoulders.
Lower bar to chest, pause 1-2 seconds — dead stop.
Press up explosively from pause.
zh-Hans: 标准卧推姿势, 握距略宽于肩.
下放触胸, 静止 1-2 秒 — 完全停顿.
暂停后爆发推起.

en: Pause kills momentum — start with 70% of normal bench load.
Always use safety pins or spotter.
zh-Hans: 停顿消除弹力 — 重量降到平时 70%.
务必使用安全杠或保护.

en: Lie on bench, one dumbbell in working hand.
Press up — core resists rotation.
Lower under control, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 平躺凳上, 单手持哑铃.
推起 — 核心抗旋转.
控制下放, 换边.

en: Bench centered under Smith bar, grip just past shoulder-width.
Unrack with twist, lower to mid-chest.
Press up in fixed path — full lockout.
zh-Hans: 卧推凳对准史密斯杠, 握距略宽于肩.
旋转解锁, 下放至胸口中部.
沿固定轨迹推起 — 完全锁定.

en: Re-twist bar to lock at top before stepping away.
zh-Hans: 离开前务必旋转锁杠.

en: Grip bar wider than shoulder-width (~1.5x).
Lower to upper chest with controlled tempo.
Press up — emphasize outer chest stretch.
zh-Hans: 宽握距 (约 1.5 倍肩宽).
缓慢下放至上胸.
推起 — 强化外侧胸部拉伸.

en: Wider grip = more shoulder stress. Don't go too wide.
zh-Hans: 握距越宽对肩压力越大, 不要过宽.

en: Anchor bands to bench or floor, loop around bar.
Bench press — bands tighten at lockout.
Strong tension at top, light at bottom.
zh-Hans: 弹力带固定凳或地面, 套在杠上.
卧推 — 顶部弹力增强.
顶部张力大, 底部小.

en: Band setup must be secure — failure is dangerous.
Use safety pins.
zh-Hans: 弹力带固定要牢 — 失败有危险.
使用安全杠.

en: Drape chains over bar — links pile on floor at bottom.
Standard bench press — load increases at lockout.
Lower under control as chain weight drops off.
zh-Hans: 链条挂在杠铃两侧 — 底部链节堆地.
标准卧推 — 顶部负荷增加.
控制下放, 链条重量随之降低.

en: Chains require careful setup — secure them.
Use safety pins.
zh-Hans: 链条要固定好 — 安装认真.
使用安全杠.

en: Set bench to 45° incline, sit back.
Dumbbells hang straight down, curl up.
Lower fully — biceps long-head emphasis.
zh-Hans: 凳调至45度上斜, 后靠.
哑铃下垂, 弯举.
完全下放 — 强调二头长头.

en: Stand on band, grip handles or ends.
Curl up to shoulders.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 踩弹力带, 握把或带端.
弯举至肩.
控制下放.

en: Stand, barbell at thighs, underhand grip.
Curl bar up to shoulders, elbows pinned.
Lower slowly with control.
zh-Hans: 站立, 杠铃在大腿, 反握.
弯举至肩, 肘部固定.
缓慢控制下放.

en: Don't swing torso — strict elbow movement.
zh-Hans: 不要摆躯干 — 严格肘关节运动.

en: Stand facing cable, low pulley, straight bar.
Curl up — keep elbows pinned at sides.
Squeeze at top, lower slowly.
zh-Hans: 面对绳索机, 低位定滑轮, 直杆.
上举弯举 — 肘部固定在体侧.
顶部收紧, 缓慢下放.

en: Barbell, narrow grip, palms up.
Curl to shoulders, targets outer biceps.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 杠铃, 窄握, 掌心向上.
弯举至肩, 强调二头外侧.
控制下放.

en: Narrow grip can stress wrists — use EZ-bar if uncomfortable.
zh-Hans: 窄握给手腕压力 — 不适用EZ杆.

en: Stand, dumbbells at sides, palms forward.
Curl up, supinate at top.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 站立, 哑铃在体侧, 掌心向前.
弯举上举, 顶部外旋.
控制下放.

en: Use both hands to lift dumbbell to top.
Lower with one arm — 5+ second descent.
Repeat for prescribed reps.
zh-Hans: 双手帮助上举至顶.
单臂下放 — 5秒以上.
重复设定次数.

en: High DOMS — gradual progression.
zh-Hans: 延迟酸痛大 — 渐进.

en: Stand, EZ-bar at thighs, narrow grip.
Curl to shoulders, elbows still.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 站立, EZ杆在大腿, 窄握.
弯举至肩, 肘部不动.
控制下放.

en: Stand between two high pulleys, single handles.
Arms extended, curl handles to ears.
Squeeze peak, slowly extend.
zh-Hans: 站于双高位滑轮间, 单手把.
手臂伸展, 弯举把至耳侧.
峰值收紧, 缓慢伸展.

en: Curl barbell to 90° elbow angle.
Hold with biceps fully engaged.
Maintain for time.
zh-Hans: 杠铃弯举至肘90度.
二头完全收紧保持.
持续时间.

en: Stand, kettlebells in each hand, curl underhand.
Curl up to shoulders.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 站立, 双手各持壶铃, 反握.
弯举至肩.
控制下放.

en: Lie on back facing low pulley, grip straight bar.
Curl bar up to forehead with constant tension.
Lower slowly.
zh-Hans: 仰卧面对低位滑轮, 握直杠.
弯举杠至额头, 全程张力.
缓慢下放.

en: Sit at machine, arms on pad, grip handles.
Curl handles up to shoulders.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 坐于器械, 手臂贴垫, 握手柄.
弯举手柄至肩.
控制下放.

en: Sit at curl machine, arms on pad.
Curl handles, full contraction at top.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 坐于弯举机, 手臂贴垫.
弯举把, 顶部完全收紧.
控制下放.

en: Grip dumbbell with thumb touching one weight side.
Curl up with supination — offset increases stress.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 握哑铃, 拇指贴一侧重物.
弯举外旋 — 偏置增加压力.
控制下放.

en: Stand, single dumbbell, focus on one arm.
Curl up with strict form, squeeze top.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 站立, 单哑铃, 专注一臂.
严格弯举, 顶部收紧.
控制下放.

en: Barbell, grip wider than shoulders.
Curl up, targets inner biceps (short head).
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 杠铃, 宽于肩握距.
弯举, 强调二头内侧 (短头).
控制下放.

en: Place palm on wall behind you, arm straight.
Rotate body away from wall.
Hold 20-30s, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 手掌贴身后墙, 手臂伸直.
上身向远离墙方向转.
保持 20-30 秒, 换边.

en: Lie on back, legs raised.
Pedal legs in cycling motion.
Keep core engaged, lower back flat.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 双腿抬起.
做蹬自行车的动作.
核心收紧, 下背贴地.

en: Hands and knees, neutral spine.
Extend opposite arm and leg, hold briefly.
Return, alternate sides.
zh-Hans: 四足跪姿, 脊柱中立.
伸展对侧手脚, 短暂保持.
回, 交替换侧.

en: Board (1-3 boards) on chest, narrow grip on barbell.
Lower bar to board, brief pause.
Press up — partial range, heavy triceps lockout.
zh-Hans: 胸上放木板 (1-3 块), 杠铃窄握.
下放至板, 短暂停顿.
推起 — 半程, 三头锁定.

en: Need partner to hold board or use velcro strap. Use spotter.
zh-Hans: 需搭档扶板或绑带固定. 使用保护.

en: Kettlebell inverted (bell up) at shoulder.
Crush handle, press strictly overhead.
Lower with control, keep bell balanced.
zh-Hans: 壶铃倒立 (球向上) 在肩.
用力握把, 严格推举过头.
控制下放, 保持平衡.

en: Use very light weight — grip is the limit.
Stop if grip fails — dropped bell is dangerous.
zh-Hans: 用很轻重量 — 握力是限制.
握不住就停 — 掉落很危险.

en: Exaggerated running stride — push hard off back leg.
Drive front knee high, arms drive opposite.
Cover max distance per stride, 30-50 m sets.
zh-Hans: 夸张跑步步伐 — 后腿强力蹬出.
前膝高抬, 手臂对侧摆动.
每步距离最大化, 每组 30-50 米.

en: High impact — avoid hard surfaces, build slowly.
zh-Hans: 高冲击 — 避免硬地面, 循序渐进.

en: Stand 30 cm from box, feet shoulder-width.
Quarter squat, swing arms, jump explosively.
Land softly on box, full standing position.
zh-Hans: 站在箱前 30 cm, 双脚与肩同宽.
四分之一蹲, 摆臂, 爆发跳起.
轻柔落到箱上, 完全站立姿态.

en: Step down — don't jump down (impacts knees/Achilles).
Use a box you can comfortably jump 80% of the time.
zh-Hans: 下来要走 — 不要跳下来 (冲击膝盖 / 跟腱).
选你能稳跳 80% 的箱高.

en: Step off box, land on both feet.
Immediately rebound into vertical jump.
Minimize ground contact time.
zh-Hans: 从箱上踏下, 双脚落地.
立即反弹起跳.
尽量减少触地时间.

en: High impact — only for trained athletes.
Use 30-60 cm box, build strength base first.
zh-Hans: 高冲击 — 只适合受过训练的人.
用 30-60 cm 箱, 先打好力量基础.

en: Bar at front of shoulders, shoulder-width grip.
Press just over head, lower behind neck.
Press back over head to front. That's 1 rep.
zh-Hans: 杠铃在肩前, 与肩同宽握.
推过头顶, 下放颈后.
再推过头回到前. 算1次.

en: Skip if shoulder mobility limited.
Use light weight — focus is constant tension.
zh-Hans: 肩部活动度差不要做.
用轻重量 — 注重持续张力.

en: Stand tall, feet shoulder-width.
Quarter squat, swing arms back.
Jump forward as far as possible.
Land softly, reset between jumps.
zh-Hans: 站直, 双脚与肩同宽.
四分之一蹲, 双臂后摆.
尽力向前跳.
轻柔落地, 跳间重置.

en: Land softly — heavy impact.
zh-Hans: 轻柔落地 — 冲击大.

en: Squat, hands down, jump to plank.
Do push-up, jump feet to hands.
Stand, jump straight up — reach overhead.
zh-Hans: 下蹲, 双手撑地, 跳出至平板支撑.
做一个俯卧撑, 双脚跳回手前.
站起, 垂直跳起 — 双手上举.

en: Pace yourself — high-fatigue movement.
zh-Hans: 注意节奏 — 极易疲劳.

en: Standard burpee through push-up phase.
Stand and broad jump forward.
Land soft, immediately into next burpee.
zh-Hans: 标准波比跳含俯卧撑.
起身后向前立定跳远.
轻柔落地, 立即下一次.

en: Squat, hands down, jump to plank.
Skip push-up, jump feet back in.
Stand, jump up — reach overhead.
zh-Hans: 下蹲, 双手撑地, 跳出至平板.
省略俯卧撑, 双脚跳回.
站起, 跳起 — 双手上举.

en: Run in place, kick heels to glutes.
Quick tempo, upright torso.
Use for warmup or HIIT bursts.
zh-Hans: 原地跑, 脚跟踢到臀部.
节奏快, 上身挺直.
适合热身或 HIIT 间歇.

en: Sit, soles of feet together, knees out.
Hold ankles, gently press knees down.
Lean forward to deepen, hold 20-30s.
zh-Hans: 坐姿, 双脚掌相对, 膝外展.
抓脚踝, 轻压双膝向下.
前倾加深, 保持 20-30 秒.

en: Stand facing away from cable, one handle in working hand.
Press across body to opposite shoulder line.
Squeeze, slow return — core resists rotation.
zh-Hans: 背对绳索, 单手握手柄.
跨过身体向对侧推.
收紧, 缓慢回程 — 核心抗旋转.

en: Stand facing away from cable, mid pulleys, handles at chest.
Press handles forward, slight downward arc.
Squeeze chest, slow eccentric.
zh-Hans: 背对绳索, 中位, 手柄置胸口.
向前推, 略向下弧线.
收紧胸部, 控制回程.

en: Stand between high pulleys, slight forward lean.
Pull handles down and across midline, hands meet at waist.
Squeeze lower chest, open slowly.
zh-Hans: 站在高位绳索之间, 略前倾.
向下向内拉, 双手腰前交叉.
收紧下胸, 缓慢打开.

en: Stand between low pulleys, slight forward lean.
Pull handles up and inward to meet at chin level.
Squeeze upper chest, control return.
zh-Hans: 站在低位绳索之间, 略前倾.
向上向内拉至下巴前方.
收紧上胸, 控制回程.

en: Stand between mid-height pulleys, staggered stance.
Pull handles together at sternum, slight bend in elbows.
Squeeze, open with control.
zh-Hans: 站在中位绳索之间, 错步.
胸口前合拢手柄, 肘部微屈.
收紧, 控制打开.

en: Stand sideways to cable, one handle in working arm.
Pull across body, squeezing chest.
Slow return — full stretch at end.
zh-Hans: 侧对绳索, 单手握手柄.
跨过身体内拉, 胸部发力.
缓慢回程 — 末端充分拉伸.

en: Face away from cable, grip rope behind head.
Elbows up, extend rope overhead and forward.
Stretch long head — slow return.
zh-Hans: 背对绳索, 脑后握绳索.
肘部上举, 向前向上伸展.
拉伸长头 — 缓慢回程.

en: Stand sideways to high cable, opposite arm grips handle.
Pull handle across body diagonally downward.
Squeeze triceps, control return.
zh-Hans: 侧对高位绳索, 对侧手握柄.
斜向下跨体伸展.
收紧三头, 控制回程.

en: Decline bench between high pulleys.
Pull handles down and across lower chest.
Squeeze, control return.
zh-Hans: 下斜凳置高位绳索之间.
向下向内拉至下胸前方.
收紧, 控制回程.

en: Lie on bench between mid-height pulleys.
Arms wide, slight bend, bring handles together over chest.
Squeeze, then open with control.
zh-Hans: 平躺凳上, 置中位绳索之间.
双臂打开微屈, 胸前合拢手柄.
顶部收紧, 控制打开.

name.zh-Hans: 单臂绳索夹胸 (高位向下)

en: Stand sideways to high pulley, working arm grabs handle.
Pull down and across body to opposite hip.
Squeeze, slow return.
zh-Hans: 侧对高位绳索, 单手握手柄.
向下跨过身体拉至对侧髋.
收紧, 缓慢回程.

en: Incline bench between low pulleys.
Pull handles up and inward over upper chest.
Squeeze upper chest, open with control.
zh-Hans: 上斜凳置低位绳索之间.
向上向内拉至上胸前方.
收紧上胸, 控制打开.

name.zh-Hans: 单臂绳索夹胸 (低位向上)

en: Stand sideways to low pulley, working arm grips handle.
Pull up and across body to opposite shoulder.
Squeeze upper chest, control eccentric.
zh-Hans: 侧对低位绳索, 单手握手柄.
向上跨过身体拉至对侧肩.
收紧上胸, 控制下放.

en: Ankle strap on cable, face machine.
Hinge slightly forward, hands on stack.
Kick leg back, squeeze glute.
Return controlled, repeat.
zh-Hans: 脚踝绑绳索, 面对器械.
略前倾, 双手扶器械.
腿向后踢, 收紧臀部.
控制返回, 重复.

en: Lie on bench under cable, grip straight bar.
Pull bar from over head to thighs.
Slow return, full stretch.
zh-Hans: 仰卧绳索机下, 握直杠.
拉杠从头顶到大腿.
缓慢回, 充分拉伸.

en: Stand facing cable, high pulley, straight bar attachment.
Arms straight, pull bar down to thighs.
Hold, control back up.
zh-Hans: 面对绳索机, 高位定滑轮, 直杆.
手臂伸直, 下拉至大腿前.
保持收紧, 控制回程.

en: High pulley, rope, pull to face level.
Elbows high, rope ends to ears.
Squeeze rear delts, extend slowly.
zh-Hans: 高位滑轮, 绳索, 拉至脸位.
肘部高, 绳两端至耳侧.
收紧后束, 缓慢伸展.

en: Pulley above head, rope or straight bar.
Pull bar to upper chest/face, elbows high.
Extend slowly under control.
zh-Hans: 滑轮在头上, 绳索或直杆.
拉至上胸/面部, 肘部高.
控制缓慢伸展.

en: Kneel facing cable, grip V-handle or straight bar.
Pull to lower chest, sit back slightly.
Extend slowly under control.
zh-Hans: 跪对绳索机, 握V把或直杆.
拉至下胸, 略向后坐.
控制缓慢伸展.

en: Low pulley, sit close, grip V-handle.
Pull to belly button, elbows tight.
Extend slowly, feel lats stretch.
zh-Hans: 低位定滑轮, 坐近, 握V把.
拉至肚脐, 肘部贴身.
缓慢伸展, 感受背阔肌拉伸.

en: Mid pulley height, V-handle, seated or standing.
Pull to chest, squeeze mid-back.
Extend slowly under control.
zh-Hans: 中位滑轮, V把, 坐姿或站姿.
拉至胸部, 收紧中背.
控制缓慢伸展.

en: Attach rope, neutral grip, seated or standing.
Pull rope ends to ribs, separate at end.
Extend slowly under control.
zh-Hans: 用绳索把手, 中立握, 坐或站.
拉绳两端至肋, 末端外分.
控制缓慢伸展.

en: Sit on cable row station, grip V-handle.
Pull handle to lower abs, chest up.
Extend arms, slight forward lean to stretch.
zh-Hans: 坐于划船器, 握V把.
拉至下腹, 挺胸.
伸臂前倾, 拉伸背阔肌.

en: Don't use back to swing — keep torso stable.
zh-Hans: 不要用躯干摆动借力 — 保持稳定.

en: Single handle, kneel or stand sideways.
Pull handle to hip with rotation.
Extend slowly, full stretch.
zh-Hans: 单手把, 跪姿或侧站.
拉手把至髋, 略带旋转.
缓慢伸展, 充分拉伸.

en: Use wide bar attachment, overhand grip.
Pull bar to upper abdomen, elbows wide.
Squeeze upper back, lower with control.
zh-Hans: 用宽杆, 正握.
拉至上腹, 肘部外展.
收紧上背, 控制下放.

en: Cable at high pulley, stand sideways.
Pull handle down across body to opposite hip.
Return slowly, rotate from core.
zh-Hans: 绳索置高位, 侧对机器.
把手斜向下拉至对侧髋.
缓慢返回, 核心带动旋转.

en: Cable at low pulley, stand sideways.
Pull handle up across body to opposite shoulder.
Return slowly, rotate from core.
zh-Hans: 绳索置低位, 侧对机器.
把手斜向上拉至对侧肩.
缓慢返回, 核心带动旋转.

en: Set up on hack squat, toes at edge.
Heels off platform, knees soft.
Press through toes, full extension.
Lower slow, full stretch.
zh-Hans: 哈克深蹲机, 脚尖在边缘.
脚跟悬空, 膝盖微弯.
脚尖发力推, 完全伸展.
缓慢下放, 充分拉伸.

en: Band under feet, ends held at shoulders.
Rise on toes against band.
Squeeze calves at top.
Lower slow under stretch.
zh-Hans: 弹力带踩脚下, 端头扛肩.
对抗弹力带踮脚尖.
顶部收紧小腿.
缓慢下放至拉伸.

en: Bend at hips, back parallel to floor.
Pad on hips, toes on platform.
Rise on toes, squeeze calves.
Lower slow into stretch.
zh-Hans: 髋部前屈, 背与地面平行.
护垫在髋部, 脚尖踩平台.
踮脚尖, 收紧小腿.
缓慢下放至拉伸.

en: Bend at hips, hands on bench.
Partner sits across lower back.
Toes on block, heels hang.
Rise on toes, full squeeze.
zh-Hans: 髋部前屈, 双手扶凳.
伙伴坐你下背.
脚尖踩块, 脚跟悬空.
踮脚尖, 充分收紧.

en: Dumbbells at sides.
Rise on toes, walk slowly.
Stay on toes throughout.
20-40 second sets.
zh-Hans: 双手持哑铃.
踮脚尖, 缓慢行走.
全程脚尖.

en: Stand tall, slight knee bend.
Explosively press through toes to jump.
Land on balls of feet.
Rapid repeated jumps.
zh-Hans: 站直, 膝盖微弯.
脚尖爆发推地跳起.
前脚掌落地.
快速反复跳.

en: Stand tall, hands at sides.
Bounce up off toes, minimal knee bend.
Land lightly on balls of feet.
Continuous quick hops.
zh-Hans: 站直, 双手在侧.
脚尖弹起, 膝盖几乎不弯.
前脚掌轻落地.
连贯快速弹跳.

en: Land softly to protect Achilles.
zh-Hans: 轻落地保护跟腱.

en: On leg press, toes at edge of platform.
Heels off platform, knees slight bend.
Press through toes, full extension.
Lower slow, full stretch.
zh-Hans: 腿推机上, 脚尖在平台边缘.
脚跟悬空, 膝盖微弯.
脚尖发力推, 完全伸展.
缓慢下放, 充分拉伸.

en: Don't lock knees on leg press.
zh-Hans: 腿推机上不要锁膝.

en: Sit in machine, pads on thighs.
Toes on plate, heels drop.
Press up on toes to top.
Lower slow into stretch.
zh-Hans: 坐器械, 护垫在大腿.
脚尖踩板, 脚跟下沉.
推起踮脚尖至顶端.
缓慢下放至拉伸.

en: Sit on bench, dumbbells on thighs.
Toes on block, heels hang.
Rise on toes, squeeze calves.
Lower slow, full stretch.
zh-Hans: 坐凳, 哑铃放大腿上.
脚尖踩块, 脚跟悬空.
踮脚尖, 收紧小腿.
缓慢下放, 充分拉伸.

en: Stand on one foot, hold support.
Other foot off floor.
Rise on toes, full extension.
Lower slow, switch legs.
zh-Hans: 单脚站立, 扶支撑.
另一脚悬空.
踮脚尖, 完全伸展.
缓慢下放, 换腿.

en: Dumbbell in same-side hand.
Stand on one foot on block.
Heel drops below block.
Rise on toes, lower slow.
zh-Hans: 同侧手持哑铃.
单脚站块上.
脚跟低于块面.
踮脚尖, 缓慢下放.

name.zh-Hans: 提踵 (坐姿, 史密斯机)

en: Bench under bar, sit with bar on thighs.
Toes on block, heels hang.
Rise on toes, lower slow.
Soleus focus — seated angle.
zh-Hans: 凳放杠下, 坐姿杠在大腿上.
脚尖踩块, 脚跟悬空.
踮脚尖, 缓慢下放.
重点比目鱼 — 坐姿角度.

en: Stand tall, feet shoulder-width.
Rise up on toes, fully extend ankles.
Squeeze calves at top.
Lower slowly, full stretch.
zh-Hans: 站直, 双脚与肩同宽.
踮起脚尖, 踝关节完全伸展.
顶部收紧小腿.
缓慢下放, 充分拉伸.

en: Bar on upper back, stand tall.
Rise on toes to full height.
Squeeze hard, hold briefly.
Lower slow under stretch.
zh-Hans: 杠铃放上背, 站直.
踮起脚尖到最高.
强烈收紧, 短暂保持.
缓慢下放, 充分拉伸.

en: Dumbbells at sides, stand tall.
Rise on toes to full extension.
Squeeze, hold briefly.
Lower slow, full stretch.
zh-Hans: 双手持哑铃, 站直.
踮起脚尖至完全伸展.
收紧, 短暂保持.
缓慢下放, 充分拉伸.

en: Shoulders under pads, toes on platform.
Heels drop below platform.
Press up on toes to full extension.
Squeeze, lower slow under stretch.
zh-Hans: 肩膀在护垫下, 脚尖踩平台.
脚跟低于平台.
推起踮脚尖至完全伸展.
收紧, 缓慢下放拉伸.

en: Standing calf machine, one foot on plate.
Heel drops below platform.
Press up on toes, squeeze.
Lower slow, switch legs.
zh-Hans: 站姿提踵器械, 单脚踩板.
脚跟低于平台.
踮脚尖推起, 收紧.
缓慢下放, 换腿.

name.zh-Hans: 提踵 (站姿, 史密斯机)

en: Bar on back, toes on plate or block.
Heels hang below for stretch.
Rise on toes to full height.
Lower slowly into stretch.
zh-Hans: 杠铃放背上, 脚尖踩杠片或台.
脚跟悬空拉伸.
踮起脚尖至最高.
缓慢下放至拉伸.

en: Start in plank, lift hips into V shape.
Press heels toward floor.
Hold 20-30s, alternate pedal heels.
zh-Hans: 平板起, 髋部抬高成 V 形.
脚跟向下压地.
保持 20-30 秒, 可交替踩腿.

en: Hands on wall, one leg back.
Back heel pressed flat to floor.
Hold 20-30s, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 双手扶墙, 一腿后撤.
后脚跟压紧地面.
保持 20-30 秒, 换边.

en: Bench setup, close grip — hybrid of skullcrusher + close-grip bench.
Lower bar to forehead first, then slide down to chest.
Press up reverse path — strong triceps emphasis.
zh-Hans: 卧推姿势, 窄握 — 颈后屈伸 + 窄距卧推混合.
先下放至额头, 再滑至胸口.
反向推起 — 强烈刺激三头.

en: Use safety pins or spotter.
Master skullcrusher and close-grip bench first.
zh-Hans: 使用安全杠或保护.
先掌握颈后屈伸和窄距卧推.

en: Heavy spring gripper, single hand.
Close fully with deliberate effort.
Negative open, repeat.
zh-Hans: 重型弹簧握力器, 单手.
用力完全合拢.
缓慢释放, 重复.

en: Strain risk — progress slowly with heavy grippers.
zh-Hans: 拉伤风险 — 大握力器渐进.

en: Quadruped position, neutral spine.
Arch back, look up (cow).
Round back, tuck chin (cat) — alternate.
zh-Hans: 四点跪姿, 脊柱中立.
塌腰仰头 (牛式).
拱背收下巴 (猫式) — 交替.

en: Sit on bench between mid pulleys, handles at chest.
Press handles forward to full extension.
Squeeze chest, slow return.
zh-Hans: 坐于凳上置中位绳索之间, 手柄置胸.
向前推至完全伸直.
收紧胸部, 缓慢回程.

en: Adjust seat — handles at chest height.
Press one arm at a time or both independently.
Squeeze chest at lockout.
zh-Hans: 调整座椅 — 手柄与胸齐.
单臂逐次或双臂独立推.
锁定位收紧胸部.

en: Anchor band behind, handles at chest.
Press forward to full extension.
Squeeze chest, slow return.
zh-Hans: 弹力带固定身后, 手柄置胸口.
向前推至完全伸直.
收紧胸部, 缓慢回程.

en: Iso-lateral machine, sit with back against pad.
Press one arm, return, then press other.
Keep torso stable throughout.
zh-Hans: 分臂器械, 坐姿背贴靠垫.
推一臂, 回程, 再推另一臂.
全程躯干稳定.

en: Stand in doorway, arms on frame at 90°.
Step forward to feel chest stretch.
Hold 20-30s, adjust arm height.
zh-Hans: 站门框中, 双臂 90° 撑门框.
前迈一步, 感受胸部拉伸.
保持 20-30 秒, 可调整高度.

en: Stand sideways near wall, one arm back.
Palm on wall, rotate body away.
Hold 20-30s, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 侧身靠墙, 单手后撑墙.
手掌贴墙, 上身向远离墙旋转.
保持 20-30 秒, 换边.

en: Bench at slight incline (15-20°), chest supported.
Press dumbbells from outside chest upward.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 凳调至 15-20° 轻斜, 胸前贴凳.
哑铃从胸两侧向上推.
控制下放.

en: Kneel, knees wide, big toes touching.
Sit on heels, fold forward, arms extended.
Forehead to floor, hold 30-60s.
zh-Hans: 跪姿, 双膝外开, 拇趾相对.
坐脚跟, 上身前折, 双臂伸展.
额头触地, 保持 30-60 秒.

en: Kneel, big toes touch, knees wide.
Sit back to heels, arms extended forward.
Forehead to floor — breathe deep.
zh-Hans: 跪姿, 拇趾相触, 双膝分开.
坐向脚跟, 双臂前伸.
额头着地 — 深呼吸.

en: Sit or stand, head over shoulders.
Pull chin straight back — double chin.
Hold 5s, release, repeat 10-15x.
zh-Hans: 坐或站, 头在肩上方.
下巴向后收 — 出现双下巴.
保持 5 秒, 放松, 重复 10-15 次.

en: Hang from bar, underhand grip, shoulder-width.
Pull chin over bar, biceps engaged.
Lower slowly to full hang.
zh-Hans: 悬挂杠上, 反握, 与肩同宽.
下巴超过杠, 二头发力.
缓慢下放至完全悬垂.

en: Don't kip — keep core tight, no leg swing.
zh-Hans: 不要借力 — 核心收紧, 腿不晃.

en: Underhand grip on bar, focus on biceps.
Pull chin over bar with bicep emphasis.
Lower slowly to full hang.
zh-Hans: 反握杠, 重点二头.
下巴拉过杠, 二头发力.
缓慢下放至完全悬垂.

en: Attach weight via belt or dumbbell between feet.
Underhand grip, pull chin over bar.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 用腰带挂重物或双脚夹哑铃.
反握, 下巴拉过杠.
控制下放.

en: Master strict bodyweight chin-ups before adding load.
zh-Hans: 先掌握徒手反握引体再加负重.

en: Side-lying, knees bent 45°.
Stack hips, feet together.
Open top knee, hips don't rotate.
Lower controlled, repeat.
zh-Hans: 侧卧, 屈膝 45°.
髋部叠放, 双脚并拢.
上膝打开, 髋部不转.
控制下放, 重复.

en: Mini-band above knees, side-lying.
Stack hips, knees bent.
Open knees against band.
Slow controlled tempo.
zh-Hans: 迷你弹力带在膝上, 侧卧.
髋部叠放, 屈膝.
膝盖对抗弹力带打开.
缓慢控制节奏.

en: Clean grip, bar on floor.
Pull explosively, extend triple.
Shrug bar high, elbows pulled back.
Bar reaches waist.
zh-Hans: 翻举握距, 杠铃在地面.
爆发拉起, 三重伸展.
高耸肩, 肘部后拉.
杠铃达腰部.

en: Olympic-style — coaching recommended.
zh-Hans: 奥举类 — 建议教练指导.

en: Hands on plates or blocks, close grip, plank position.
Lower chest below hand level — increased range.
Press up, elbows tucked tight to body.
zh-Hans: 手撑杠片或砖块, 窄握, 平板支撑.
胸部下放至低于手位 — 加大幅度.
推起, 肘部紧贴身体.

en: Lie face down, hands by chest.
Press up, arch back, hips on floor.
Hold 20-30s, feel abs stretch.
zh-Hans: 俯卧, 双手撑胸两侧.
推起仰头, 髋部贴地.
保持 20-30 秒, 感受腹部拉伸.

en: Sit on bench, elbow on inner thigh, dumbbell.
Curl up slowly, peak squeeze at top.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 坐凳, 肘抵大腿内侧, 哑铃.
缓慢弯举, 顶部峰收紧.
控制下放.

en: Sit beside low cable, brace elbow on knee.
Curl handle to shoulder.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 坐于低位绳索旁, 肘抵膝.
弯举把至肩.
控制下放.

en: Wide stance, drop heel of straight leg.
Shift fully to one side in deep squat.
Stay low, shift to opposite side.
Flow side-to-side without standing.
zh-Hans: 宽站位, 直腿脚跟落地.
重心完全移一侧深蹲.
保持低位, 切换至对侧.
侧向流畅切换不起身.

en: Very wide stance, toes slightly out.
Shift weight to one side, deep squat.
Other leg fully straight, toe up.
Shift to other side, alternate.
zh-Hans: 极宽站位, 脚尖微外展.
重心移一侧, 深蹲.
另一腿伸直, 脚尖朝上.
切换至另一侧, 交替.

en: Requires good hip mobility — go slow at first.
zh-Hans: 需要良好髋部灵活性 — 开始时缓慢.

en: Hold dumbbell at chest, very wide stance.
Shift to one side, deep squat.
Other leg straight, toe up.
Shift to other side, alternate.
zh-Hans: 胸前持哑铃, 极宽站位.
重心移一侧, 深蹲.
另一腿伸直, 脚尖朝上.
切换至另一侧, 交替.

en: Wide stance, sit to one side fully.
Other leg extended straight, heel down.
Shift side to side smoothly.
zh-Hans: 宽距站, 一侧深蹲.
另一腿伸直, 脚跟着地.
两侧顺畅切换.

en: Stand wide stance, shift weight to one leg.
Squat low, other leg straight, toes up.
Hold 15-20s, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 宽步距站立, 重心移单腿.
下蹲低位, 另腿伸直, 脚尖上.
保持 15-20 秒, 换边.

en: Kneel with back shin against wall/bench.
Front foot forward, lean torso upright.
Hold 30-60s, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 跪姿, 后腿胫骨贴墙或凳.
前脚向前, 上身保持直立.
保持 30-60 秒, 换边.

en: Sit with hands behind, knees bent.
Lift hips, walk forward or backward.
Keep hips up — glutes engaged.
zh-Hans: 坐姿双手撑后方, 双膝弯曲.
髋部抬起, 向前或向后走.
髋部保持抬高 — 臀部收紧.

en: Stand, dumbbells neutral grip at sides.
Curl dumbbell across body to opposite shoulder.
Lower, alternate sides.
zh-Hans: 站立, 哑铃中立握于体侧.
弯举哑铃跨身至对侧肩.
下放, 交替换侧.

en: Lie on back, knees bent, hands at temples.
Curl upper body up — shoulders off floor.
Squeeze abs at top, lower slowly.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 屈膝, 双手贴太阳穴.
上身卷起 — 肩部离地.
顶部收紧, 缓慢下放.

en: Lie on back, hands at temples, legs raised.
Bring opposite elbow to knee, extend other leg.
Alternate sides in pedaling motion.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 手贴太阳穴, 双腿抬起.
对侧肘碰膝, 另一腿伸出.
交替进行 — 像蹬自行车.

en: Kneel facing cable, rope at top.
Crunch down — bring elbows to thighs.
Curl spine, don't pull with arms.
zh-Hans: 跪姿面对绳索, 绳索置高位.
向下卷腹 — 肘部碰大腿.
脊柱弯曲, 不要用手臂拉.

en: Lie on decline bench, ankles hooked.
Curl torso up — keep lower back flat.
Squeeze at top, lower under control.
zh-Hans: 躺下斜凳, 脚踝勾住.
上身卷起 — 下背贴凳.
顶部收紧, 控制下放.

en: Sit on ab machine, grip handles.
Crunch torso forward — curl spine.
Squeeze at bottom, return slowly.
zh-Hans: 坐在卷腹器械上, 抓握手柄.
上身前卷 — 脊柱弯曲.
底部收紧, 缓慢返回.

en: Lie on back, arms at sides, knees bent.
Curl knees toward chest — lift hips.
Lower slowly, don't let feet touch floor.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 双手放体侧, 屈膝.
膝向胸卷起 — 髋部抬起.
缓慢下放, 双脚不触地.

en: Lie on back, knees bent, plate on chest.
Curl upper body up — shoulders off floor.
Squeeze abs, lower under control.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 屈膝, 杠片放胸前.
上身卷起 — 肩离地.
腹部收紧, 缓慢下放.

en: Place two dumbbells together, grip them in push-up position.
Press dumbbells together — chest and triceps engaged.
Push up while maintaining crush pressure.
zh-Hans: 两哑铃并紧, 俯卧撑姿势握紧.
夹紧哑铃 — 胸和三头收紧.
保持夹挤推起.

en: Dumbbells in front, upright row to chest.
Rotate forearms up — bells beside head.
Press overhead to lockout.
Reverse the entire path.
zh-Hans: 哑铃在身前, 直立划船至胸.
前臂向上旋转 — 哑铃在头侧.
推举过头至锁定.
原路返回.

en: Use very light weight — complex movement.
zh-Hans: 用很轻重量 — 动作复杂.

en: Heavy resistance, all-out 20-60 s.
Stay seated or stand, drive hard.
Recover 2-3x sprint length between.
zh-Hans: 高阻力, 全力 20-60 秒.
坐姿或站姿, 强力蹬.
休息时间为冲刺的 2-3 倍.

en: Don't bounce hips in saddle at high effort.
zh-Hans: 高强度时不要在车座上颠.

en: Stand on technical sections, weight back.
Eyes ahead, scan line 5-10 m out.
Brake before turns, not in them.
zh-Hans: 技术路段站立骑行, 重心后移.
眼睛向前, 提前看 5-10 米路线.
弯前刹车, 不要弯中刹车.

en: Full kit: helmet, gloves, eyewear.
Know your skill limits on technical trails.
zh-Hans: 全套装备: 头盔, 手套, 眼镜.
技术路段要量力而行.

en: Helmet on, check bike fit.
Smooth circles, 70-90 RPM cadence.
Shift gears to maintain effort on terrain.
zh-Hans: 戴头盔, 检查车身贴合度.
顺畅画圆, 踏频 70-90 RPM.
根据地形换挡, 保持稳定输出.

en: Always wear helmet, watch for traffic.
zh-Hans: 务必戴头盔, 注意交通.

en: Lie on back, arms up, knees at 90°.
Lower opposite arm and leg slowly.
Return, alternate sides — flat lower back.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 双手举起, 屈膝 90°.
对侧手脚缓慢下放.
回起点, 交替 — 下背贴地.

en: Hang from bar, arms straight, body relaxed.
Engage shoulders slightly to protect joint.
Hold for time.
zh-Hans: 悬挂杠上, 手臂伸直, 身体放松.
肩部略发力保护关节.
保持时间.

en: Hang from bar with single hand.
Engage shoulder, body relaxed.
Hold for time, switch arms.
zh-Hans: 单手悬挂杠.
肩部发力, 身体放松.
保持时间, 换臂.

en: Bar over mid-foot, shins close.
Brace core, hinge hips back, grip bar.
Drive heels into floor — keep back flat.
Lock out at top, hips and shoulders together.
zh-Hans: 杠铃在脚中, 小腿贴近.
核心收紧, 髋部后推抓杠.
脚跟发力 — 背部保持挺直.
顶部锁定, 髋和肩同时到位.

en: Don't round lower back — straight spine, hinge from hips.
Hands at shoulder width, not too narrow.
Reset between reps if form breaks.
zh-Hans: 不要圆背 — 脊柱保持中立, 髋部铰链.
握距与肩同宽, 不要太窄.
如果动作变形, 在每次重复之间重置.

en: Stand on plate or platform (2-4 inch deficit).
Hinge down to bar, brace, pull.
Lock out at top, lower under control.
zh-Hans: 站于杠片或平台上 (5-10cm赤字).
下蹲握杠, 核心收紧, 拉.
顶部锁定, 控制下放.

en: Increased ROM stresses lower back — start light.
Requires hip mobility and trained form.
zh-Hans: 增加幅度给下背更大压力 — 从轻开始.
需要髋部灵活和良好动作.

en: Dumbbells at side, feet shoulder-width.
Hinge hips back, lower dumbbells to floor.
Drive hips forward to stand.
zh-Hans: 哑铃在体侧, 双脚与肩同宽.
髋后推, 哑铃下放至地面.
髋前送, 站立.

en: Keep flat back — hinge from hips.
zh-Hans: 保持平背 — 髋部铰链.

en: Kettlebell between feet, hinge to grip handle.
Stand up, driving through heels.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 壶铃在双脚间, 前屈握把.
脚跟发力, 站立.
控制下放.

en: Smith bar at low position, feet under bar.
Hinge down, grip bar, brace core.
Drive through heels, stand tall.
zh-Hans: 史密斯杠低位, 双脚在杠下.
下蹲握杠, 核心收紧.
脚跟发力, 站直.

en: Bar at hip level, legs nearly straight.
Hinge at hips, bar slides down.
Feel deep hamstring stretch.
Drive hips up to stand.
zh-Hans: 杠铃在髋部高度, 腿近直.
髋部铰链, 杠铃下滑.
感受腘绳深度拉伸.
髋部上顶起身.

en: Don't lock knees — slight bend allowed.
Lower back exposed — keep neutral.
zh-Hans: 不要锁膝 — 允许微弯.
下背暴露 — 保持中立.

en: Dumbbells in front, legs nearly straight.
Hinge at hips, dumbbells lower.
Hamstrings stretch deep.
Drive hips up to stand.
zh-Hans: 哑铃在身前, 腿近直.
髋部铰链, 哑铃下放.
腘绳深度拉伸.
髋部上顶起身.

en: Wide stance, hands inside knees.
Toes pointed slightly out.
Drive knees out, push floor away.
Lockout hips at top.
zh-Hans: 宽站位, 握距在膝内.
脚尖微外展.
膝盖外推, 脚蹬地.
顶部髋部锁定.

en: Hip mobility critical.
Don't round lower back.
zh-Hans: 髋部灵活性关键.
不要圆下背.

en: Wide stance, dumbbell vertical between legs.
Sit hips back, lower dumbbell.
Squeeze glutes, drive up.
Stand tall at top.
zh-Hans: 宽站位, 哑铃竖立在腿间.
髋部后坐, 下放哑铃.
收紧臀部, 起身.
顶部站直.

en: Stand inside trap bar, grip handles.
Drop hips, chest up, brace.
Drive through floor to stand.
Hinge back to floor.
zh-Hans: 站六角杠内, 抓握把.
髋下沉, 挺胸, 收紧.
脚蹬地起身.
髋部铰链回地面.

en: Easier on lower back than barbell deadlift.
Still neutral spine — don't round.
zh-Hans: 比杠铃硬拉对下背更友好.
仍需脊柱中立 — 不要圆背.

en: Bench at 15-30° decline, lock feet in pads.
Unrack, lower to lower chest.
Press up — emphasize lower chest contraction.
zh-Hans: 下斜凳 15-30°, 双脚扣住固定垫.
出杠, 下放至下胸.
推起 — 强化下胸收缩.

en: Always have a spotter — getting up is awkward.
Decline can spike blood pressure — avoid if hypertensive.
zh-Hans: 务必有保护 — 起身姿势不便.
下斜会升高血压 — 高血压者避免.

en: Decline bench, feet locked, dumbbells at lower chest.
Press up and slightly inward.
Lower under full control.
zh-Hans: 下斜凳, 脚固定, 哑铃置下胸.
向上略向内推.
完全控制下放.

en: Have spotter hand dumbbells up — getting them up alone is risky.
zh-Hans: 让保护递哑铃 — 自己抓起哑铃风险大.

en: Adjust seat so handles align with lower chest.
Press handles down and forward.
Squeeze lower chest, slow return.
zh-Hans: 调整座椅, 手柄与下胸齐平.
向下向前推.
收紧下胸, 缓慢回程.

en: Decline bench under Smith bar, feet locked.
Lower bar to lower chest, controlled.
Press up along fixed path.
zh-Hans: 下斜凳置史密斯杠下, 脚固定.
控制下放至下胸.
沿固定轨道推起.

en: Stand facing away from cable, high pulleys, handles at shoulders.
Press down and forward to hip level.
Squeeze lower chest, slow return.
zh-Hans: 背对绳索, 高位, 手柄置肩部.
向下向前推至腰部.
收紧下胸, 缓慢回程.

en: Squat as deep as comfortable — heels down.
Elbows inside knees, push knees out.
Hold 30-90 s, relax into position.
zh-Hans: 尽量深蹲 — 脚跟着地.
肘部在膝内, 推膝外展.
保持 30-90 秒, 放松进入姿势.

en: Step off box, land with both feet.
Absorb landing — knees bend, hips back.
Hold stick landing 2 s, step back up.
zh-Hans: 从箱上踏下, 双脚落地.
缓冲落地 — 膝弯, 髋后推.
稳住 2 秒, 走回箱上.

en: Start with low box — assess landing form.
zh-Hans: 从低箱开始 — 检查落地动作.

en: Stand on box, step off (don't jump down).
Land softly, instantly explode upward.
Minimal ground contact time.
Jump as high as possible.
zh-Hans: 站箱上, 走下 (不要跳下).
轻柔落地, 立刻爆发上跳.
触地时间最短.
尽力高跳.

en: Advanced — build base strength first.
Skip if joint issues.
zh-Hans: 高级 — 先建立基础力量.
关节有伤勿做.

en: Kneel on assist pad, grip parallel bars.
Lean forward, lower until chest stretch.
Press up — machine takes some weight.
zh-Hans: 膝盖跪助力垫, 双杠握紧.
前倾下降至胸部拉伸.
推起 — 机器提供助力.

en: Sit on bench edge, hands grip behind hips.
Slide off, lower hips by bending elbows.
Press up to start, full extension.
zh-Hans: 坐凳边, 双手抓凳边在身后.
髋部下滑, 弯肘下放.
推回起始, 完全伸直.

en: Don't roll shoulders forward — chest open.
zh-Hans: 不要含胸 — 挺胸.

en: On parallel bars, lean torso forward.
Lower until shoulders below elbows — chest stretch.
Press up — squeeze chest.
zh-Hans: 双杠上, 上身前倾.
下降至肩低于肘 — 胸部拉伸.
推起 — 胸部收紧.

en: Don't go too deep if you feel shoulder pain.
Build up to bodyweight slowly.
zh-Hans: 肩痛不要下太低.
逐步过渡到自重.

en: Plate or dumbbell on dip belt.
Lean forward, lower to chest stretch.
Press up — keep chest engaged.
zh-Hans: 腰挂负重腰带或哑铃.
前倾, 下降至胸部拉伸.
推起 — 持续刺激胸部.

en: Master bodyweight dips before adding load.
Don't bounce out of bottom — shoulder injury risk.
zh-Hans: 先掌握自重双杠.
底部不要弹起 — 易伤肩.

en: Hold single bar in front, palms forward, lean back.
Body angles back, lower with elbows tucked.
Press to lock — extreme triceps loading.
zh-Hans: 握身前单杠, 掌心向前, 后倾.
身体后倾, 下降肘内收.
推起锁定 — 三头超负荷.

en: High shoulder demand — master regular dips first.
Start with assist band or limited range.
zh-Hans: 肩部要求高 — 先掌握普通臂屈伸.
从弹力带辅助或半程开始.

en: Sit, grip handles wider than shoulders.
Press handles down by leaning forward.
Squeeze chest at bottom, slow return.
zh-Hans: 坐姿, 握距宽于肩.
前倾向下推手柄.
底部收紧胸部, 缓慢回程.

en: Support on bars, arms locked.
Lean forward for chest, vertical for triceps.
Lower until shoulders below elbows, press up.
zh-Hans: 撑在双杠上, 手臂锁定.
前倾练胸, 直立练三头.
下放至肩低于肘, 推起.

en: Don't overstretch at bottom — shoulder strain risk.
Build up to full dips with negatives.
zh-Hans: 底部不要过度下放 — 容易伤肩.
通过离心动作慢慢练全程.

en: Grip parallel bars, body upright — no forward lean.
Lower with elbows tracking back behind body.
Press up to lockout — emphasize triceps.
zh-Hans: 握双杠, 身体直立 — 不要前倾.
下降时肘部向后.
推至锁定 — 强化三头.

en: Don't go below 90° elbow bend — shoulder strain.
Build up slowly — high difficulty.
zh-Hans: 肘部不要低于 90° — 伤肩.
缓慢进阶 — 难度高.

name.zh-Hans: 双杠臂屈伸 (三头版, 负重)

en: Attach weight via belt, grip parallel bars upright.
Lower with control, elbows track back.
Press up — strict form essential.
zh-Hans: 腰带挂杠片, 握双杠直立.
控制下降, 肘部向后.
推起 — 严格动作至关重要.

en: Use a dip belt, not held weight — frees up grip.
Spotter useful for adding/removing weight.
zh-Hans: 使用腰带, 不要手持杠片 — 不占握力.
上下杠片有人帮忙更安全.

en: Support on rings, rings turned out at top.
Lower with chest forward, control rings.
Press up — turn rings out at top.
zh-Hans: 撑住吊环, 顶部外旋.
胸部前倾下降, 控制吊环.
推起 — 顶部外旋.

en: Rings are unstable — master bar dips first.
Don't drop below 90° elbow if shoulders unstable.
zh-Hans: 吊环不稳 — 先掌握双杠.
肩部不稳不要降至肘 90°.

en: Mount rings, body upright, rings just outside hips.
Lower with elbows tracking back, body vertical.
Press up — rings turn out at top (RTO optional).
zh-Hans: 上吊环, 身体直立, 环在髋两侧外.
下降时肘后, 躯干垂直.
推起 — 顶部可外旋环 (RTO 可选).

en: Master parallel bar dips first — rings demand stability.
Don't drop into bottom — controlled descent.
zh-Hans: 先掌握双杠 — 吊环对稳定性要求高.
不要下坠到底 — 控制下放.

en: Mount above single bar, palms facing forward, arms locked.
Lower body — feet stay forward for balance.
Press back up to support hold.
zh-Hans: 撑单杠上方, 掌心向前, 手臂锁定.
下放身体 — 双脚前伸保持平衡.
推回支撑位.

en: Significant balance and strength demand — master double-bar dip first.
Practice on shorter bars for safety.
zh-Hans: 对平衡和力量要求高 — 先掌握双杠.
在低杠练习更安全.

en: Downward dog, hips high.
Swoop down then forward in deep arc.
Reverse motion back to start.
zh-Hans: 下犬式, 髋部高.
弧线下沉再前推.
反向回到起点.

en: On all fours, hands under shoulders.
Kick one leg back, knee bent.
Sole pushes up, squeeze glute.
Lower controlled, repeat.
zh-Hans: 四肢支撑, 手在肩下.
一腿后踢, 屈膝.
脚掌向上, 收紧臀部.
控制下放, 重复.

en: Band around foot, anchored low.
On all fours, kick leg back.
Squeeze glute against band.
Lower controlled, switch.
zh-Hans: 弹力带绕脚, 低位固定.
四肢支撑, 腿后踢.
对抗弹力带收紧臀.
控制下放, 换腿.

en: Stand, arms up at 90°, flex both biceps.
Hold peak contraction for time.
Focus on mind-muscle connection.
zh-Hans: 站立, 双臂90度上举, 收紧双二头.
峰值收缩保持.
专注心肌连接.

en: Hands and feet on floor, hips high.
Body forms inverted V, heels reach down.
Press chest toward thighs, hold 30-60 s.
zh-Hans: 双手双脚着地, 髋部抬高.
身体呈倒 V, 脚跟向下.
胸口推向大腿, 保持 30-60 秒.

en: Stand, barbell at thighs, underhand grip.
Drag bar up body, elbows behind torso.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 站立, 杠铃在大腿, 反握.
杠沿身上拖, 肘部在躯干后.
控制下放.

en: Lie on bench, grip behind head.
Lift body straight — only shoulders touch.
Lower slowly, body in rigid line.
zh-Hans: 卧凳, 双手抓凳后.
整身抬起 — 仅肩部接触.
缓慢下放, 身体保持直线.

en: Progress from tuck → straddle → full flag.
Risk of neck strain if form breaks.
zh-Hans: 进阶: 屈腿 → 分腿 → 完全龙旗.
动作变形可能拉伤颈部.

en: 7 half curls bottom to middle.
7 half curls middle to top.
7 full curls — burning finish.
zh-Hans: 7次半程 (底到中).
7次半程 (中到顶).
7次全程 — 烧灼收尾.

en: Use lighter weight than usual — high fatigue.
zh-Hans: 用比平时轻的重量 — 疲劳度高.

en: Start with neutral grip, dumbbells at sides.
Curl up while rotating palms upward.
Lower with rotation back to neutral.
zh-Hans: 中立握起始, 哑铃在体侧.
弯举时掌心翻转向上.
下放时翻回中立.

en: Lie on bench, dumbbells start at sides of hips.
Arc up to overhead, then return to start.
Light weight only — full 180° motion.
zh-Hans: 平躺凳上, 哑铃从髋两侧开始.
弧线划过至头顶, 再回到起点.
仅用轻重量 — 完整 180° 行程.

en: Use very light weight — extreme range stresses shoulders.
zh-Hans: 仅用极轻重量 — 大行程对肩压力大.

en: Decline bench, feet locked, arms over lower chest.
Open arms wide in arc.
Squeeze lower chest to close.
zh-Hans: 下斜凳, 脚固定, 双臂下胸前方.
弧线打开双臂.
下胸发力合拢.

en: Lie on flat bench, arms over chest, slight elbow bend.
Open arms wide in arc until chest stretch.
Squeeze chest to bring dumbbells back together.
zh-Hans: 平躺凳上, 双臂胸前微屈.
弧线打开双臂至胸部拉伸.
胸部发力合拢哑铃.

en: Don't go too low — risk of shoulder strain. Stop at chest depth.
zh-Hans: 不要过低 — 容易拉伤肩部, 与胸口齐平即可.

en: Bench at 30-45° incline, arms over upper chest.
Open arms wide in slow arc.
Squeeze upper chest to return.
zh-Hans: 上斜凳 30-45°, 双臂上胸前方.
缓慢弧线打开.
上胸发力合拢.

en: Hold one dumbbell horizontally between palms.
Squeeze palms together — push inward hard.
Hold contraction, repeat or hold isometric.
zh-Hans: 双掌横夹一只哑铃.
双掌向内挤压.
保持收紧, 重复或维持等长.

en: Lie on floor, one dumbbell in working hand, knees bent.
Press up to lockout — core anti-rotation.
Lower until tricep touches floor.
zh-Hans: 仰卧地面, 单手持哑铃, 屈膝.
推至锁定 — 核心抗旋转.
下放至三头触地.

en: Lie on bench, hold one dumbbell above chest with both hands.
Lower behind head in arc, slight elbow bend.
Pull back over chest, feel chest and lats.
zh-Hans: 平躺凳上, 双手抱一只哑铃于胸上方.
弧线下放至头后, 肘部微屈.
拉回胸前, 感受胸背.

en: Don't go beyond shoulder mobility — risk of impingement.
zh-Hans: 不要超过肩部活动范围 — 容易撞击.

en: Lie perpendicular on bench, only upper back on pad.
Hips low, both hands cup one dumbbell over chest.
Lower in arc behind head, return.
zh-Hans: 垂直横躺凳, 仅上背在凳上.
髋部低, 双手抱一只哑铃于胸上方.
弧线下放至头后, 回到起点.

en: Drop hips low for max stretch — but watch shoulders.
zh-Hans: 髋部下沉以增加拉伸 — 注意肩部.

en: Hinge forward, dumbbell in each hand.
Pull both dumbbells to hips.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 前屈, 双手各持哑铃.
双哑铃拉至髋部.
控制下放.

en: Keep back flat — hinge from hips, not waist.
zh-Hans: 背部平直 — 髋部铰链, 不弯腰.

en: One hand on bench, feet on floor, dumbbell other hand.
Row dumbbell to hip, no rotation.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 单手撑凳, 双脚着地, 单手哑铃.
拉哑铃至髋, 不旋转.
控制下放.

en: Lie chest-down on incline bench, dumbbells hang.
Row both dumbbells to ribcage.
Lower under control, full stretch.
zh-Hans: 俯卧上斜凳, 哑铃自然下垂.
双哑铃拉至肋骨.
控制下放, 充分拉伸.

en: Sit on bench, hinge forward, dumbbells hang.
Row dumbbells to ribs, squeeze back.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 坐凳, 前屈, 哑铃下垂.
拉哑铃至肋, 收紧背部.
控制下放.

en: One knee + hand on bench, other hand holds dumbbell.
Pull dumbbell to hip, elbow up and back.
Lower with control, full stretch.
zh-Hans: 单膝单手撑凳, 另一手持哑铃.
拉哑铃至髋部, 肘部上后.
控制下放, 充分拉伸.

en: Don't twist torso to lift — keep spine neutral.
zh-Hans: 不要扭躯干借力 — 脊柱中立.

en: Hold pole with near hand, lean fully away.
Cable in far hand at low position.
Raise arm out to shoulder height.
Maximum stretch on side delt.
zh-Hans: 近侧手扶柱, 身体完全远离.
绳索在远侧手低位.
侧平举至肩高.
中三角最大拉伸.

en: Feet flat, full foot pressure.
Push and pull handles for full-body work.
Tall posture, light grip — no leaning.
zh-Hans: 脚平放踏板, 全脚施力.
推拉把手实现全身训练.
身体挺直, 轻握 — 不要靠在上面.

en: Every Minute On the Minute: do X reps.
Rest the remainder of each minute.
Pick rep count you can finish in ~40s.
zh-Hans: 每分钟开始时做 X 次.
剩余时间为休息.
选你 40 秒能完成的次数.

en: Use 50-60% 1RM, standard bench setup.
Lower under control, explode up fast.
Reset, repeat — focus on speed.
zh-Hans: 用 1RM 的 50-60%, 标准卧推姿势.
控制下放, 爆发上推.
重置, 重复 — 注重速度.

en: Speed work needs perfect form — don't sacrifice control.
Always use spotter or safety pins.
zh-Hans: 速度训练要保持完美动作 — 不要失去控制.
务必有保护或安全杠.

en: One hand on med ball, other on floor.
Lower chest toward floor.
Press up, optionally roll ball to other hand.
zh-Hans: 一手撑药球, 一手撑地.
胸部下降至接近地面.
推起, 可将球滚至另一手.

en: Stand side-on to cable at elbow height.
Far hand grabs cable, elbow at 90° at side.
Rotate forearm out away from body.
Slow return.
zh-Hans: 侧站绳索机, 绳在肘高.
远侧手握绳, 肘部90°在体侧.
前臂外旋远离身体.
缓慢还原.

en: Lie on side, top arm holds light dumbbell.
Elbow pinned at 90°, forearm across belly.
Rotate forearm up — keep elbow tight.
Lower slowly.
zh-Hans: 侧卧, 上臂握轻哑铃.
肘部固定90°, 前臂过腹.
前臂向上旋转 — 肘部紧贴.
缓慢下放.

en: Use very light weight — rotator cuff is small muscle group.
zh-Hans: 用很轻重量 — 肩袖肌肉很小.

en: Stand, EZ-bar narrow grip at thighs.
Drag bar up body, elbows behind torso.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 站立, EZ杆窄握于大腿.
杠沿身上拖, 肘部在躯干后.
控制下放.

en: Sit at preacher bench, EZ-bar overhand grip.
Curl up with palms down.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 坐于牧师凳, EZ杆正握.
掌心向下弯举.
控制下放.

en: Lie on bench, EZ-bar narrow grip over chest.
Lower bar back over head, slight elbow bend.
Pull back over chest.
zh-Hans: 卧凳, EZ杆窄握在胸上方.
杠下放过头, 肘微屈.
拉回胸上方.

en: Rope at face height, palms facing in.
Pull rope to face — split ends apart.
Elbows high, externally rotate.
Slow return.
zh-Hans: 绳在脸高, 掌心相对.
拉绳至脸 — 两端分开.
肘部高位, 外旋.
缓慢还原.

en: Band anchored at face height.
Pull band to face, hands apart.
Squeeze shoulder blades, externally rotate.
Slow release.
zh-Hans: 弹力带固定在脸高.
拉带至脸, 双手分开.
收紧肩胛, 外旋.
缓慢还原.

en: Rope above head, palms facing in.
Pull rope down and apart toward face.
Externally rotate at finish — elbows high.
Slow return.
zh-Hans: 绳在头上方, 掌心朝内.
向下向脸拉开.
结束位外旋 — 肘部高位.
缓慢还原.

en: Sit on bench, rope at face height.
Pull rope to face, ends apart at temples.
Squeeze rear delts, hold.
Slow return.
zh-Hans: 坐凳上, 绳在脸高.
拉绳至脸, 两端分至太阳穴.
后束收紧, 停顿.
缓慢还原.

en: Heavy DBs/KBs at sides, stand tall.
Walk steady steps, no leaning.
30-60 s walks, repeat for distance.
zh-Hans: 重哑铃/壶铃挂体侧, 站直.
稳步走, 不要偏倒.
30-60 秒行走, 多组累计距离.

en: Keep shoulders back — don't shrug under load.
zh-Hans: 保持挺胸 — 负重时不要耸肩.

en: Grip heavy dumbbells, stand tall.
Walk with shoulders back, controlled steps.
Maintain grip and posture for distance.
zh-Hans: 握大重量哑铃, 直立.
肩膀后展行走, 步伐稳定.
保持握力和姿态走一段距离.

en: Don't shrug shoulders — relaxed posture.
zh-Hans: 不要耸肩 — 自然放松.

en: Grip heavy kettlebells, stand tall.
Walk with controlled steps, posture upright.
Maintain grip throughout distance.
zh-Hans: 握大重量壶铃, 直立.
稳步行走, 姿态挺立.
全程保持握力.

en: Stand inside trap bar, deadlift to standing.
Walk with controlled steps.
Set down with hinge form.
zh-Hans: 站于六角杠内, 硬拉至站立.
稳步行走.
用铰链动作放下.

en: Attach fat grips to dumbbell handles.
Curl up to shoulders with fat grip.
Lower with control — grip emphasis.
zh-Hans: 粗握套加哑铃手柄.
粗握弯举至肩.
控制下放 — 强调握力.

en: Lie on back, cross one ankle over opposite knee.
Pull supporting thigh toward chest.
Hold 20-30s, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 一脚踝交叉放对侧膝上.
拉支撑腿大腿向胸前.
保持 20-30 秒, 换边.

en: Sit, forearms on thighs, underhand grip.
Open fingers slightly, roll bar to fingertips.
Curl back into palm, squeeze.
zh-Hans: 坐姿, 前臂贴大腿, 反握.
微张手指, 杠滚至指尖.
卷回手心, 握紧.

en: On all fours, knees bent.
Lift one knee out to the side.
Hip opens, keep core tight.
Lower controlled, repeat.
zh-Hans: 四肢支撑, 屈膝.
一膝向侧外抬.
髋部外展, 核心收紧.
控制下放, 重复.

en: Mini-band above knees.
On all fours, lift knee out.
Push against band resistance.
Lower controlled.
zh-Hans: 迷你弹力带在膝盖上方.
四肢支撑, 膝向侧外抬.
对抗弹力带.
控制下放.

en: Lie on floor under bar, knees bent or extended.
Lower bar until upper arms touch floor.
Pause, press to lockout.
zh-Hans: 仰卧地面, 杠铃在上, 屈膝或伸腿.
下放至大臂贴地.
暂停, 推至锁定.

en: Use a power rack with safety pins set just above chest level.
zh-Hans: 在深蹲架内做, 安全杠设在胸口上方.

en: Lie on floor, grip bar shoulder-width.
Lower until upper arms touch floor, elbows tucked.
Press up, focus on triceps lockout.
zh-Hans: 仰卧地面, 握距与肩同宽.
下放至大臂贴地, 肘部内收.
推起, 三头发力锁定.

en: Always use rack safety pins.
zh-Hans: 务必使用深蹲架安全杠.

en: Lie on floor with dumbbells at chest.
Press up to full extension.
Lower until triceps lightly touch floor.
zh-Hans: 仰卧地面, 哑铃置胸口.
推至完全伸直.
下放至三头轻触地面.

en: Lie on back, legs straight, just off floor.
Alternate small up-down leg kicks.
Lower back pressed flat to floor.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 双腿直, 微微抬起.
交替小幅上下踢腿.
下背贴地.

en: Anchor band behind at shoulder height.
Arms wide, slight bend — bring hands together in arc.
Squeeze chest, control opening.
zh-Hans: 弹力带固定身后肩高.
双臂打开微屈 — 弧线合拢双手.
收紧胸部, 控制打开.

en: Sit, foam roller under calves.
Lift hips, roll from knee to ankle.
Cross legs for more pressure.
zh-Hans: 坐姿, 泡沫轴置小腿后.
抬起髋部, 滚动膝至踝.
可叠腿增加压力.

en: Lie face down, roller under one chest.
Move arm overhead to roll pec.
Pause on tight spots, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 俯卧, 泡沫轴置单侧胸下.
手臂过头滚动胸肌.
紧绷点停留, 换边.

en: Sit on foam roller, cross one ankle to knee.
Lean to one side, roll over glute.
Pause on tight spots, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 坐泡沫轴上, 一脚踝交叉膝上.
侧倾压臀, 滚动.
紧绷点停留, 换边.

en: Sit, foam roller under one hamstring.
Use hands to push body, roll back of thigh.
Pause on tight spots, switch legs.
zh-Hans: 坐姿, 泡沫轴置大腿后.
双手撑地, 推动身体滚动.
紧绷点停留, 换腿.

en: Lie on side, foam roller under outer thigh.
Roll from hip to knee.
Pause on tender spots, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 侧卧, 泡沫轴置大腿外侧下.
滚动髋至膝.
紧绷点停留, 换边.

en: Side-lying, arm overhead, roller under lat.
Roll from armpit down ribs.
Pause on tender spots, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 侧卧, 单臂过头, 泡沫轴置背阔肌下.
滚动腋下至肋骨.
紧绷点停留, 换边.

en: Face down, foam roller under thighs.
Roll from hip to knee slowly.
Pause on tight spots 20-30s.
zh-Hans: 俯卧, 泡沫轴置大腿下.
缓慢从髋滚到膝.
紧绷点停留 20-30 秒.

en: Lie on back, roller under thoracic spine.
Hands behind head, extend over roller.
Hold 5-10s, slide up, repeat.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 泡沫轴置胸椎下.
双手扶头, 上背向后伸展.
保持 5-10 秒, 上移, 重复.

en: Lie on back, roller under upper back.
Hands behind head, lift hips slightly.
Roll from mid-back to shoulders.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 泡沫轴置上背下.
双手扶头, 微抬髋部.
中背滚动至肩部.

en: Avoid lower back — only upper thoracic spine.
zh-Hans: 避开下背 — 只滚动胸椎部位.

en: Sit upright on bench, barbell overhead, narrow grip.
Lower bar behind head with elbows pointing forward.
Extend back up — focus on long head.
zh-Hans: 坐凳直立, 杠铃过顶窄握.
下放脑后, 肘部指向前.
推回上方 — 重点长头.

en: Don't let bar drop on neck — control on descent.
zh-Hans: 不要让杠砸颈部 — 控制下放.

en: On all fours, knees wide, feet flexed.
Sink hips back, keep spine neutral.
Hold 30-60s, breathe slowly.
zh-Hans: 四点跪, 膝盖宽开, 脚背勾起.
髋部后坐, 脊柱中立.
保持 30-60 秒, 缓慢呼吸.

en: Lie on back, soles together, knees out.
Drive hips up, squeeze glutes.
Keep knees pushed outward.
High reps for the burn.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 脚掌相对, 膝盖外展.
髋部上顶, 收紧臀部.
膝盖保持外展.
高次数刺激.

en: Quadruped, knees wide, ankles outside knees.
Sit hips back toward heels.
Hold 60+ s, breathe into hips.
zh-Hans: 四足支撑, 双膝宽分, 踝在膝外.
髋部后坐向脚跟.
保持 60 秒以上, 髋部呼吸.

en: Hang, depress shoulders fully.
Body to horizontal — straight, parallel to floor.
Hold the position — extreme core/back.
zh-Hans: 悬挂, 肩部完全下压.
身体水平 — 笔直, 与地面平行.
保持姿势 — 极强核心/背.

en: Progress through tuck, advanced tuck, straddle.
zh-Hans: 通过团身、半团身、分腿进阶.

en: Hang from bar, depress shoulders.
Tuck knees tight, lift to horizontal.
Hold body parallel to floor.
zh-Hans: 杠下悬挂, 肩部下压.
团身, 抬至水平.
身体与地面平行.

en: Train scapular strength first.
zh-Hans: 先练习肩胛骨力量.

en: Stand on band, handles in front of thighs.
Raise arms forward to shoulder height.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 站带上, 把手在大腿前.
前举至肩高.
控制下放.

en: Bar in front of thighs, shoulder-width grip.
Raise bar to shoulder height — arms straight.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 杠铃在大腿前, 与肩同宽握.
前举至肩高 — 手臂伸直.
控制下放.

en: Don't use momentum or swing the bar.
zh-Hans: 不要借力或摆动.

en: Cable at lowest setting, handle in hand.
Face away from pulley, cable behind leg.
Raise arm forward to shoulder height.
Lower slowly.
zh-Hans: 绳索调最低, 手握把.
背对滑轮, 绳索在腿后.
前举至肩高.
缓慢下放.

en: Rope on low pulley, face away.
Hold rope with thumbs facing up.
Raise rope to forehead height, pull apart.
Lower slowly.
zh-Hans: 绳低位, 背对滑轮.
握绳, 拇指朝上.
上举至额高, 分开.
缓慢下放.

en: Stand tall, dumbbells in front of thighs, palms in.
Raise one or both arms to shoulder height.
Slight bend in elbows.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 站姿挺直, 哑铃在大腿前, 掌心朝内.
单臂或双臂前举至肩高.
肘部微弯.
控制下放.

en: Dumbbells at sides, palms facing thighs.
Raise one arm forward to shoulder height.
Lower as other arm raises.
Alternate arms continuously.
zh-Hans: 哑铃在体侧, 掌心朝大腿.
一臂前举至肩高.
另一臂上举时下放.
持续交替.

en: Dumbbells at sides, neutral (hammer) grip.
Raise to shoulder height — thumbs up.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 哑铃在体侧, 对握 (锤式).
前举至肩高 — 拇指朝上.
控制下放.

en: Lie face-down on incline bench.
Dumbbells hanging, palms facing down.
Raise arms forward to ear level.
Lower slowly.
zh-Hans: 面朝下趴上斜凳.
哑铃下垂, 掌心朝下.
前举至耳高.
缓慢下放.

en: Dumbbells in front, palms facing down.
Raise arms forward to shoulder height.
Lower with control — emphasize front delt.
zh-Hans: 哑铃在身前, 掌心向下.
前举至肩高.
控制下放 — 注重前束.

en: Stand tall, dumbbell in one hand.
Raise arm forward to shoulder height.
Lower slowly, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 站姿挺直, 单手哑铃.
前举至肩高.
缓慢下放, 换边.

en: EZ bar at thighs, narrow inner grip.
Raise bar to shoulder height.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 曲杠在大腿前, 较窄内握.
前举至肩高.
控制下放.

en: Hold kettlebell by horns with both hands at thighs.
Raise to shoulder height.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 双手握壶铃角在大腿前.
前举至肩高.
控制下放.

en: Bar end at hip, both hands wrapped on top.
Raise bar forward and up to head height.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 杆端在髋, 双手握杆端.
前举至头高.
控制下放.

en: Hold plate at 3 and 9 o'clock positions.
Raise plate in front to shoulder height.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 双手扣杠铃片 3 点和 9 点位.
前举至肩高.
控制下放.

en: Lie on back, knees bent, feet flat.
Drive hips up to lockout.
Squeeze glutes hard at top.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 屈膝, 双脚平踩.
髋部上顶至锁定.
顶部强烈收紧臀部.
控制下放.

en: Mini-band above knees, lie on back.
Knees bent, feet flat.
Drive hips up, push knees outward.
Squeeze glutes hard.
zh-Hans: 迷你弹力带在膝上, 仰卧.
屈膝, 双脚平踩.
髋部上顶, 膝盖外推.
强烈收紧臀部.

en: Lie on back, bar across hips with pad.
Knees bent, feet flat on floor.
Drive hips up to extension.
Squeeze, lower control.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 杠铃横在髋上加护垫.
屈膝, 双脚平踩.
髋部上顶至伸展.
收紧, 控制下放.

en: Use pad — bar bruises hip bones.
zh-Hans: 用护垫 — 杠铃压髋骨.

en: Lie on back, dumbbell on hips.
Knees bent, feet flat.
Drive hips up to lockout.
Squeeze glutes, lower control.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 哑铃放髋上.
屈膝, 双脚平踩.
髋部上顶至锁定.
收紧臀部, 控制下放.

en: Lie on back, feet elevated on bench.
Knees bent at 90°.
Drive hips up, squeeze glutes.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 双脚抬高放凳.
膝盖弯曲 90°.
髋部上顶, 收紧臀部.
控制下放.

en: Glute bridge position, hips up.
Lift one knee toward chest.
Hold briefly, switch legs.
Hips stay up — don't drop.
zh-Hans: 臀桥位置, 髋部上抬.
一膝向胸抬起.
短暂保持, 换腿.
髋部保持上抬 — 不要下沉.

en: Lie on back, one foot planted, other up.
Drive hips up on one leg.
Squeeze glute at top.
Lower controlled, switch legs.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 一脚踩地, 另腿上举.
单腿髋部上顶.
顶部收紧臀部.
控制下放, 换腿.

en: Position face down in GHD machine.
Thighs on pad, ankles in clamp.
Lower torso, then curl back up.
Hamstrings drive the curl.
zh-Hans: 俯卧 GHD 器械.
大腿在垫上, 脚踝在卡扣中.
下放躯干, 然后弯举起身.
腘绳带动弯举.

en: Hard exercise — build up reps slowly.
zh-Hans: 动作较难 — 渐进增加次数.

en: Band around ankles, hand on wall.
Stand tall, kick one leg back.
Squeeze glute against band.
Return, alternate legs.
zh-Hans: 弹力带绕脚踝, 手扶墙.
站直, 一腿后踢.
对抗弹力带收紧臀.
返回, 交替腿.

name.zh-Hans: 臀部后踢 (绳索, 屈膝)

en: Ankle strap, low cable.
Hinge forward slightly, knee bent.
Push leg back with bent knee.
Sole points back at top.
zh-Hans: 脚踝绑绳索, 低位.
略前倾, 屈膝.
屈膝向后推腿.
顶部脚掌向后.

en: Foot on pad, chest against pad.
Press leg back to full extension.
Squeeze glute hard at top.
Lower controlled, switch legs.
zh-Hans: 脚踏护垫, 胸贴靠垫.
腿向后蹬至完全伸直.
顶部强烈收紧臀部.
控制下放, 换腿.

en: Lie on back, pull one knee across body.
Use opposite hand to guide knee down.
Hold 20-30s, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 单膝拉向对侧.
对侧手引导膝下压.
保持 20-30 秒, 换边.

en: Bar on upper back, feet shoulder-width.
Hinge hips back, torso parallel-ish to floor.
Drive hips forward to stand.
zh-Hans: 杠放上背, 双脚与肩同宽.
髋后推, 躯干接近水平.
髋前送, 站立.

en: Use light weight — heavy GMs risk back injury.
Maintain neutral spine throughout.
zh-Hans: 用轻重量 — 大重量风险大.
全程保持脊柱中立.

en: Band looped under feet, across upper back.
Hinge at hips, torso lowers forward.
Feel hamstring stretch.
Drive hips up to stand.
zh-Hans: 弹力带踩脚下, 绕上背.
髋部铰链, 躯干前倾下放.
感受腘绳拉伸.
髋部上顶起身.

en: Hold dumbbell on upper chest, feet shoulder-width.
Hinge hips back, lean forward.
Drive hips forward to stand.
zh-Hans: 上胸抱哑铃, 双脚与肩同宽.
髋后推, 前倾.
髋前送, 站立.

en: Sit on bench, bar on upper back.
Hinge forward at hips.
Lower torso toward thighs.
Return upright, keep back flat.
zh-Hans: 坐凳, 杠铃放上背.
髋部铰链前倾.
躯干下放至接近大腿.
起身回直立, 背挺直.

en: Light weight — lower back is exposed.
zh-Hans: 轻重量 — 下背暴露.

en: Bar on back in Smith machine.
Slight knee bend, hinge at hips.
Lower torso toward parallel.
Drive hips forward to stand.
zh-Hans: 杠铃在史密斯机背上.
膝盖微弯, 髋部铰链.
躯干下放至接近水平.
髋部前顶起身.

en: Don't round back — fixed path doesn't save spine.
zh-Hans: 不要圆背 — 固定轨迹也保护不了脊柱.

en: Kettlebells on floor, hinge forward over them.
Row one KB up while other rests on floor.
Alternate sides, explosive pull.
zh-Hans: 壶铃放地, 前屈于上方.
单手拉壶铃, 另一边停地面.
左右交替, 爆发拉.

en: Hold grip crusher in one hand.
Close fully, squeeze hard.
Open slowly, repeat.
zh-Hans: 单手握握力器.
完全合拢, 用力捏.
缓慢张开, 重复.

en: Bench press setup, wide grip, elbows flared.
Lower bar to throat/clavicle, slow tempo.
Press up — emphasizes upper chest.
zh-Hans: 卧推姿势, 宽握, 肘部外展.
缓慢下放至喉部/锁骨.
推起 — 强化上胸.

en: High shoulder risk — start very light.
Always use safety pins or spotter.
zh-Hans: 对肩压力大 — 从极轻开始.
务必使用安全杠或保护.

en: Bar on floor behind heels, deadlift grip.
Stand upright, bar against back of thighs.
Squat down keeping bar close to legs.
Stand up, squeeze quads at top.
zh-Hans: 杠铃在脚跟后, 抓握硬拉位.
站直, 杠铃贴大腿后.
下蹲, 杠铃贴近腿.
起身, 顶部收紧股四头.

en: Old-school lift — keep weight modest.
Don't round lower back.
zh-Hans: 老式动作 — 重量适中.
不要圆下背.

en: Shoulders under pads, back flat on pad.
Feet shoulder-width on platform.
Lower under control to 90° knee bend.
Press up — don't lock out hard.
zh-Hans: 肩膀顶护垫, 背贴靠板.
双脚与肩同宽踩平台.
控制下放至膝盖 90°.
推起 — 不要硬锁.

en: Don't let lower back round at bottom.
zh-Hans: 底部不要圆下背.

en: Stand, dumbbells at sides, neutral grip.
Curl up, palms stay facing each other.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 站立, 哑铃在体侧, 中立握.
弯举, 掌心保持相对.
控制下放.

en: Low pulley, rope attachment, neutral grip.
Curl rope up, hammer position.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 低位滑轮, 绳索把, 中立握.
弯举绳, 锤式位.
控制下放.

en: Low pulley, rope attachment, neutral grip.
Hammer curl rope to chest level.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 低位滑轮, 绳索把, 中立握.
锤式弯举至胸高.
控制下放.

en: Band anchored low, loop around ankles.
Lie face down on mat.
Curl heels to glutes against band.
Lower slowly with tension.
zh-Hans: 弹力带低位固定, 套脚踝.
俯卧垫上.
脚跟弯举向臀, 对抗弹力带.
缓慢下放保持张力.

en: Lie on back, sliders under heels.
Lift hips up to bridge.
Slide heels in toward glutes.
Slide back out, hold bridge.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 滑盘在脚跟下.
髋部上抬至桥位.
脚跟滑向臀部.
再滑出, 保持桥位.

en: Lie on back, heels on Swiss ball.
Lift hips up to bridge.
Curl ball toward glutes with heels.
Extend back out, slow tempo.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 脚跟放瑜伽球上.
髋部上抬至桥位.
脚跟将球卷向臀部.
再伸出, 缓慢节奏.

en: Sit on floor, one leg extended, other bent.
Hinge from hips, reach toward toes.
Hold 20-30s, feel stretch in back of thigh.
zh-Hans: 坐地, 一腿伸直一腿弯曲.
髋部前倾, 双手伸向脚尖.
保持 20-30 秒, 大腿后侧拉伸.

en: Stand, feet together, knees slightly bent.
Hinge from hips, hands reach to floor.
Relax neck, hold 20-30s.
zh-Hans: 站立, 双脚并拢, 微屈膝.
髋部前屈, 双手触地.
颈部放松, 保持 20-30 秒.

en: Lie on back, lift one leg straight up.
Grip behind thigh, pull toward chest.
Hold 20-30s, switch legs.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 单腿垂直抬起.
握大腿后侧, 拉向胸前.
保持 20-30 秒, 换腿.

name.zh-Hans: 腘绳肌拉伸 (仰卧, 带子)

en: Lie on back, loop strap around one foot.
Lift leg straight, pull strap to deepen.
Hold 20-30s, switch legs.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 弹力带绕脚.
直腿抬起, 拉带子加深拉伸.
保持 20-30 秒, 换腿.

en: Kick up to balance, no wall.
Tight body, slight curve at lower back.
Fingertip pressure for balance control.
zh-Hans: 踢上至平衡, 不靠墙.
身体绷紧, 下背略弯.
指尖发力控制平衡.

en: Master wall handstand first.
Learn to bail safely from any position.
zh-Hans: 先掌握靠墙倒立.
学会任意位置安全脱离.

en: Kick up to handstand against wall.
Lower head to floor in controlled descent.
Press back up to handstand.
zh-Hans: 踢腿至倒立靠墙.
控制下放, 头碰地.
推起回倒立.

en: Use wall for safety until practiced.
Stack shoulders over wrists — protect neck.
zh-Hans: 熟练前一定靠墙.
肩对齐手腕 — 保护颈部.

en: Kick up to wall, hands shoulder-width.
Stack body — wrists, shoulders, hips, heels.
Push floor away, hold for time.
zh-Hans: 踢上墙, 双手与肩同宽.
身体堆叠 — 腕, 肩, 髋, 脚跟.
推地, 保持时间.

en: Practice falling out safely — cartwheel out.
zh-Hans: 练习安全脱离 — 侧手翻下来.

en: Lie on back, knees pulled to chest.
Grab outer feet, knees toward armpits.
Hold 30-60s, rock side to side.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 双膝拉向胸前.
抓脚外侧, 膝盖拉向腋下.
保持 30-60 秒, 可左右摇晃.

en: Lie on back, knees bent, slight crunch.
Reach side to side to tap heels.
Keep shoulders off floor throughout.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 屈膝, 微微卷腹.
左右触碰脚跟.
全程肩部离地.

en: Chest on steep incline bench (60°), underhand grip.
Row dumbbells to belly with elbows wide.
Pause and lower under control.
zh-Hans: 胸贴陡上斜凳 (60度), 反握.
肘部外展, 哑铃拉至腹部.
顶部停, 控制下放.

en: Run in place, drive knees to waist.
Land on balls of feet, quick contact.
Pump arms in sync with legs.
zh-Hans: 原地跑, 膝盖抬至腰部.
前脚掌着地, 快速触地.
手臂与腿同步摆动.

en: Kettlebell between feet, hinge hips back.
Swing up, pull bell to shoulder height.
Elbow high, wide stance at top.
Control descent.
zh-Hans: 壶铃在脚间, 髋后铰链.
向上摆动, 上拉至肩高.
肘部高位, 顶部肩宽.
控制下降.

en: Hip drive — don't use only arms.
zh-Hans: 髋部发力 — 不要只用手臂.

en: Sturdy shoes, layered clothing.
Steady pace, short steps on inclines.
Hydrate often, fuel for long hikes.
zh-Hans: 穿稳固鞋, 多层穿搭.
步速稳定, 上坡小步.
勤补水, 长途要补给.

en: Tell someone your route, carry essentials.
zh-Hans: 告知他人路线, 带必需品.

en: Sit, both legs at 90° — one in front, one behind.
Lean over front knee for stretch.
Pivot knees to switch to other side.
zh-Hans: 坐姿, 双腿 90° — 一前一后.
前倾压前膝拉伸.
膝盖转动换至另一侧.

en: Stand tall, hold support if needed.
Lift one knee up, out to side, behind.
Slowly trace biggest possible circle.
zh-Hans: 站直, 必要时扶物.
一膝上抬, 外展, 后伸.
缓慢画出最大圆.

en: Kneel with one knee, other foot forward.
Tuck pelvis, sink hips forward.
Hold 20-30s, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 单膝跪地, 另一脚前.
骨盆后倾, 髋部前推.
保持 20-30 秒, 换边.

en: Upper back on bench, bar across hips.
One foot flat, other on heel for balance.
Drive primarily through flat foot.
Squeeze glute on working side.
zh-Hans: 上背靠凳, 杠铃横在髋上.
一脚平踩, 另脚仅脚跟点地平衡.
主要用平踩脚发力.
工作侧臀部收紧.

en: Upper back on bench, band around hips.
Anchor band low on either side.
Drive hips up against band tension.
Squeeze glutes hard at top.
zh-Hans: 上背靠凳, 弹力带绕髋部.
两端低位固定.
髋部对抗弹力带上顶.
顶部强烈收紧臀部.

en: Upper back on bench, bar across hips.
Feet flat, knees bent 90°.
Drive hips up, squeeze glutes hard.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 上背靠卧推凳, 杠铃横在髋上.
双脚平踩, 膝盖弯曲 90°.
髋部上顶, 强烈收紧臀部.
控制下放.

en: Use a pad on bar — hip bones bruise.
Don't overextend lower back at top.
zh-Hans: 杠铃用护垫 — 不然髋骨淤青.
顶部不要过度反弓下背.

en: Hip thrust setup, bar across hips.
Drive up, pause 3 seconds at top.
Squeeze glutes hard during pause.
Lower controlled, repeat.
zh-Hans: 臀推位置, 杠铃横在髋上.
上顶, 顶部暂停 3 秒.
暂停时强烈收紧臀部.
控制下放, 重复.

en: Upper back on bench, bar across hips.
One foot flat, other extended.
Drive hips up on single leg.
Lower controlled, switch.
zh-Hans: 上背靠凳, 杠铃横在髋上.
一脚平踩, 另腿伸展.
单腿髋部上顶.
控制下放, 换边.

en: Demanding — start with bodyweight first.
zh-Hans: 难度大 — 先从徒手开始.

en: Upper back on bench, dumbbell on hips.
Feet flat, knees bent 90°.
Drive hips up, squeeze glutes.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 上背靠凳, 哑铃放髋上.
双脚平踩, 膝盖 90°.
髋部上顶, 收紧臀部.
控制下放.

en: Lie on back, knees bent, feet flat.
Drive hips up to bridge.
Squeeze glutes hard at top.
Lower controlled.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 屈膝, 双脚平踩.
髋部上顶至桥位.
顶部强烈收紧臀部.
控制下放.

en: Upper back on bench, kettlebell on hips.
Feet flat, knees 90°.
Drive hips up, squeeze glutes.
Lower controlled.
zh-Hans: 上背靠凳, 壶铃放髋上.
双脚平踩, 膝盖 90°.
髋部上顶, 收紧臀部.
控制下放.

en: Position back on pad, hips under bar.
Feet on platform, knees bent.
Drive hips up to full extension.
Squeeze glutes, lower controlled.
zh-Hans: 背靠垫, 髋部在杠下.
双脚踩平台, 屈膝.
髋部上顶至完全伸展.
收紧臀部, 控制下放.

en: Hip thrust position, hips up at top.
Lower 6 inches, then drive back up.
Short pulse range — stay near top.
High reps for the burn.
zh-Hans: 臀推位置, 顶部髋部上抬.
下放 15 cm, 再上顶.
小幅脉冲 — 接近顶部.
高次数刺激.

en: Upper back on bench, one foot planted.
Other leg extended in front.
Drive hips up — single-leg squeeze.
Lower controlled, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 上背靠凳, 一脚踩地.
另一腿前伸.
髋部上顶 — 单腿收紧.
控制下放, 换边.

en: Upper back on bench under Smith bar.
Bar across hips with pad.
Drive hips up to lockout.
Squeeze glutes at top, lower.
zh-Hans: 上背靠卧推凳, 在杠下.
杠铃横在髋上, 加护垫.
髋部上顶至锁定.
顶部收紧臀部, 下放.

en: Lie back, low back pressed to floor.
Arms overhead, legs straight, both lifted.
Hold the dish shape — abs locked.
zh-Hans: 仰躺, 下背紧贴地面.
双臂过头, 双腿伸直, 同时抬起.
保持碗型 — 腹部收紧.

en: Hollow hold position — abs tight.
Rock back and forth as a rigid unit.
Maintain shape, don't lose hollow.
zh-Hans: 空心姿势 — 腹部紧绷.
整身前后摇摆, 保持刚性.
维持空心形态, 不变形.

en: Position hips on pad, ankles under rollers.
Hinge forward, then rise to neutral spine.
Squeeze glutes/back, don't hyperextend.
zh-Hans: 髋部贴垫, 脚踝挂滚.
前屈再起到脊柱中立位.
收紧臀部/背部, 不要过伸.

en: Don't hyperextend at top — stop at neutral.
zh-Hans: 顶部不要过伸 — 停在中立位.

en: Hold plate/dumbbell at chest on hyperextension bench.
Hinge forward, rise to neutral.
Control descent throughout.
zh-Hans: 胸前抱杠片/哑铃, 上器械.
前屈, 起身至中立.
全程控制下放.

en: Avoid overextension at top — risk lower back strain.
zh-Hans: 顶部避免过伸 — 防止下背拉伤.

en: Stand, hinge to floor, walk hands out.
Reach plank, optional push-up.
Walk feet to hands, stand up.
zh-Hans: 站立, 髋部铰链至地, 双手向前爬.
至平板支撑, 可加俯卧撑.
双脚走向双手, 站起.

en: Set bench to 30-45° incline.
Lower bar to upper chest under control.
Press up and slightly back, full lockout.
zh-Hans: 卧推凳调至 30-45° 上斜.
下放至上胸, 控制速度.
向上略向后推, 完全锁定.

en: Don't go above 45° — turns into shoulder press.
Use spotter on heavy sets.
zh-Hans: 角度不要超过 45° — 否则变成肩推.
大重量需要保护.

en: Incline bench between cable pulleys, handles at upper chest.
Press handles up and converge at top.
Squeeze upper chest, slow eccentric.
zh-Hans: 上斜凳置绳索之间, 手柄置上胸.
向上推至顶部合拢.
收紧上胸, 缓慢下放.

en: Bench at 30°, grip shoulder-width.
Lower bar to upper chest, elbows tucked.
Press up — squeeze upper chest and triceps.
zh-Hans: 上斜凳 30°, 握距与肩同宽.
下放至上胸, 肘部内收.
推起 — 收紧上胸和三头.

en: Bench at 30-45° incline.
Press dumbbells up and slightly inward.
Squeeze upper chest at top, lower under control.
zh-Hans: 卧推凳调至 30-45° 上斜.
推起哑铃, 略向内收.
顶部收紧上胸, 控制下放.

en: Don't arch lower back excessively at top of press.
zh-Hans: 顶部不要过度反弓下背.

en: Adjust seat so handles align with upper chest.
Press up and slightly inward.
Lower with full control.
zh-Hans: 调整座椅, 手柄与上胸齐平.
向上略内推.
完全控制下放.

en: Incline bench 30-45°, palms face each other.
Press dumbbells up.
Lower under control, elbows tucked.
zh-Hans: 上斜凳 30-45°, 掌心相对.
向上推起.
控制下放, 肘部内收.

en: Set bench at 30-45° under Smith bar.
Lower to upper chest, controlled tempo.
Press up along fixed track.
zh-Hans: 卧推凳 30-45° 置于史密斯杠下.
下放至上胸, 控制速度.
沿固定轨道推起.

en: Stand facing away from cable, low pulleys, handles at waist.
Press up and forward to upper chest height.
Squeeze upper chest, control return.
zh-Hans: 背对绳索, 低位, 手柄置腰.
向前向上推至上胸高度.
收紧上胸, 控制回程.

en: Bench at low incline, behind landmine setup.
Both hands cup bar end at chest.
Press up and forward, slow return.
zh-Hans: 凳调至低斜, 置于地雷管设置后.
双手抱杠铃端置胸前.
向上向前推, 缓慢回程.

en: Sit on 45-60° incline bench, arms hanging.
Curl dumbbells up, supinate at top.
Lower fully, max biceps stretch.
zh-Hans: 45-60度上斜凳, 双臂自然下垂.
弯举哑铃, 顶部外旋.
完全下放, 二头最大拉伸.

en: Incline bench 30-45°, palms face up underhand.
Open arms in wide arc, slight elbow bend.
Squeeze upper chest hard at top.
zh-Hans: 上斜凳 30-45°, 反握 (掌心向上).
弧线打开双臂, 肘微屈.
顶部强力收紧上胸.

en: Incline bench 30-45°, palms face each other.
Open arms wide in arc, slight bend.
Squeeze upper chest to close.
zh-Hans: 上斜凳 30-45°, 掌心相对.
弧线打开双臂, 微屈肘.
收紧上胸合拢.

en: Lie face-down on 30-45° incline bench.
Row dumbbells to lower ribs.
Lower slowly, full stretch at bottom.
zh-Hans: 俯卧于30-45度上斜凳.
哑铃拉至下肋.
缓慢下放, 底部充分拉伸.

en: Incline bench, dumbbells pressed together at chest.
Press up while keeping dumbbells touching.
Maintain inward pressure throughout.
zh-Hans: 上斜凳, 哑铃胸前夹紧.
向上推, 哑铃保持接触.
全程保持向内挤压.

en: Sit on incline bench, palms supinated outward.
Curl dumbbells, focus on inner head squeeze.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 坐上斜凳, 掌心向外旋.
弯举哑铃, 内侧短头收紧.
控制下放.

en: Hands on bench, band across upper back.
Lower chest to bench, body straight.
Press up — band increases resistance at top.
zh-Hans: 双手撑凳, 弹力带绕上背.
胸部下降至凳, 身体保持直线.
推起 — 顶部弹力增强.

name.zh-Hans: 窄距上斜卧推 (史密斯机)

en: Set bench 30°, narrow grip on Smith bar.
Lower to upper chest, elbows tucked.
Press along fixed path — squeeze tris.
zh-Hans: 上斜凳 30°, 窄握史密斯杠.
下放至上胸, 肘部内收.
沿固定轨道推起 — 收紧三头.

en: Find sustained hill or stairs.
Lean slightly forward from ankles.
Drive through glutes, steady breath.
zh-Hans: 找连续坡道或楼梯.
从脚踝处略前倾.
臀部发力, 稳定呼吸.

en: Stand side-on to cable at elbow height.
Near hand grabs cable, elbow at side at 90°.
Rotate forearm in across body.
Slow return.
zh-Hans: 侧站绳索机, 绳在肘高.
近侧手握绳, 肘部90°在体侧.
前臂内旋过身体.
缓慢还原.

en: Bar at hip height, lie under it, grip bar.
Pull chest to bar, body straight.
Lower under control, arms straight.
zh-Hans: 杠在髋高, 仰卧握杠.
拉胸口至杠, 身体保持直线.
控制下放, 手臂伸直.

en: Bar at hip height, feet on bench/box.
Pull chest to bar, body straight.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 杠在髋高, 脚踩凳或箱上.
拉胸口至杠, 身体保持直线.
控制下放.

en: Curl dumbbell to 90° angle.
Hold position with biceps engaged.
Maintain for time.
zh-Hans: 弯举哑铃至90度.
二头收紧保持位置.
持续时间.

en: Press palms together at chest height.
Push inward — chest fully engaged.
Hold 15-30 seconds.
zh-Hans: 双掌胸前合拢.
向内挤压 — 胸部完全收紧.

en: Lie flat, arms overhead, legs straight.
Bring knees in while sitting up.
Touch knees, lower flat under control.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 双手过头, 双腿伸直.
屈膝上提同时坐起.
手碰膝, 控制下放回起点.

en: Bench setup, narrow grip — hybrid of bench + skullcrusher.
Lower bar toward upper chest / chin, elbows forward.
Press up explosively — heavy triceps loading.
zh-Hans: 卧推姿势, 窄握 — 卧推与颈后屈伸结合.
下放至上胸 / 下巴, 肘部前推.
爆发推起 — 三头超负荷.

en: Use safety pins — bar path close to neck.
Start light, learn the unique groove.
zh-Hans: 使用安全杠 — 杠路接近颈部.
从轻开始, 掌握独特轨迹.

en: Elbows close, wrists turn the rope.
Light bounces on balls of feet.
Stay relaxed, breathe steady.
zh-Hans: 肘部贴身, 手腕转绳.
前脚掌轻巧跳起.
全身放松, 稳定呼吸.

en: Alternate foot pattern — light shift side to side.
Keep rhythm steady, near continuous.
Looks like jogging in place over the rope.
zh-Hans: 双脚交替 — 左右轻巧移动.
节奏稳定, 几乎不停.
看起来像原地慢跑跳过绳.

en: Higher jump, two rope passes per jump.
Faster wrist rotation, not arm.
Tight body, no pike or tuck.
zh-Hans: 跳得稍高, 每跳绳过两次.
加快手腕转速, 不是手臂.
身体绷紧, 不要折叠或团身.

en: Master single bounces first — calf strain risk.
zh-Hans: 先掌握单摇 — 容易拉伤小腿.

en: Drive knees to waist height each rep.
Quick rope turn, fast feet.
Tight core to control knee drive.
zh-Hans: 膝盖每次抬到腰部高度.
快速转绳, 脚下迅速.
核心绷紧控制提膝.

en: Jump feet wide, arms overhead.
Jump back to start in one motion.
Steady rhythm, soft landings.
zh-Hans: 跳开双脚, 双臂上举过头.
一气呵成跳回起始位.
节奏稳定, 落地轻柔.

en: Lunge stance, knees both bent.
Jump up, scissor legs mid-air.
Land in new lunge, immediately continue.
zh-Hans: 弓步姿势, 双膝弯曲.
起跳, 空中剪刀换腿.
落地为新弓步, 立即继续.

en: Stop if knee pain — high impact.
zh-Hans: 膝盖疼要停 — 高冲击动作.

en: Lie on bench with kettlebells racked at shoulders.
Press up to lockout — bells rest on back of wrist.
Lower controlled — stable wrist.
zh-Hans: 平躺凳上, 壶铃置肩部.
推至锁定 — 壶铃靠在腕背.
控制下放 — 手腕稳定.

en: Lie on floor with kettlebells at chest, knees bent.
Press up to lockout.
Lower until upper arms touch floor.
zh-Hans: 仰卧地面, 壶铃置胸口, 屈膝.
推至锁定.
下放至大臂贴地.

en: Stand wide, kettlebell between feet.
Hinge hips back, hike between legs.
Drive hips forward — kettlebell to shoulder.
Let it swing back down, repeat.
zh-Hans: 宽站位, 壶铃在双脚间.
髋部后铰链, 壶铃后摆.
髋部前顶 — 壶铃摆至肩.
回摆下行, 重复.

en: Drive with hips not arms — common mistake.
Keep back flat throughout.
zh-Hans: 用髋部发力, 不用手臂 — 常见错误.
全程背部挺直.

en: Stand wide, kettlebell between feet.
Hinge hips back, hike kettlebell.
Drive hips forward — kettlebell overhead.
Let it swing back down, repeat.
zh-Hans: 宽站位, 壶铃在双脚间.
髋部后铰链, 壶铃后摆.
髋部前顶 — 壶铃摆至过头.
回摆下行, 重复.

en: Shoulder mobility needed — skip if shoulder issues.
zh-Hans: 需要肩部灵活性 — 肩部有伤勿做.

en: Stand wide, kettlebell in one hand.
Hinge hips back, swing between legs.
Drive hips forward, kettlebell to shoulder.
Switch hands mid-swing or after set.
zh-Hans: 宽站位, 单手持壶铃.
髋部后铰链, 壶铃后摆.
髋部前顶, 壶铃摆至肩.
中途或组间换手.

en: Hip drive, not arm pull.
zh-Hans: 髋部发力, 不是手臂拉.

en: Lunge stance, hands plant on floor.
Front leg drives, back leg kicks up.
Stack body upside down, control.
zh-Hans: 弓步姿势, 双手撑地.
前腿发力, 后腿踢上.
倒立叠合, 控制平衡.

en: Practice near wall first for safety.
zh-Hans: 先靠墙练习以保安全.

en: Anchor band low and forward, grip ends, hinge forward.
Upper arms tight at sides, extend elbows back.
Resistance peaks at lockout.
zh-Hans: 弹力带前下方固定, 握两端, 前倾.
大臂贴体侧, 后伸肘部.
锁定处阻力最大.

name.zh-Hans: 臀部后踢 (站姿, 弹力带)

en: Band anchored low, around ankle.
Stand tall, hand on wall.
Kick leg straight back.
Squeeze glute at top.
zh-Hans: 弹力带低位固定, 绕脚踝.
站直, 手扶墙.
腿直向后踢.
顶部收紧臀部.

en: Face cable, low rope attachment, hinge forward.
Upper arms parallel to torso, elbows at 90°.
Extend rope back, spread hands at end.
zh-Hans: 面对绳索机, 低位绳索, 前倾.
大臂贴体侧, 肘部 90°.
向后伸展, 末端双手分开.

name.zh-Hans: 三头后摆 (绳索, 单臂)

en: Face cable, low pulley, single handle.
Hinge forward, upper arm parallel to torso.
Extend handle back — constant tension.
zh-Hans: 面对绳索机, 低位单手柄.
前倾, 大臂贴体侧.
向后伸展 — 持续张力.

en: Stand hinged at hips, dumbbells in both hands.
Upper arms parallel to torso, elbows at 90°.
Extend both arms back — squeeze, slow return.
zh-Hans: 站立髋部前倾, 双手持哑铃.
大臂贴体侧, 肘部 90°.
双臂向后伸直 — 收紧, 缓慢回程.

en: Both knees on bench, one hand supports, dumbbell in other.
Hinge forward, upper arm parallel to torso.
Extend back — fully lock arm at top.
zh-Hans: 双膝跪凳, 一手撑, 另一手持哑铃.
前倾, 大臂贴体侧.
向后伸直 — 顶部完全锁定.

name.zh-Hans: 三头后摆 (哑铃, 单臂)

en: Knee and hand on bench, opposite foot planted.
Upper arm parallel to floor, dumbbell at 90°.
Extend arm back — squeeze triceps, slow return.
zh-Hans: 单膝单手撑凳, 对侧脚着地.
大臂与地面平行, 哑铃 90°.
向后伸直 — 收紧三头, 缓慢回程.

en: Kneel on all fours, dumbbell in one hand.
