Upper arm parallel to torso, extend elbow back.
Squeeze triceps at lockout, slow return.
zh-Hans: 四足跪地, 单手持哑铃.
大臂贴体侧, 后伸肘部.
锁定时收紧三头, 缓慢回程.

en: Kneel facing cable column, rope or bar overhead.
Arms straight, pull down to floor.
Return slowly overhead.
zh-Hans: 跪面绳索机, 绳或杠在头上.
手臂伸直, 下拉至地面.
缓慢回头顶.

en: Kneel facing away from cable, handles at chest.
Press forward to full extension.
Slow return — core stays tight.
zh-Hans: 跪姿背对绳索, 手柄置胸口.
向前推至完全伸直.
缓慢回程 — 核心保持收紧.

en: Kneel below cable, grip wide bar.
Pull bar to chest, lats engaged.
Extend slowly under control.
zh-Hans: 跪于绳索下, 握宽杠.
拉至胸, 背阔肌发力.
控制缓慢伸展.

en: Lie on back, knees bent.
Pull both knees to chest with hands.
Hold 20-30s, rock side to side gently.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 屈膝.
双手抱双膝拉向胸.
保持 20-30 秒, 可左右轻摇.

en: Heavy dumbbell, brace one arm on bench.
Pull explosively, allow body english.
High reps with heavy weight.
zh-Hans: 大重量哑铃, 单手撑凳.
爆发拉, 允许身体借力.
高次数加大重量.

en: Form intentionally loose — needs back conditioning.
zh-Hans: 动作刻意宽松 — 需背部基础.

en: Support on parallel bars or floor.
Lift legs straight to horizontal.
Hold L shape — arms locked.
zh-Hans: 双杠或地面支撑.
直腿抬至水平.
保持 L 形 — 手臂锁定.

en: Hold end of barbell at shoulder, anchor on floor.
Press bar up and forward at angle.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 杠铃一端固定地面, 另一端置肩.
斜上方向前推.
控制下放.

en: Down knee opposite pressing arm.
Bar end at shoulder, ribs over hips.
Press, resist rotation, lower slowly.
zh-Hans: 推举臂同侧腿在前, 异侧膝跪地.
杆端在肩, 胸腹叠加.
推举, 抗旋转, 缓慢下放.

en: Half-kneel facing landmine.
Hold bar end at shoulder, opposite hand on hip.
Press up and forward, lock out.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 半跪面对地雷管.
杆端在肩, 对侧手叉腰.
向上向前推, 锁定.
控制下放.

en: Both hands cup end of barbell at chest.
Press up and forward at angle.
Lower under control to chest.
zh-Hans: 双手抱杠铃一端置胸前.
斜上方向前推.
控制下放至胸口.

en: Straddle bar in landmine, V-handle on bar.
Hinge forward, row bar to chest.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 跨地雷杠, V把套杠.
前屈, 拉杠至胸.
控制下放.

en: Stand beside landmine, hinge forward.
Grip bar end one hand, row to hip.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 站于地雷旁, 前屈.
单手握杠端, 拉至髋.
控制下放.

en: Sit at pulldown station, grip bar overhand.
Pull bar to upper chest, elbows drive down.
Extend slowly to full stretch.
zh-Hans: 坐于下拉机, 正握杠.
拉杠至上胸, 肘部下压.
缓慢伸展, 充分拉伸.

en: Don't lean back excessively — keep torso mostly upright.
zh-Hans: 不要过度后仰 — 躯干基本直立.

en: Loop band overhead, kneel or sit.
Pull ends down to shoulders.
Extend slowly under control.
zh-Hans: 弹力带挂顶, 跪或坐.
拉两端至肩.
控制缓慢伸展.

en: Wide overhand grip, lean slightly forward.
Pull bar behind neck to base of skull.
Extend slowly with control.
zh-Hans: 宽正握, 略前倾.
拉杠至颈后到后脑.
控制缓慢伸展.

en: Requires good shoulder mobility — risky if tight.
Use lighter weight — focus on form.
zh-Hans: 需要良好肩部灵活性 — 紧的话风险大.
用轻重量 — 注重动作.

en: Use V-handle or close-grip bar, neutral grip.
Pull handle to lower chest, elbows tight.
Extend slowly under control.
zh-Hans: 用V把或近握杠, 中立握.
拉至下胸, 肘部贴身.
控制缓慢伸展.

en: Parallel handles, palms facing each other.
Pull handles to chest, elbows down and back.
Extend slowly under control.
zh-Hans: 平行手柄, 掌心相对.
拉至胸前, 肘部下后.
控制缓慢伸展.

en: Underhand grip, narrow on bar.
Pull bar to upper chest, focus on lats.
Extend slowly with control.
zh-Hans: 反握, 握距窄.
拉至上胸, 重点感受背阔肌.
控制缓慢伸展.

en: Single handle, sit at pulldown station.
Pull handle to shoulder, focus on lat.
Extend slowly with control.
zh-Hans: 单手把, 坐于下拉机.
拉至肩, 重点感受背阔肌.
控制缓慢伸展.

en: Underhand grip on bar, shoulder-width.
Pull bar to upper chest, elbows tight.
Extend slowly under control.
zh-Hans: 反握杠, 与肩同宽.
拉至上胸, 肘部贴身.
控制缓慢伸展.

en: Attach V-bar, neutral grip.
Pull handle to upper chest.
Extend slowly with control.
zh-Hans: 用V把, 中立握.
拉至上胸.
控制缓慢伸展.

en: Grip wider than shoulders, overhand.
Pull bar to upper chest, lats engaged.
Extend slowly to full stretch.
zh-Hans: 宽于肩握杠, 正握.
拉至上胸, 背阔肌发力.
缓慢伸展, 充分拉伸.

en: Kneel, sit on heels, fold forward.
Arms extended overhead, palms down.
Walk hands to one side to deepen lat.
zh-Hans: 跪坐脚跟上, 上身前折.
双臂向前伸, 手掌朝下.
双手移向一侧加深背阔肌拉伸.

en: Kneel facing bench, forearms on bench.
Sit hips back, drop chest down.
Hold 30-60s, breathe deeply.
zh-Hans: 面对长凳跪姿, 前臂放凳上.
髋部后坐, 胸部下沉.
保持 30-60 秒, 深呼吸.

en: Stand on one leg, push off sideways.
Land on opposite leg, stick the landing.
Bound side to side, controlled.
zh-Hans: 单腿站立, 侧向蹬出.
对侧腿落地, 稳住.
左右跳, 注意控制.

en: Knee should track over toes on landing.
zh-Hans: 落地时膝盖跟脚尖方向一致.

en: Stand tall, slight squat.
Jump sideways with both feet.
Land soft, immediately jump back.
Continuous side-to-side hops.
zh-Hans: 站直, 轻微下蹲.
双脚侧跳.
轻柔落地, 立即跳回.
持续侧向弹跳.

en: Dumbbells at sides, stand tall.
Step one leg behind, across body.
Lower hips, glute stretches.
Drive back to stand, alternate.
zh-Hans: 双手持哑铃, 站直.
一腿向斜后方迈步交叉.
下蹲, 臀部拉伸.
蹬回, 交替.

en: Dumbbells at thighs, palms forward.
Sweep arms out and up in big arc.
Meet overhead, reverse path back.
Continuous tension throughout.
zh-Hans: 哑铃在大腿前, 掌心朝前.
双臂大弧形向上.
顶部相遇, 原路返回.
全程持续张力.

en: Stand on band center, handles at sides.
Raise arms to shoulder height.
Tension increases at top — squeeze.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 站在带中, 把手在体侧.
侧平举至肩高.
顶部张力更大 — 收紧.
控制下放.

en: Cable at lowest setting, handle in far hand.
Stand side-on, cable across body.
Raise arm out to shoulder height.
Lower with control — feel the side delt.
zh-Hans: 绳索调最低, 远侧手握把.
侧站, 绳索过身体.
侧平举至肩高.
控制下放 — 感受中三角.

en: Cable low, stand side-on with cable behind hand.
Raise arm out to side — cable behind back.
Increases tension in stretched position.
Lower slowly.
zh-Hans: 绳索低位, 侧站绳在手后.
侧平举 — 绳索从背后过.
拉伸位张力更大.
缓慢下放.

en: Cable at low pulley, far hand grabs handle.
Stand side-on, sweep arm up and out.
Stop at shoulder height.
Lower slowly.
zh-Hans: 绳索低位, 远侧手握把.
侧站, 上举划弧.
停在肩高.
缓慢下放.

en: Stand center of cable station, handles crossed.
Left hand grabs right cable, vice versa.
Raise both arms out to shoulder height.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 站在绳索机中间, 手交叉握把.
左手握右绳, 反之亦然.
双臂侧平举至肩高.
控制下放.

en: Stand tall, dumbbells at sides.
Raise arms out to shoulder height.
Slight bend in elbows, pinky slightly up.
Lower slowly under control.
zh-Hans: 站姿挺直, 哑铃在体侧.
侧平举至肩高.
肘部微弯, 小指略上.
缓慢下放.

en: 7 reps bottom half (sides to mid).
7 reps top half (mid to shoulder).
7 reps full range.
Use light weight — high TUT.
zh-Hans: 7次下半段 (体侧到中).
7次上半段 (中到肩高).
7次全程.
用轻重量 — 高紧张时间.

en: 3 sets of dumbbells, heaviest first.
Reps to failure with heaviest.
Drop to next, no rest, reps to failure.
Drop to lightest, final reps to failure.
zh-Hans: 3组哑铃, 最重的先做.
最重做到力竭.
换次重不休息, 做到力竭.
换最轻, 做到力竭.

en: Raise dumbbells higher than shoulder — to ear level.
Elbows lead the movement.
Lower under control.
Activates upper traps too.
zh-Hans: 举高于肩 — 至耳高.
肘部引领动作.
控制下放.
同时激活上斜方.

en: Raise dumbbells to shoulder height.
Hold at top for 20-60 seconds.
Maintain elbow alignment with shoulders.
zh-Hans: 侧平举至肩高.
顶部保持 20-60 秒.
肘部与肩对齐.

en: Lie on side on bench, top arm holds dumbbell.
Raise arm vertically — strict isolation.
Lower slowly — emphasize stretch position.
zh-Hans: 侧卧凳上, 上臂握哑铃.
垂直上举 — 严格隔离.
缓慢下放 — 重视拉伸位.

en: Raise dumbbells to shoulder height.
Hold at top for 2-3 seconds.
Lower slowly under control.
zh-Hans: 侧平举至肩高.
顶部停顿 2-3 秒.
控制缓慢下放.

en: Sit on bench, dumbbells at sides.
Raise to shoulder height — no momentum.
Pause, lower slowly.
zh-Hans: 坐姿, 哑铃在体侧.
上举至肩高 — 不借力.
停顿, 缓慢下放.

en: Stand tall, dumbbell at one side.
Raise one arm to shoulder height.
Lower slowly, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 站姿挺直, 哑铃在一侧.
侧平举至肩高.
缓慢下放, 换边.

en: Kettlebells at sides, neutral grip.
Raise to shoulder height — bells hang naturally.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 壶铃在体侧, 对握.
上举至肩高 — 壶铃自然下垂.
控制下放.

en: Stand, lean torso slightly forward.
Raise dumbbells to shoulder height.
Hits side delt at different angle.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 站立, 躯干略前倾.
侧平举至肩高.
中三角不同角度.
控制下放.

en: Hold pole/rack with one hand, lean away.
Other hand holds dumbbell down at side.
Raise arm out to shoulder height.
Leaning increases stretch on side delt.
zh-Hans: 一手扶柱/架, 身体远离.
另一手哑铃下垂.
侧平举至肩高.
倾身增加中三角拉伸.

en: Cable at low pulley, hold post with near hand.
Lean body away from pulley.
Far hand raises cable to shoulder height.
Lower slowly.
zh-Hans: 绳索低位, 近侧手扶柱.
身体远离滑轮.
远侧手提绳至肩高.
缓慢下放.

en: Sit on incline bench, dumbbells hanging at sides.
Raise arms out to shoulder height.
Greater stretch than standing version.
Lower slowly.
zh-Hans: 坐上斜凳, 哑铃在体侧下垂.
侧平举至肩高.
比站姿拉伸更大.
缓慢下放.

en: Adjust seat so arm pads align with elbows.
Raise arms out — pads lift to shoulder height.
Squeeze, lower slowly.
zh-Hans: 调座位让臂垫对齐肘.
上举 — 垫升至肩高.
收紧, 缓慢下放.

en: Sit in machine, work one arm at a time.
Raise arm pad to shoulder height.
Squeeze, lower slowly, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 坐器械, 每次单臂.
臂垫上举至肩高.
收紧, 缓慢下放, 换边.

en: Raise dumbbells to shoulder height.
Lower halfway, raise back up.
Lower fully — that's 1 rep.
Use lighter weight than full reps.
zh-Hans: 侧平举至肩高.
下放一半, 再举起.
完全下放 — 算1次.
用比正常更轻重量.

en: Hold plate by rim with one hand at side.
Raise to shoulder height like dumbbell.
Lower slowly, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 一手扣杠铃片边在体侧.
像哑铃一样侧平举.
缓慢下放, 换边.

en: Stand tall, dumbbells in front, palms in.
Raise arms up at 45° angle to form Y.
Arms above shoulders, thumbs up.
Lower slowly.
zh-Hans: 站姿挺直, 哑铃在身前, 掌心朝内.
双臂以45°向上举成Y形.
手臂高于肩, 拇指朝上.
缓慢下放.

en: Lie face down, pad above ankles.
Curl heels toward glutes.
Squeeze hamstrings at top.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 俯卧, 护垫在脚踝上方.
弯举脚跟向臀.
顶部收紧腘绳.
控制下放.

en: Sit in machine, pad on calves.
Curl heels under seat.
Squeeze hamstrings at bottom.
Control return — full stretch.
zh-Hans: 坐器械, 护垫在小腿.
弯举脚跟到座椅下.
底部收紧腘绳.
控制返回 — 完全拉伸.

en: Lie face down, one leg under pad.
Curl heel to glute.
Squeeze, lower with control.
Switch legs after set.
zh-Hans: 俯卧, 一腿在护垫下.
弯举脚跟向臀.
收紧, 控制下放.
完成后换腿.

en: Stand in machine, pad above ankle.
Curl one heel toward glute.
Squeeze hamstring at top.
Lower controlled, switch legs.
zh-Hans: 站器械, 护垫在脚踝上方.
弯举一脚跟向臀.
顶部收紧腘绳.
控制下放, 换腿.

en: Band anchored behind, around ankle.
Sit on bench, knee bent.
Extend leg against band.
Squeeze quad, lower slow.
zh-Hans: 弹力带后方固定, 绕脚踝.
坐凳上, 屈膝.
对抗弹力带伸腿.
收紧股四头, 缓慢下放.

en: Sit in machine, pad on shin.
Extend legs to full lockout.
Squeeze quads at top.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 坐器械, 护垫在小腿.
伸腿至完全锁定.
顶部收紧股四头.
控制下放.

en: Don't jerk weight up — controlled tempo.
zh-Hans: 不要猛甩 — 控制节奏.

en: Sit in machine, work one leg at a time.
Extend to full lockout, squeeze.
Slow eccentric, control descent.
Switch legs after set.
zh-Hans: 坐器械, 单腿训练.
伸到完全锁定, 收紧.
慢速离心, 控制下放.
完成后换腿.

en: Feet shoulder-width on platform.
Lower until knees at 90°.
Don't let lower back round off pad.
Press up — don't lock out hard.
zh-Hans: 双脚与肩同宽踩平台.
下放至膝盖 90°.
下背不要离开靠垫.
推起 — 不要硬锁.

en: Don't go too deep — lower back rounds.
Don't lock knees with heavy weight.
zh-Hans: 不要下放过深 — 下背圆.
重量大时膝盖不要硬锁.

en: Place feet high on platform.
Lower carriage deeply.
Focus on glute and hamstring stretch.
Press up driving through heels.
zh-Hans: 双脚高位踩平台.
深度下放车架.
感受臀和腘绳拉伸.
脚跟发力推起.

en: Sit, feet on platform shoulder-width.
Lower carriage toward chest.
Press out smoothly to near full extension.
Control return — don't bounce.
zh-Hans: 坐姿, 双脚与肩同宽踩平台.
拉车架向胸部.
推到接近完全伸直.
控制返回 — 不要反弹.

en: Feet close together, low on platform.
Lower carriage to 90° knees.
Press up emphasizing outer quads.
Don't let knees cave in.
zh-Hans: 双脚并拢, 低位踩平台.
下放至膝盖 90°.
推起, 重点股外侧.
膝盖不要内扣.

en: Set up on leg press, knees bent.
Half-press, pulse up and down.
Short range — quads burn.
High reps to failure.
zh-Hans: 腿推机, 屈膝.
半推, 上下脉冲.
小范围 — 股四头灼烧.
高次数至力竭.

en: One foot center of platform.
Lower carriage, knee toward chest.
Press up — don't lock out.
Complete reps, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 单脚踩平台中央.
下放, 膝盖向胸.
推起 — 不要锁.
完成后换边.

en: Lie on back, feet straight up on platform.
Lower until knees near chest.
Press up to near full extension.
Control return.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 双脚向上踩平台.
下放至膝盖接近胸.
推起至接近完全伸直.
控制返回.

en: Don't lift hips off pad — protects lower back.
zh-Hans: 髋部不要离开靠垫 — 保护下背.

en: Feet wide, toes 45° out on platform.
Lower carriage to 90° knees.
Press up emphasizing inner thighs.
Drive through heels.
zh-Hans: 双脚宽距, 脚尖外展 45°.
下放至膝盖 90°.
推起, 重点大腿内侧.
脚跟发力.

en: Forearms on pads, back against pad.
Raise straight legs to 90°.
Lower under control — no swinging.
zh-Hans: 前臂支撑, 背贴靠垫.
直腿抬至 90°.
缓慢下放 — 不要借力.

en: Forearms on pads, back against pad.
Bring knees to chest.
Lower with control, repeat.
zh-Hans: 前臂支撑, 背贴靠垫.
屈膝向胸前提拉.
缓慢下放, 重复.

en: Hang from bar, arms straight.
Raise straight legs to 90° — no swinging.
Lower under control, repeat.
zh-Hans: 悬挂单杠, 手臂伸直.
直腿抬到 90° — 不要借力摆动.
缓慢下放, 重复.

en: Hang from bar, arms straight.
Bring knees to chest — control swing.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 悬挂单杠, 手臂伸直.
屈膝上提至胸前 — 控制摆动.
缓慢下放.

en: Hang from bar, knees together.
Raise knees to one side at angle.
Lower, alternate sides — no swinging.
zh-Hans: 悬挂单杠, 双膝并拢.
膝向一侧斜向上提.
下放, 交替 — 不借力.

en: Lie on back, hands under hips.
Raise straight legs to 90° — slow.
Lower until just above floor.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 双手垫臀下.
直腿抬到 90° — 缓慢.
下放至接近地面.

en: Lie on back, hands under hips.
Bring knees toward chest.
Lower with control, repeat.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 双手垫臀下.
屈膝向胸前提拉.
缓慢下放, 重复.

en: Hold a wall or pole for balance.
Swing one leg front to back, controlled.
10-15 swings, switch legs.
zh-Hans: 扶墙或杆保持平衡.
一腿前后摆动, 控制好.

en: Face wall, both hands on it for balance.
Swing leg across body, then out wide.
10-15 reps each leg.
zh-Hans: 面对墙, 双手扶墙保持平衡.
腿横扫越过身体, 再向外摆.

en: Low lunge, both hands inside front foot.
Drop forearms to floor if mobile enough.
Hold 30-60 s, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 低弓步, 双手放前脚内侧.
灵活的话, 前臂着地.
保持 30-60 秒, 换边.

en: Bench at 15-20° low incline.
Press dumbbells up — between flat and incline path.
Targets upper-mid chest fibers.
zh-Hans: 卧推凳调至 15-20° 低斜.
推起哑铃 — 介于平推和上斜之间.
针对上中胸纤维.

en: Lunge position, back knee on floor.
Raise arms overhead, lean back slightly.
Hold 20-30s, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 弓步, 后膝着地.
双手过头, 微微后仰.
保持 20-30 秒, 换边.

en: Stand tall, hands on hips.
Forward lunge, return.
Side lunge, return.
Reverse lunge, return. Repeat.
zh-Hans: 站直, 双手插腰.
前弓步, 返回.
侧弓步, 返回.
后弓步, 返回. 重复.

en: Stand tall, hands on hips.
Lunge forward (12 o'clock).
Return, lunge to side (3), then back (6).
Complete clock face, switch legs.
zh-Hans: 站直, 双手插腰.
向前弓步 (12 点).
返回, 侧向 (3 点), 后撤 (6 点).
完成时钟, 换腿.

en: Stand tall, hands at chest.
Step one leg behind and across.
Lower into curtsy position.
Drive back, alternate sides.
zh-Hans: 站直, 双手胸前.
一腿向斜后方迈步.
下降至屈膝礼位.
蹬回, 交替.

en: Dumbbells at sides, stand tall.
Step one leg behind diagonally.
Lower into curtsy position.
Drive back to start, alternate.
zh-Hans: 双手持哑铃, 站直.
一腿向斜后方迈步.
下降至屈膝礼位.
蹬回, 交替腿.

en: Keep front knee tracking forward — don't twist.
zh-Hans: 前膝向前 — 不要扭.

en: Stand on raised platform, dumbbells at sides.
Step back into reverse lunge below platform.
Lower deeper than floor level.
Drive up, alternate legs.
zh-Hans: 站抬高平台, 双手持哑铃.
后撤至平台下方弓步.
下放至低于地面.
起身, 交替腿.

en: Dumbbells at sides, stand tall.
Step one leg forward into lunge.
Return, then step other leg forward.
Continue alternating.
zh-Hans: 双手持哑铃, 站直.
一腿前迈弓步.
返回, 另一腿前迈.
持续交替.

en: Bar on back, stand tall.
Step one leg forward into lunge.
Lower back knee toward floor.
Push back to start, alternate.
zh-Hans: 杠铃放背上, 站直.
一腿向前迈步弓步.
后膝下降近地.
蹬回原位, 交替.

en: Stand tall, hands on hips.
Step forward into lunge.
Back knee near floor.
Push back to start, alternate.
zh-Hans: 站直, 双手插腰.
向前迈步弓步.
后膝近地.
蹬回, 交替腿.

en: Dumbbells at sides, stand tall.
Step one leg forward into lunge.
Lower back knee near floor.
Push back to start, alternate legs.
zh-Hans: 双手持哑铃, 站直.
一腿向前迈步弓步.
后膝下降近地.
蹬回原位, 交替腿.

en: Start in lunge position.
Explode up, switch legs mid-air.
Land in lunge with other leg forward.
Continue alternating.
zh-Hans: 起始弓步位置.
爆发跳起, 空中换腿.
另一腿在前落地弓步.
持续交替.

en: High knee impact — skip if knee issues.
zh-Hans: 对膝盖冲击大 — 膝盖有伤勿做.

en: Start in lunge, one leg forward.
Jump up, switch legs mid-air.
Land in opposite lunge.
Continuous alternating.
zh-Hans: 起始弓步, 一腿在前.
跳起, 空中换腿.
落地至对侧弓步.
持续交替.

en: Knee impact — skip if knee issues.
zh-Hans: 膝盖冲击 — 膝盖有伤勿做.

en: Dumbbells at sides, start in lunge.
Explode up, switch legs in air.
Land in opposite lunge.
Continuous alternating.
zh-Hans: 双手持哑铃, 起始弓步.
爆发上跳, 空中换腿.
落地至对侧弓步.
持续交替.

en: Light weight only — high impact.
zh-Hans: 只用轻重量 — 冲击大.

en: Bar on back, wide stance.
Sit back into one hip.
Other leg stays straight.
Push back to start, alternate.
zh-Hans: 杠铃放背上, 大开站位.
髋部后坐一侧.
另一腿伸直.
蹬回, 交替.

en: Bar on back in Smith machine.
Step out wide to one side.
Sit hips back into that leg.
Push back to center, alternate.
zh-Hans: 杠铃在史密斯机背上.
向一侧大步外迈.
髋部后坐于该腿.
蹬回中心, 交替.

en: Bar overhead with snatch grip.
Step into forward lunge.
Keep bar locked, core tight.
Return, alternate legs.
zh-Hans: 抓举握距, 杠铃过头.
向前迈步弓步.
杠铃锁定, 核心收紧.
返回, 交替腿.

en: Light weight to start.
Skip if shoulder issues.
zh-Hans: 从轻重量开始.
肩部有伤勿做.

en: Dumbbells locked overhead.
Step into a forward lunge.
Maintain overhead lockout.
Return to start, alternate legs.
zh-Hans: 哑铃锁定过头.
向前迈步弓步.
保持过头锁定.
返回原位, 交替腿.

en: Shoulder mobility essential.
Core stability is critical.
zh-Hans: 肩部灵活性必备.
核心稳定性关键.

en: Stay in lunge position, hands on hips.
Pulse up and down 2-3 inches.
Stay low, don't fully stand.
Switch legs after pulse set.
zh-Hans: 保持弓步位置, 双手插腰.
上下脉冲 5-8 cm.
保持低位, 不要起身.
脉冲完一边换腿.

en: Bar on back, stand tall.
Step one leg back into lunge.
Drive front heel to return.
Alternate legs each rep.
zh-Hans: 杠铃放背上, 站直.
一腿向后迈步弓步.
前脚脚跟发力返回.
每次交替腿.

en: Stand tall, step one leg back.
Lower into lunge, back knee near floor.
Drive front heel to return.
Alternate legs.
zh-Hans: 站直, 一腿后迈.
下降弓步, 后膝近地.
前脚脚跟发力返回.
交替腿.

en: Dumbbells at sides, stand tall.
Step one leg back into lunge.
Drive front heel to return.
Alternate legs each rep.
zh-Hans: 双手持哑铃, 站直.
一腿向后迈步弓步.
前脚脚跟发力返回.
每次交替腿.

en: Kettlebell in goblet hold.
Step one leg back into lunge.
Drive front heel to return.
Alternate legs each rep.
zh-Hans: 壶铃高脚杯握姿.
一腿后撤弓步.
前脚脚跟发力返回.
每次交替腿.

en: Bar on back in Smith machine.
Step one leg back into lunge.
Lower back knee toward floor.
Drive up, alternate.
zh-Hans: 杠铃在史密斯机背上.
一腿后撤弓步.
后膝下放近地.
起身, 交替.

en: Stand wide, hands at chest.
Sit back into one hip, bend that knee.
Other leg stays straight.
Push back to start, alternate.
zh-Hans: 大开站位, 双手胸前.
髋部后坐一侧, 屈膝.
另一腿伸直.
蹬回, 交替.

en: Dumbbells at sides, wide stance.
Sit hips back, bend one knee.
Other leg stays straight, foot flat.
Push back to start, alternate sides.
zh-Hans: 双手持哑铃, 大开站位.
髋部后坐, 一腿屈膝.
另一腿伸直, 脚平踩.
蹬回, 交替两侧.

en: Working knee tracks over toe — don't twist.
zh-Hans: 工作膝盖跟脚尖方向一致 — 不要扭.

en: Step into lunge stance, hands on hips.
Lower in place, back knee toward floor.
Stand back up, stay in stance.
Complete reps, switch legs.
zh-Hans: 迈入弓步位, 双手插腰.
原地下放, 后膝近地.
起身, 保持弓步位.
完成一边后换腿.

en: Bar on back, stand tall.
Step forward, lower into lunge.
Drive up, step forward with other leg.
Continue alternating across the floor.
zh-Hans: 杠铃放背上, 站直.
向前迈步, 下降弓步.
起身, 另一腿向前迈.
持续交替前进.

en: Balance is harder — keep core tight.
zh-Hans: 平衡更难 — 核心保持收紧.

name.zh-Hans: 行走弓步 (杠铃, 过头)

en: Snatch grip, bar locked overhead.
Walk forward into lunges.
Bar stays overhead throughout.
Demands core and shoulder mobility.
zh-Hans: 抓举握距, 杠铃锁过头.
向前行走弓步.
杠铃全程过头.
对核心和肩部灵活性要求高.

en: Use very light weight.
Skip if shoulder mobility limited.
zh-Hans: 用很轻重量.
肩部灵活性受限勿做.

en: Stand tall, step forward into lunge.
Back knee near floor, front thigh parallel.
Drive up, step forward with other leg.
Continue alternating forward.
zh-Hans: 站直, 向前迈步弓步.
后膝近地, 前腿水平.
起身, 另一腿向前迈.
持续交替前进.

en: Dumbbells at sides, stand tall.
Step forward into a lunge, knee near floor.
Drive up and step forward with other leg.
Alternate legs walking forward.
zh-Hans: 双手持哑铃, 站直.
向前迈步弓步, 后膝近地.
起身, 另一腿向前迈.
交替腿向前行走.

en: Front knee should not pass far over toe.
zh-Hans: 前膝不要远超脚尖.

en: Kettlebells at sides, stand tall.
Step forward into lunge.
Drive up, step forward with other leg.
Continue across the floor.
zh-Hans: 双手持壶铃, 站直.
向前迈步弓步.
起身, 另一腿向前迈.
持续前进.

name.zh-Hans: 行走弓步 (壶铃, 过头)

en: Press kettlebell overhead, single arm.
Walk forward into lunges.
Keep kettlebell locked.
Switch arms each set.
zh-Hans: 壶铃推过头, 单臂.
向前行走弓步.
壶铃保持锁定.
每组换臂.

en: Press dumbbells overhead, lock arms.
Walk forward into lunges.
Maintain overhead lockout.
Core tight throughout.
zh-Hans: 哑铃推过头, 锁臂.
向前迈步弓步.
保持过头锁定.
全程核心收紧.

en: Demanding on shoulders and core.
zh-Hans: 对肩部和核心要求高.

en: Safety bar on back, hold handles.
Walk forward into lunges.
Bar pushes torso forward — fight it.
Alternate legs continuously.
zh-Hans: 安全杠放背上, 握手柄.
向前行走弓步.
杠铃推躯干前倾 — 对抗.
持续交替腿.

en: Bar on back in Smith machine.
Step forward into lunge.
Both legs alternate under bar.
Fixed path eases balance.
zh-Hans: 杠铃在史密斯机背上.
向前迈步弓步.
两腿在杠下交替.
固定轨迹简化平衡.

en: Side-lying, dumbbell on top leg.
Lift top leg up to 45°.
Squeeze hip muscles.
Lower slowly, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 侧卧, 哑铃放上腿.
上腿抬至 45°.
收紧髋部肌肉.
缓慢下放, 换边.

en: Lie on bench, EZ-bar held over chest at angle toward head.
Lower bar past head — arms angled back.
Extend up at the same angle — strong long-head stretch.
zh-Hans: 平躺凳上, EZ 杠斜向头侧举起.
下放越过头部 — 双臂后倾.
同角度推起 — 长头强烈拉伸.

en: Use spotter — bar path near head.
zh-Hans: 使用保护 — 杠路接近头部.

en: Lie down, band anchored behind head.
Pull band over chest in arc motion.
Slowly return overhead.
zh-Hans: 平躺, 弹力带固定头后.
弧线拉带过胸.
缓慢回头顶.

en: Sit with back flat against pad, handles wide.
Bring handles together in front of chest.
Squeeze and return slow.
zh-Hans: 坐好背贴靠垫, 手柄两侧.
胸前合拢双手柄.
收紧并缓慢回程.

en: Sit at pec deck, one arm only.
Squeeze chest to bring handle to midline.
Open with control, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 坐于蝴蝶机, 单臂操作.
胸部发力将手柄合至中线.
控制打开, 换边.

en: Sit at machine, grip handles.
Pull handles down to shoulders.
Extend with control.
zh-Hans: 坐于器械, 握手柄.
拉手柄至肩.
控制伸展.

en: Sit on machine, grip handles overhead.
Pull arms down in arc to thighs.
Slowly return overhead with control.
zh-Hans: 坐于器械, 头上握手柄.
手臂弧线下拉至大腿.
控制缓慢回头顶.

en: Sit at machine, chest against pad, grip handles.
Pull handles back, retract scapula.
Extend slowly with control.
zh-Hans: 坐于器械, 胸贴垫, 握手柄.
拉手柄后, 后缩肩胛.
控制缓慢伸展.

en: Sit at row machine, grip one handle.
Pull handle back with strong squeeze.
Extend slowly under control.
zh-Hans: 坐于划船机, 握单手柄.
向后拉手柄, 强收紧.
控制缓慢伸展.

en: Stand perpendicular to landmine bar end.
Grip end with single hand, hinge forward.
Row bar to hip, full stretch at bottom.
zh-Hans: 垂直站于地雷杆端旁.
单手握杠端, 前屈.
拉杠至髋部, 底部充分拉伸.

en: Hold ball at chest, face wall or partner.
Explosive press — both hands push hard.
Catch on rebound, immediate return.
zh-Hans: 药球抱胸, 面对墙或同伴.
爆发推出 — 双手强力推.
接住反弹, 立即返回.

en: Squat low, ball between legs.
Drive up, swing arms, release overhead.
Aim for max distance or height.
zh-Hans: 下蹲, 药球于两腿之间.
起身, 摆臂, 过头抛出.
追求最大距离或高度.

en: Raise ball straight overhead.
Slam down forcefully — hinge through hips.
Pick up, repeat — controlled tempo.
zh-Hans: 药球高举过头.
强力砸下 — 髋部铰链.
捡起重复 — 控制节奏.

en: Stand sideways to wall, ball at hip.
Rotate from hips, throw ball at wall.
Catch on rebound, immediate next rep.
zh-Hans: 侧身对墙, 药球放髋部.
髋部带动旋转, 砸向墙面.
接住反弹, 立即下一次.

en: Hold ball overhead, full extension.
Slam ball straight down with hips and lats.
Catch on bounce, repeat fast.
zh-Hans: 药球举过头, 充分伸展.
髋部和背阔肌发力砸下.
接住反弹, 快速重复.

en: Use slam ball (no bounce), not basketball.
zh-Hans: 用无弹力药球, 不要用篮球.

en: Stand holding medicine ball overhead with both hands.
Lower ball behind head — elbows in.
Extend ball overhead, squeeze triceps.
zh-Hans: 站立, 双手共握药球过顶.
下放脑后 — 肘部内收.
过顶伸展, 收紧三头.

en: Stand with heels together, strict military stance.
Bar at front of shoulders, narrow grip.
Press strictly overhead — no leg drive.
Control bar back to shoulders.
zh-Hans: 脚跟并拢, 军姿站立.
杠铃在肩前, 较窄握距.
严格推举过头 — 不借腿力.
控制下放至肩部.

en: Strict form means no leg drive — use lighter weight.
Brace core, no back arch.
zh-Hans: 严格动作不借腿力 — 用较轻重量.
核心绷紧, 不要反弓.

en: Mini-band above knees.
Half-squat, walk forward.
Keep band tension throughout.
Step wide, work the hips.
zh-Hans: 迷你弹力带在膝上.
半蹲位, 向前迈步.
全程保持弹力带张力.
宽步, 刺激髋部.

en: High plank position, body straight.
Drive knees toward chest alternately.
Fast pace — hips low, core tight.
zh-Hans: 高位平板, 身体直线.
交替屈膝向胸推进.
快速节奏 — 髋低, 核心紧.

en: High plank, drive knee to opposite elbow.
Alternate sides — controlled rotation.
Keep hips low, brace core.
zh-Hans: 高位平板, 膝向对侧肘.
交替进行 — 旋转可控.
髋部低, 核心紧.

en: Plank position, drive knees to chest.
Alternate fast — keep hips low.
30-60 s bursts, repeat for time.
zh-Hans: 平板支撑, 膝盖快速抬向胸口.
交替快速 — 髋部不要抬高.
30-60 秒爆发, 重复多组.

en: Explosive pull-up, transition to dip at bar.
Lock out arms above the bar.
Lower under control to hang.
zh-Hans: 爆发引体, 过渡到杠上臂屈伸.
杠上锁定双臂.
控制下放至悬垂.

en: Requires solid pull-up + dip strength first.
False grip prevents wrist strain at transition.
zh-Hans: 需要扎实的引体+臂屈伸基础.
假握避免过渡时拉伤手腕.

en: False grip on rings, hollow body start.
Pull to rings at sternum.
Roll wrists, press to support.
zh-Hans: 吊环假握, 空心起始.
拉至胸骨高度.
翻腕, 推起至支撑.

en: Even harder than bar — train false grip first.
Use foot assistance to learn.
zh-Hans: 比单杠更难 — 先练假握.
学习时用脚辅助.

en: Sit tall, shoulders down.
Trace largest circle with chin.
Slow — no fast head movement.
zh-Hans: 坐姿挺直, 肩部下压.
下巴画最大圆.
缓慢 — 不要快速转头.

en: Stop if dizzy or pain — neck is sensitive.
zh-Hans: 头晕或疼痛要停 — 颈部敏感.

en: Sit tall, shoulders down.
Slowly drop chin toward chest.
Hand on head for slight assist, hold 20-30 s.
zh-Hans: 坐姿挺直, 肩部下压.
下巴缓慢下垂至胸口.
手轻压头部辅助, 保持 20-30 秒.

en: Sit or stand, shoulders relaxed.
Turn head slowly side to side.
Hold each side 15-20s.
zh-Hans: 坐或站, 肩部放松.
头缓慢左右转动.
每边保持 15-20 秒.

en: Sit or stand, tall posture.
Tilt head to one side, ear to shoulder.
Hand gently assists, hold 15-20s.
zh-Hans: 坐或站, 挺直身体.
头向一侧倾, 耳贴肩.
同侧手轻辅助, 保持 15-20 秒.

en: Kneel, ankles anchored by partner or bar.
Slowly lower torso forward, body rigid.
Fight gravity with hamstrings.
Catch with hands, push back up.
zh-Hans: 跪姿, 脚踝由伙伴或杠固定.
缓慢前倾躯干, 身体保持直线.
腘绳对抗重力.
手撑接住, 推回起身.

en: Extremely demanding — work eccentric first.
Don't rush — soreness from this is intense.
zh-Hans: 极具挑战 — 先练离心.
不要急于求成 — 酸痛会非常剧烈.

en: Kneel, ankles anchored, band overhead.
Lower torso, band assists return.
Use band to control eccentric.
Pull back up with band help.
zh-Hans: 跪姿, 脚踝固定, 弹力带从头顶辅助.
下放躯干, 弹力带辅助.
弹力带控制离心.
弹力带辅助拉回.

en: Anchor band low, grip handle overhead behind head.
Extend handle overhead — elbow stays in place.
Slow return to stretch.
zh-Hans: 弹力带固定低位, 脑后握手柄.
过顶伸展 — 肘部固定.
缓慢回程至拉伸.

en: Stand or seated, barbell overhead, shoulder-width.
Lower bar behind head — elbows forward.
Press back overhead, full extension.
zh-Hans: 站或坐, 杠铃过顶, 与肩同宽.
下放脑后 — 肘部向前.
推回过顶, 完全伸直.

en: Use lighter weight — avoid shoulder impingement.
zh-Hans: 使用轻重量 — 避免肩部撞击.

en: Face away from low cable, rope behind head.
Lean slightly forward, elbows up beside ears.
Extend rope forward and up — separate at top.
zh-Hans: 背对低位绳索, 绳索置脑后.
略前倾, 肘部上举贴耳.
向前向上伸展 — 顶部分开.

name.zh-Hans: 过顶伸展 (绳索, 单臂)

en: Face away from low cable, single handle in one hand.
Elbow up beside ear, extend handle overhead.
Squeeze long head, slow return.
zh-Hans: 背对低位绳索, 单手柄.
肘部贴耳上举, 过顶伸展.
收紧长头, 缓慢回程.

en: Face away from cable, low pulley, V-bar attachment.
Grip V-bar overhead, elbows beside ears.
Extend bar forward and up — full triceps stretch.
zh-Hans: 背对绳索机, 低位 V-杆.
V-杆过顶, 肘部贴耳.
向前向上伸展 — 三头充分拉伸.

en: Sit on bench with back support, dumbbell overhead.
Lower behind head, hold contraction at stretch.
Extend back up, squeeze triceps.
zh-Hans: 坐有靠背凳上, 哑铃过顶.
下放脑后, 拉伸处停顿.
推回过顶, 收紧三头.

name.zh-Hans: 过顶伸展 (哑铃, 单臂)

en: Stand, dumbbell in one hand overhead.
Lower dumbbell behind head — elbow vertical.
Press back up — free hand can stabilize elbow.
zh-Hans: 站立, 单手哑铃过顶.
下放脑后 — 肘部垂直.
推回过顶 — 另一手稳定肘部.

en: Hold one dumbbell with both hands overhead.
Cup top plate, lower behind head with elbows tight.
Press back overhead — squeeze triceps.
zh-Hans: 双手共握一只哑铃过顶.
捧住上端片, 肘内收下放脑后.
推回过顶 — 收紧三头.

en: Stand or seated, EZ-bar overhead, narrow grip.
Lower bar behind head — elbows fixed, point forward.
Extend back overhead — squeeze triceps.
zh-Hans: 站或坐, EZ 杠过顶, 窄握.
下放脑后 — 肘部固定向前.
推回过顶 — 收紧三头.

en: Keep elbows tight — flaring strains shoulders.
zh-Hans: 肘部内收 — 外翻伤肩.

en: Hold kettlebell with both hands, bell behind head.
Lower kettlebell behind head — elbows in.
Extend overhead, squeeze triceps.
zh-Hans: 双手共握壶铃, 球部置脑后.
下放脑后 — 肘部内收.
过顶推起, 收紧三头.

en: Thick axle bar at shoulders.
Press strictly overhead — grip is hard.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 粗杆放肩部.
严格推举过头 — 握力很难.
缓慢下放.

en: Use straps or hook grip if grip slips.
zh-Hans: 握不住可用助力带或勾握.

en: Stand on band, handles at shoulders.
Press up overhead, lock out.
Control band on the way down.
zh-Hans: 站在弹力带上, 把手在肩.
向上推举过头, 锁定.
控制下放.

en: Bar at shoulder level, grip just outside shoulders.
Brace core, press bar straight up overhead.
Lock out arms, head through window at top.
Lower under control to clavicles.
zh-Hans: 杠铃在肩高, 握距略宽于肩.
核心收紧, 垂直推举过头.
顶部锁定手臂, 头部穿过.
缓慢下放至锁骨.

en: Don't hyperextend lower back at lockout.
Squeeze glutes to protect spine.
zh-Hans: 顶部锁定时不要过度反弓下背.
收紧臀部保护脊柱.

en: Upright bench inside rack, bar at shoulder height.
Grip just outside shoulders.
Press up to lockout — no lower back arch.
Lower to clavicles.
zh-Hans: 直立卧推凳放架内, 杠铃在肩高.
握距略宽于肩.
推至锁定 — 下背不反弓.
下放至锁骨.

en: Brace core hard — don't let lower back overarch.
zh-Hans: 核心绷紧 — 下背不要过度反弓.

en: Set pulleys low, grab handles at shoulders.
Stand facing away, slight forward lean.
Press both handles up overhead.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 定滑轮低位, 双手握把在肩高.
背对器械, 身体略前倾.
双手向上推举过头.
控制下放.

en: Dumbbells at both shoulders.
Press one up while other stays at shoulder.
Alternate arms each rep.
zh-Hans: 哑铃在双肩.
推举一臂, 另一臂保持肩高.
每次交替.

en: Sit on upright bench, back supported.
Dumbbells at shoulder height, palms forward.
Press up to lockout, lower under control.
zh-Hans: 坐直立卧推凳, 背部贴靠.
哑铃在肩高, 掌心朝前.
推至锁定, 控制下放.

en: Stand tall, dumbbell at one shoulder.
Press straight up — brace core.
Lower with control, alternate or switch.
zh-Hans: 站姿挺直, 哑铃在一侧肩.
垂直推举 — 核心收紧.
控制下放, 交替或换边.

en: Stand tall, dumbbells at shoulder height.
Press up until arms fully extended.
Lower slowly to shoulder level.
zh-Hans: 站姿挺直, 哑铃在肩高.
向上推至手臂完全伸直.
缓慢下放至肩高.

en: Keep core tight — no lower back arch.
zh-Hans: 核心绷紧 — 不要反弓下背.

en: Kettlebells in rack position at shoulders.
Press up overhead — bells rotate as you press.
Lock out, lower back to rack.
zh-Hans: 壶铃架式在肩位.
向上推举 — 壶铃自然旋转.
锁定, 下放回架式.

en: Maintain wrist alignment — don't let bells flop back.
zh-Hans: 保持手腕中立 — 壶铃不要后翻.

en: Kettlebell racked at one shoulder.
Press straight up overhead, resist side bend.
Lower to rack, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 壶铃架式在一侧肩.
垂直推举过头, 抗侧屈.
下放回架式, 换边.

en: Keep ribs stacked over hips, don't lean.
zh-Hans: 胸腹叠加在髋上, 不要侧倾.

en: Clean log to shoulders, neutral grip.
Dip and drive — push press overhead.
Lock out, lower to shoulders.
zh-Hans: 翻举圆木至肩, 对握.
下蹲发力 — 借力推举过头.
锁定, 下放至肩.

en: Strongman lift — requires coaching for safety.
Don't press from poor rack position.
zh-Hans: 大力士动作 — 需指导.
架式不好不要推.

en: Adjust seat so handles at shoulder height.
Grip handles, press straight up to lockout.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 调整座位让手柄在肩高.
握住手柄, 垂直推举至锁定.
缓慢下放.

en: Pins set at forehead/sticking point.
Press bar from dead stop to lockout.
Lower to pins, full reset each rep.
zh-Hans: 顶杆设在额头/最难点.
从死点推至锁定.
下放至顶杆, 每次重置.

en: Use safety pins — heavy weight at lockout fails fast.
zh-Hans: 使用安全杆 — 重量大锁定快崩.

en: Bar at shoulder height in Smith, grip outside shoulders.
Unrack, press straight up to lockout.
Lower under control to shoulder level.
zh-Hans: 史密斯杆在肩高, 握距略宽于肩.
解锁, 垂直推至锁定.
控制下放至肩高.

en: Adjust bench position so bar path is in front, not behind head.
zh-Hans: 调整凳位让杆路径在头前, 不在脑后.

en: Upright bench inside Smith rack, bar at chin height.
Grip just outside shoulders.
Press straight up, lower to chin level.
zh-Hans: 直立凳放史密斯架内, 杆在下巴高.
握距略宽于肩.
垂直推举, 下放至下巴.

en: Anchor band at chest height, stand sideways.
Press band out straight — resist pull.
Hold, return, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 弹力带固定齐胸高, 侧站.
弹力带直推 — 抗旋转.
保持, 收回, 换边.

en: Stand sideways to cable at chest height.
Press handle straight out — resist rotation.
Hold, return, switch sides after set.
zh-Hans: 侧对绳索, 把手齐胸高.
把手直推 — 抗旋转.
保持, 收回, 完成后换边.

en: Adjust seat — elbows or wrists align with shoulders.
Bring pads together by squeezing chest.
Open with control, feel the stretch.
zh-Hans: 调整座椅 — 肘或腕与肩齐平.
胸部发力合拢挡板.
控制打开, 感受拉伸.

en: Sit facing pec deck pads, grip handles.
Press handles inward across chest.
Hold contraction at midline.
zh-Hans: 面对蝴蝶机坐下, 握住手柄.
向胸前内推合拢.
中线保持收紧.

en: Torso parallel to floor, bar starts on ground.
Explosive pull to lower chest each rep.
Reset bar on floor between reps.
zh-Hans: 躯干平行地面, 杠从地面起始.
每次爆发拉至下胸.
每次组间杠重新放地面.

en: Keep torso parallel — don't stand up to lift bar.
zh-Hans: 躯干保持平行 — 不要起身用力.

en: Front leg bent in front, shin angled.
Back leg extended straight behind.
Lean forward, hold 30-60s, switch.
zh-Hans: 前腿弯曲在前, 小腿斜放.
后腿向后伸直.
前倾, 保持 30-60 秒, 换边.

en: Stand on one leg, other leg extended forward.
Squat all the way down on one leg.
Arms forward for counterbalance.
Drive up keeping free leg off ground.
zh-Hans: 单腿站立, 另一腿前伸.
单腿完全下蹲.
双臂前伸保持平衡.
起身, 浮腿不落地.

en: Requires extreme mobility and strength — progress slowly.
Use support like TRX or doorway to build up.
zh-Hans: 需要极强灵活性和力量 — 渐进训练.
可借助 TRX 或门框过渡.

en: Hold TRX or sturdy support.
Single-leg squat with light assistance.
Use upper body just for balance.
Drive up through working leg.
zh-Hans: 扶 TRX 或牢固支撑.
单腿深蹲, 轻度辅助.
上肢仅用于平衡.
工作腿发力起身.

en: Lean far forward, body horizontal off floor.
Body parallel to floor — straight legs.
Hold — extreme shoulder strength.
zh-Hans: 大幅前倾, 身体水平离地.
身体与地面平行 — 双腿伸直.
保持 — 极强肩部力量.

en: Progress through tuck, advanced tuck, straddle, full.
Wrist preparation essential.
zh-Hans: 通过团身、半团身、分腿、全俯撑进阶.
必须先做手腕准备.

en: Hands on floor, lean forward heavily.
Tuck knees tight to chest, lift off floor.
Hold — feet, knees lifted, body floats.
zh-Hans: 双手撑地, 大幅前倾.
团身膝盖紧抱胸, 脚离地.
保持 — 脚、膝抬起, 身体悬浮.

en: Forearms on floor, body in straight line.
Squeeze glutes + abs — neutral spine.
Hold for time, don't let hips sag.
zh-Hans: 前臂着地, 身体呈直线.
收紧臀部和腹部 — 脊柱中立.
保持时间, 不要让髋部下垂.

en: Top of push-up position, arms locked.
Brace core, glutes tight, body straight.
Hold for time, breathe steadily.
zh-Hans: 俯卧撑顶端姿势, 手臂锁定.
核心收紧, 臀部夹紧, 身体直线.
保持时间, 稳定呼吸.

en: Forearm plank position, body straight.
Rotate hips, dip one side toward floor.
Return to center, alternate sides.
zh-Hans: 前臂平板, 身体直线.
旋转髋部, 一侧下沉接近地面.
回到中位, 交替进行.

en: High plank, body straight.
Reach one arm forward, hold briefly.
Return, alternate arms — stay stable.
zh-Hans: 高位平板, 身体直线.
一只手向前伸, 短暂停顿.
收回, 交替 — 保持稳定.

en: Forearm plank, elbows under shoulders.
Max tension — squeeze glutes, quads, abs.
Hold 10-30s with full body tension.
zh-Hans: 前臂平板, 肘部置于肩下.
全力收紧 — 臀腿腹同时发力.
保持 10-30 秒, 全身张力.

en: High plank, hands under shoulders.
Tap opposite shoulder with one hand.
Keep hips square — minimize rotation.
zh-Hans: 高位平板, 手在肩下.
一手拍向对侧肩膀.
髋部保持稳定 — 尽量不晃动.

en: Side-lying, prop on one forearm.
Lift hips — body in straight line.
Hold for time, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 侧躺, 一侧前臂撑地.
抬起髋部 — 身体呈直线.
保持时间, 换边.

en: Side plank position, body straight.
Lift top leg up while holding side plank.
Lower under control, switch sides after set.
zh-Hans: 侧平板姿势, 身体直线.
保持侧平板, 上腿向上抬起.
缓慢下放, 完成后换边.

en: Start in forearm plank, body straight.
Push up to high plank one arm at a time.
Lower back to forearms, alternate lead arm.
zh-Hans: 前臂平板支撑, 身体直线.
一只手撑起到高位平板.
依次下放, 交替起手.

en: Plank position, plate on upper back.
Brace core hard, don't let hips sag.
Hold for time — quality over duration.
zh-Hans: 平板支撑, 杠片放上背.
核心紧绷, 髋部不下垂.
保持时间 — 质量优先.

en: Have a partner place the plate — don't drop on spine.
zh-Hans: 请同伴放置杠片 — 不要砸到脊柱.

en: Pinch two plates together, smooth sides out.
Hold by thumb + fingers, stand or walk.
Hold for time.
zh-Hans: 夹两片杠片, 光滑面朝外.
拇指+四指夹, 站或走.
保持时间.

en: Drop into lunge, back knee near floor.
Explode straight up — switch legs in air.
Land in opposite lunge, repeat.
zh-Hans: 下沉到弓步, 后膝接近地面.
向上爆发跳 — 空中换腿.
落地变成相反弓步, 重复.

en: Sit at preacher bench, arms on pad.
Curl EZ-bar up, full range.
Lower slowly to full extension.
zh-Hans: 坐于牧师凳, 手臂贴垫.
弯举EZ杆, 全程.
缓慢下放至完全伸展.

en: Don't fully lock out — protect biceps tendon.
zh-Hans: 不要完全锁死 — 保护二头肌腱.

en: Sit at preacher bench facing low cable.
Curl bar up with constant tension.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 坐于牧师凳面对低位绳索.
弯举杠, 全程张力.
控制下放.

en: Sit at preacher bench, single dumbbell.
Curl up with full bicep contraction.
Lower slowly under control.
zh-Hans: 坐于牧师凳, 单哑铃.
弯举, 二头充分收缩.
缓慢控制下放.

en: Sit at machine, arms on pad, grip handles.
Curl with controlled motion.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 坐于器械, 手臂贴垫, 握把.
控制弯举.
控制下放.

en: Sit at preacher bench, neutral grip.
Curl dumbbells up hammer-style.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 坐于牧师凳, 中立握.
锤式弯举哑铃.
控制下放.

en: Lie face-down, arms out to sides in T.
Thumbs up, raise arms off floor.
Squeeze shoulder blades together.
Lower slowly.
zh-Hans: 面朝下趴, 手臂呈T字侧伸.
拇指朝上, 双臂抬离地面.
收紧肩胛骨.
缓慢下放.

en: Lie face-down, elbows bent at 90° at sides.
Pull elbows back, forearms toward ears.
Forms W shape — squeeze rear delts.
Lower slowly.
zh-Hans: 面朝下趴, 肘部90°在体侧.
肘部后拉, 前臂朝耳.
形成W — 收紧后束.
缓慢下放.

en: Lie face-down, arms overhead in Y position.
Thumbs up, raise arms off floor.
Hold briefly, lower slowly.
zh-Hans: 面朝下趴, 手臂呈Y字举过头.
拇指朝上, 双臂抬离地面.
短暂保持, 缓慢下放.

en: Grip low or high handles, lean in.
Drive forward with short steps.
Body angled, head down.
Push 10-30m intervals.
zh-Hans: 握低位或高位把手, 身体前倾.
小步快推前进.
身体倾斜, 头低.
10-30 米间歇推进.

en: Face away from low cable.
Rope between legs, hinge at hips.
Drive hips forward, squeeze glutes.
Hinge back into stretch.
zh-Hans: 背对绳索低位.
绳在腿间, 髋部铰链.
髋部前顶, 收紧臀部.
髋部回铰链拉伸.

en: Hang from bar, hands shoulder-width, overhand grip.
Pull chest to bar, elbows drive down.
Lower under control to full hang.
zh-Hans: 悬挂在杠上, 双手与肩同宽, 正握.
拉胸口靠近杠, 肘部下压.
控制下放至完全悬垂.

en: Don't swing or kip — leads to shoulder strain.
Avoid partial reps — train full range of motion.
zh-Hans: 不要摆动或借力 — 容易拉伤肩膀.
避免半程动作 — 全程发力.

en: Wide grip, pull to one side, other arm extends.
Working arm bends, other stays straight.
Lower, then repeat on other side.
zh-Hans: 宽握, 偏向一侧上拉, 另一臂伸展.
工作臂弯, 另一臂保持伸直.
下放, 换侧重复.

en: Requires significant pull-up strength — progress gradually.
zh-Hans: 需要较强引体基础 — 循序渐进.

en: Loop band over bar, place one foot or knee in band.
Pull up, band assists at bottom.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 弹力带挂杠, 一脚或膝盖踩入带.
上拉, 底部弹力带辅助.
控制下放.

en: Kneel on platform, grip handles overhand.
Pull body up, chest toward handles.
Lower slowly to full hang.
zh-Hans: 跪在平台上, 正握手柄.
上拉身体, 胸口靠近手柄.
缓慢下放至完全伸展.

en: Hands touching or near-touching, overhand.
Pull up, full elbow flex at top.
Lower slowly to full hang.
zh-Hans: 双手相触或贴近, 正握.
上拉, 顶部肘部完全屈.
缓慢下放至完全伸展.

en: Grip bar end with both hands, one in front of other.
Pull head to one side, alternate per rep.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 手前后分握杠端.
头偏向一侧上拉, 每次交替.
控制下放.

en: Swing body in arch-hollow position.
Use kip momentum to pull explosively.
Chest to bar, return to swing.
zh-Hans: 身体在凹凸位之间摆动.
利用摆浪惯性爆发上拉.
胸口靠杠, 回到摆动.

en: Master strict pull-ups first — kipping stresses shoulders.
Not for hypertrophy — this is for CrossFit/conditioning.
zh-Hans: 先掌握严格引体 — 摆浪给肩膀压力大.
不适合增肌 — 是CrossFit/体能训练.

en: Hang from bar, raise legs to 90° (L-shape).
Hold L-position, perform pull-up.
Lower under control, keep legs up.
zh-Hans: 悬挂杠上, 双腿抬至90度 (L形).
保持L形, 做引体向上.
控制下放, 双腿保持抬起.

en: Build core strength + pull-up endurance separately first.
zh-Hans: 先单独练核心和引体耐力.

en: One hand overhand, one hand underhand.
Pull up, alternate grip each set.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 一手正握, 一手反握.
上拉, 每组交换握法.
控制下放.

en: Jump or step up to top position, chin over bar.
Lower slowly — 3-5 seconds to full hang.
Reset, repeat.
zh-Hans: 跳起或踩到顶部, 下巴过杠.
缓慢下放 — 3-5秒到完全伸展.
重置, 重复.

en: Grip parallel handles, palms facing each other.
Pull up — elbows tuck into sides.
Lower under control to full hang.
zh-Hans: 握平行手柄, 掌心相对.
上拉 — 肘部贴紧体侧.
控制下放至完全悬垂.

en: Hang from one arm, other arm free or holding wrist.
Pull up using single arm.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 单臂悬挂, 另一手放开或抓手腕.
单臂上拉.
控制下放.

en: Extremely advanced — years of pull-up training prerequisite.
Train one-arm negatives extensively first.
zh-Hans: 极高级 — 需要多年引体训练基础.
先大量练单臂离心.

en: Drape towel over bar, grip each end.
Pull up, crush grip on towel.
Lower slowly, maintain grip.
zh-Hans: 毛巾搭在杠上, 双手抓两端.
上拉, 紧握毛巾.
缓慢下放, 握力不松.

en: Pull up to top, shift body side to side along bar.
Working arm bent, other extended.
Travel back across, then lower.
zh-Hans: 上拉到顶, 身体沿杠左右移动.
工作臂弯曲, 另一臂伸展.
横移回来再下放.

en: Advanced — requires mastered pull-up + archer pull-up.
zh-Hans: 高级 — 需要掌握引体和弓箭引体.

en: Attach weight via belt or dumbbell between feet.
Pull up explosively, chest to bar.
Lower under control to full hang.
zh-Hans: 用腰带挂重物或双脚夹哑铃.
爆发上拉, 胸口靠杠.
控制下放至完全悬垂.

en: Master bodyweight pull-ups before adding load.
Don't add weight if form breaks down.
zh-Hans: 先掌握徒手引体再加负重.
动作变形就不要加重量.

en: Grip bar wider than shoulders, overhand.
Pull up by squeezing lats — chest to bar.
Lower slowly, full extension at bottom.
zh-Hans: 宽于肩膀握杠, 正握.
收紧背阔肌上拉 — 胸口靠杠.
缓慢下放, 底部完全伸展.

en: Don't go too wide — strains shoulder joint.
zh-Hans: 握距不要过宽 — 拉伤肩关节.

en: Kneel, walk hands forward.
Hips stay over knees, chest sinks down.
Forehead to floor, hold 30-60 s.
zh-Hans: 跪姿, 双手向前走.
髋部在膝上方, 胸部下沉.
额头触地, 保持 30-60 秒.

en: Bar at front of shoulders, feet hip-width.
Quick dip with knees, drive up with legs.
Press bar overhead as legs lock out.
Lower back to shoulders under control.
zh-Hans: 杠铃在肩前, 脚与髋同宽.
膝盖快速下蹲, 腿部发力上推.
腿伸直时推举杠铃过头.
控制下放至肩部.

en: Time the leg drive — too late wastes momentum.
Don't push through pressed-out elbows.
zh-Hans: 腿部发力时机 — 太晚浪费动量.
锁定后不要继续推.

en: Dumbbells at shoulders, feet hip-width.
Quick dip and drive with legs.
Press dumbbells overhead, lock out.
Lower back to shoulders.
zh-Hans: 哑铃在肩高, 脚与髋同宽.
膝盖快速下蹲, 腿部发力.
推举哑铃过头, 锁定.
下放至肩部.

en: Don't collapse at the bottom of the dip.
zh-Hans: 下蹲时不要塌陷.

en: Plank position, hands shoulder-width.
Lower chest to floor — body straight.
Press up, full elbow extension.
zh-Hans: 平板支撑, 双手与肩同宽.
胸部下降至接近地面 — 身体保持直线.
推起, 手肘完全伸直.

en: Wide push-up start, hands far apart.
Lower toward one side, other arm extends straight.
Push back up, alternate sides.
zh-Hans: 宽距俯卧撑姿势, 双手分开很远.
下降至单侧, 另一臂伸直.
推起, 左右交替.

en: High shoulder demand — master regular push-up first.
zh-Hans: 对肩部要求高 — 先掌握标准俯卧撑.

en: Standard push-up start, hands shoulder-width.
Lower fast, explode up — hands leave floor.
Clap in mid-air, land hands and absorb.
zh-Hans: 标准俯卧撑姿势, 双手与肩同宽.
快速下降, 爆发推起 — 双手离地.
空中击掌, 落地缓冲.

en: High impact on wrists — build up wrist strength first.
Land with bent elbows to absorb impact.
zh-Hans: 手腕承受冲击 — 先练手腕力量.
屈肘落地缓冲冲击.

en: Plank, hands shoulder-width or slightly narrower.
Lower chest, elbows brushing ribs.
Press up — drive with triceps.
zh-Hans: 平板支撑, 双手与肩同宽或略窄.
胸部下降, 肘部贴近肋骨.
推起 — 三头发力.

en: Feet elevated on bench, hands on floor.
Lower upper chest to floor.
Press up — keep body line straight.
zh-Hans: 双脚抬高在凳上, 双手撑地.
上胸下降至接近地面.
推起 — 身体保持直线.

en: Hands on push-up bars or elevated blocks.
Lower chest below hand level — full stretch.
Press up to full extension.
zh-Hans: 双手撑俯卧撑架或垫块.
胸部下降至低于手 — 充分拉伸.
推至完全伸直.

en: Hands together, thumbs and index fingers forming diamond.
Lower chest to hands — elbows tucked.
Press up — squeeze triceps.
zh-Hans: 双手并拢, 拇指食指构成菱形.
胸部下降至手部 — 肘部内收.
推起 — 收紧三头.

en: Lower fully — chest touches floor.
Lift palms off ground briefly.
Replace hands, press back up.
zh-Hans: 完全下放 — 胸部触地.
短暂抬起双手.
手放回, 推起.

en: Grip push-up handles, shoulder-width.
Lower chest below handle level — deeper range.
Press up to full extension.
zh-Hans: 握住推手架, 与肩同宽.
胸部下降至低于握把 — 行程更深.
推至完全伸直.

en: Downward dog start, hips high.
Swoop chest forward and down in arc.
Finish in upward dog, reverse back.
zh-Hans: 下犬式起始, 髋部高.
弧线划过, 胸前下移.
结束于上犬式, 反向回到起点.

en: Hands on bench, body in plank.
Lower chest to bench, body straight.
Press up to full extension.
zh-Hans: 双手撑凳, 身体呈平板.
下降至胸触凳, 身体保持直线.
推至完全伸直.

en: Knees on floor, hands shoulder-width.
Lower chest to floor — body straight from knees to head.
Press up to full extension.
zh-Hans: 膝盖着地, 双手与肩同宽.
胸部下降 — 膝至头一条直线.
推至完全伸直.

en: Start at top of push-up, body straight.
Lower over 3-5 seconds until chest touches floor.
Reset to top (knees if needed), repeat.
zh-Hans: 俯卧撑顶部姿势, 身体保持直线.
缓慢下放 3-5 秒至胸触地.
回到顶部 (必要时跪姿), 重复.

en: Wide foot stance, one hand behind back.
Lower torso to floor under control.
Press up — core resists rotation.
zh-Hans: 双脚宽距, 一手背后.
控制下放躯干至地面.
推起 — 核心抗旋转.

en: Advanced movement — work up via archer push-ups.
Don't lower if you can't press back up.
zh-Hans: 进阶动作 — 先做弓箭手俯卧撑.
推不起就不要下放.

en: Downward dog position, hips high.
Lower head toward floor between hands.
Press back up — keep hips high.
zh-Hans: 下犬式, 髋部抬高.
头部下降至双手之间.
推起 — 髋部保持高位.

en: Standard push-up position.
Lower, then explode up — hands leave floor.
Land softly with bent elbows.
zh-Hans: 标准俯卧撑姿势.
下降, 爆发推起 — 双手离地.
屈肘缓冲落地.

en: High wrist stress — proper landing critical.
zh-Hans: 手腕压力大 — 注意落地姿势.

en: Hands at hip level, fingers pointing back.
Lean forward, shoulders past wrists.
Lower and press in leaning position.
zh-Hans: 双手置于髋部, 指尖向后.
前倾, 肩超过手腕.
前倾姿势下俯卧撑.

en: Heavy wrist load — warm wrists first.
zh-Hans: 手腕负荷大 — 先充分热身手腕.

en: Band across upper back, ends in palms.
Push-up position, hands shoulder-width.
Lower and press — band adds resistance at top.
zh-Hans: 弹力带绕过上背, 两端握在掌心.
俯卧撑姿势, 双手与肩同宽.
下放推起 — 顶部弹力增加阻力.

en: Standard push-up position.
Lower while bringing one knee to outside elbow.
Press up, alternate knees.
zh-Hans: 标准俯卧撑姿势.
下降时一膝向外肘部移动.
推起, 左右交替.

en: Standard push-up rep.
At top, rotate to side plank, arm overhead.
Return, alternate sides.
zh-Hans: 标准俯卧撑一次.
顶部旋转成侧平板, 一臂上举.
返回, 左右交替.

en: Plank position, hands shoulder-width, elbows tucked.
Lower with elbows tracking along ribs.
Press up — strong triceps lockout.
zh-Hans: 平板支撑, 双手与肩同宽, 肘内收.
下放时肘沿肋骨方向.
推起 — 三头锁定发力.

en: Wide push-up, lower body to one side.
Slide chest horizontally to opposite side.
Press up — repeat alternating.
zh-Hans: 宽距俯卧撑, 下降至一侧.
胸部水平滑动到另一侧.
推起 — 左右交替.

en: Do push-up, then step hand & foot to side.
Push-up in new position, step again.
Move sideways across the floor.
zh-Hans: 做一个俯卧撑, 同侧手脚向侧迈.
新位置再俯卧撑, 再迈.
横向移动.

en: Weight plate or vest on upper back.
Push-up position, lower chest to floor.
Press up — maintain straight body line.
zh-Hans: 上背放杠铃片或穿负重背心.
俯卧撑姿势, 胸部下降至地.
推起 — 身体保持直线.

en: Have plate placed by partner — don't twist to add weight.
zh-Hans: 让人帮忙放片 — 不要扭身放片.

en: Plank, hands wider than shoulders.
Lower chest to floor — emphasize chest stretch.
Press up to full extension.
zh-Hans: 平板支撑, 双手宽于肩.
胸部下降 — 强化胸部拉伸.
推至完全伸直.

en: Lie on side, grab top ankle.
Pull heel to glute, hip extended.
Hold 20-30s, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 侧卧, 抓住上方脚踝.
拉脚跟向臀部, 髋部伸展.
保持 20-30 秒, 换边.

en: Stand on one leg, grab other ankle behind.
Pull heel to glute, knees together.
Hold 20-30s, switch legs.
zh-Hans: 单腿站立, 后伸手抓另脚踝.
拉脚跟向臀部, 双膝并拢.
保持 20-30 秒, 换腿.

en: Set bar in rack at knee or just below.
Brace core, grip bar overhand.
Drive hips forward to lock out top.
zh-Hans: 杠在架上, 膝盖或稍下高度.
核心收紧, 正握杠.
髋前送至顶部锁定.

en: Can use heavy load — don't ego-lift.
Maintain flat back at all times.
zh-Hans: 可大重量 — 不要装大.
全程保持平背.

en: Stand on band, ends in hands at hips.
Hinge at hips, hands lower toward floor.
Hamstrings stretch under band tension.
Drive hips up to stand.
zh-Hans: 踩弹力带, 端头握于髋部.
髋部铰链, 双手下放近地.
弹力带张力下腘绳拉伸.
髋部上顶起身.

en: Hold bar at hip level, slight knee bend.
Push hips back, bar slides down legs.
Lower until hamstrings stretch.
Drive hips forward to stand.
zh-Hans: 杠铃握于髋部高度, 膝盖微弯.
髋部后推, 杠铃沿腿下滑.
下放至腘绳拉伸.
髋部前顶起身.

en: Don't round lower back at bottom.
Use straps if grip fails before hams.
zh-Hans: 底部不要圆下背.
握力不够先于腘绳衰竭可用握带.

en: Cable low, rope or bar attached.
Hold at hip height, step back.
Hinge at hips, hams stretch.
Drive up to stand, repeat.
zh-Hans: 绳索低位, 接绳或杆.
握于髋部高度, 后撤.
髋部铰链, 腘绳拉伸.
起身, 重复.

en: Dumbbells in front, soft knee bend.
Hinge at hips, dumbbells down legs.
Lower until hamstring stretch felt.
Drive hips forward to stand.
zh-Hans: 哑铃在身前, 膝盖微弯.
髋部铰链, 哑铃沿腿下放.
下放至感受腘绳拉伸.
髋部前顶起身.

en: Don't round lower back — keep neutral spine.
zh-Hans: 不要圆下背 — 脊柱中立.

name.zh-Hans: 罗马尼亚硬拉 (哑铃, B 位)

en: Dumbbells in hands, B-stance — one foot kicked back, on toes.
Hinge at hips, work primary leg.
Other foot just balances.
Drive hips up, repeat.
zh-Hans: 双手持哑铃, B 位 — 一脚后撤踮脚.
髋部铰链, 主腿发力.
另一脚仅平衡.
髋部上顶, 重复.

en: Hold kettlebell in front, soft knee bend.
Hinge at hips, kettlebell lowers.
Hamstrings stretch, back flat.
Drive hips forward to stand.
zh-Hans: 壶铃在身前, 膝盖微弯.
髋部铰链, 壶铃下放.
腘绳拉伸, 背挺直.
髋部前顶起身.

en: Standard RDL setup.
Lower bar, pause 3 sec in stretch.
Drive up explosively.
Builds bottom-position strength.
zh-Hans: 标准罗马尼亚硬拉位置.
下放, 拉伸位暂停 3 秒.
爆发起身.
建立底部位置力量.

name.zh-Hans: 单腿罗马尼亚硬拉 (杠铃)

en: Bar in hands, stand on one leg.
Hinge at hip, back leg extends.
Body forms T at bottom.
Drive hip up to stand, repeat.
zh-Hans: 手握杠铃, 单腿站立.
髋部铰链, 后腿伸展.
底部身体呈 T 字.
髋部上顶起身, 重复.

en: Hard balance — start light.
zh-Hans: 平衡困难 — 从轻重量开始.

name.zh-Hans: 单腿罗马尼亚硬拉 (哑铃)

en: Dumbbells in hands, stand on one leg.
Hinge at hip, other leg extends back.
Body forms T at bottom.
Drive hip up to stand, repeat.
zh-Hans: 双手持哑铃, 单腿站立.
髋部铰链, 另一腿后伸.
底部身体呈 T 字.
髋部上顶起身, 重复.

en: Balance is hard — start with light weight.
zh-Hans: 平衡难 — 从轻重量开始.

name.zh-Hans: 单腿罗马尼亚硬拉 (壶铃)

en: Kettlebell in opposite hand, stand on one leg.
Hinge at hip, back leg extends.
Lower toward floor, hams stretch.
Drive hip up, repeat.
zh-Hans: 异侧手持壶铃, 单腿站立.
髋部铰链, 后腿伸展.
下放近地, 腘绳拉伸.
髋部上顶, 重复.

name.zh-Hans: 罗马尼亚硬拉 (史密斯机)

en: Bar at hip height in Smith.
Hinge at hips, bar slides down.
Hamstring stretch, then drive up.
Lockout hips at top.
zh-Hans: 杠铃在史密斯机髋部高度.
髋部铰链, 杠铃下滑.
腘绳拉伸, 起身.
顶部髋部锁定.

en: Bent over, dumbbells hang under shoulders.
Use slight body english to swing weights out.
Control the descent more than the lift.
Heavier than strict rear delt fly.
zh-Hans: 俯身, 哑铃在肩下.
略借力摆动哑铃.
控制下放, 不控上举.
比严格飞鸟更重.

en: Band in front at shoulder height, arms forward.
Pull band apart and back — squeeze rear delts.
Slow release.
zh-Hans: 弹力带在身前肩高, 手臂前伸.
向后向外拉 — 后束收紧.
缓慢还原.

en: Stand center of cable station, cables crossed.
Left hand grabs right cable, vice versa.
Pull cables out to sides — like a reverse hug.
Squeeze rear delts, slow return.
zh-Hans: 站绳索机中间, 双绳交叉.
左手握右绳, 反之亦然.
向两侧拉 — 反向拥抱.
后束收紧, 缓慢还原.

en: Bend at hips, torso nearly parallel to floor.
Dumbbells hang under shoulders, palms in.
Raise arms out to sides — squeeze shoulder blades.
Lower slowly.
zh-Hans: 髋部前倾, 躯干近水平.
哑铃在肩下垂, 掌心朝内.
侧平举 — 收紧肩胛骨.
缓慢下放.

en: Keep back flat — don't round upper back.
zh-Hans: 背部平直 — 不要弓背.

en: Sit on bench edge, chest on thighs.
Dumbbells under knees, palms in.
Raise arms out, pinky leading.
Squeeze upper back, lower slowly.
zh-Hans: 坐凳边, 胸贴大腿.
哑铃在膝下, 掌心朝内.
侧平举, 小指引领.
上背收紧, 缓慢下放.

en: Lie face-down on 30-45° incline bench.
Dumbbells hang, palms facing each other.
Raise arms out to sides — pinkies up.
Lower slowly.
zh-Hans: 面朝下趴 30-45° 上斜凳.
哑铃下垂, 掌心相对.
侧平举 — 小指朝上.
缓慢下放.

en: Bend at hips, kettlebells hang under shoulders.
Raise arms out to sides at shoulder height.
Slow return — keep back flat.
zh-Hans: 髋部前倾, 壶铃在肩下垂.
侧平举至肩高.
缓慢还原 — 背部平直.

en: Face machine, chest on pad, arms forward.
Pull handles back and out.
Squeeze shoulder blades, slow return.
zh-Hans: 面对器械, 胸贴垫, 手臂前伸.
向后向外拉.
收紧肩胛, 缓慢还原.

en: Cable at shoulder height, far hand grabs handle.
Stand side-on, arm across body.
Pull arm out and back — squeeze rear delt.
Slow return.
zh-Hans: 绳在肩高, 远侧手握把.
侧站, 手臂过身体.
向外向后拉 — 收紧后束.
缓慢还原.

en: Rope at high pulley, palms facing down.
Pull rope down to chin level, elbows wide.
Squeeze rear delts at end.
Slow return.
zh-Hans: 绳高位, 掌心朝下.
下拉至下巴高, 肘部外展.
结束位后束收紧.
缓慢还原.

en: Sit on bench, lean fully forward.
Chest near thighs, dumbbells under knees.
Raise arms out — squeeze rear delts.
Lower slowly.
zh-Hans: 坐凳, 完全前倾.
胸近大腿, 哑铃在膝下.
侧平举 — 后束收紧.
缓慢下放.

en: Rope at shoulder height, palms in.
Pull rope to face, elbows flared high.
Squeeze rear delts, slow return.
zh-Hans: 绳在肩高, 掌心朝内.
拉至脸, 肘部高位外展.
后束收紧, 缓慢还原.

en: Lie chest-down on 30-45° incline bench.
Dumbbells hanging, palms in.
Row up with elbows wide, pull to chest level.
Slow return.
zh-Hans: 胸朝下趴 30-45° 上斜凳.
哑铃下垂, 掌心朝内.
肘部外展上拉至胸高.
缓慢还原.

en: One knee on bench, hand for support.
Dumbbell hangs straight down.
Row dumbbell up and out — elbow flared wide.
Targets rear delt more than back.
zh-Hans: 单膝跪凳, 手支撑.
哑铃自然下垂.
上拉并外展 — 肘部外展.
更针对后束.

name.en: Rear Foot Elevated Split Squat (Smith Machine)
name.zh-Hans: 后脚抬高分腿蹲 (史密斯机)

en: Smith bar on back, rear foot on bench.
Front foot forward.
Lower until front thigh parallel.
Drive up through front heel.
zh-Hans: 史密斯机杠铃放背上, 后脚放凳.
前脚向前.
下放至前腿水平.
前脚脚跟发力起身.

en: Plank position, gripping dumbbells.
Row one dumbbell up, keep hips still.
Alternate sides, brace core throughout.
zh-Hans: 平板支撑, 手握哑铃.
单手拉哑铃, 髋部不动.
左右交替, 核心全程收紧.

en: Don't twist hips — keep them square to floor.
zh-Hans: 髋部不要扭转 — 与地面平行.

en: Stand, barbell with overhand grip.
Curl up to shoulders, palms down.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 站立, 杠铃正握.
弯举至肩, 掌心向下.
控制下放.

en: Low pulley, straight bar, overhand grip.
Curl up to chest, palms down.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 低位滑轮, 直杆, 正握.
弯举至胸, 掌心向下.
控制下放.

en: Stand, dumbbells in front, overhand grip.
Curl up, palms down throughout.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 站立, 哑铃在前, 正握.
弯举上举, 掌心始终向下.
控制下放.

en: Stand, EZ-bar, overhand grip.
Curl up, palms stay down.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 站立, EZ杆, 正握.
弯举, 掌心保持向下.
控制下放.

en: Sit at reverse pec deck, grip handles.
Pull handles back in arc to sides.
Squeeze upper back, return slowly.
zh-Hans: 坐于反向蝴蝶机, 握手柄.
向后弧线拉至体侧.
收紧上背, 缓慢回.

en: Underhand grip, slightly wider than shoulders.
Lower bar to lower chest, elbows close.
Press up — targets upper chest hard.
zh-Hans: 反握, 握距略宽于肩.
下放至下胸, 肘部贴近.
推起 — 强烈刺激上胸.

en: Always use a spotter — grip can fail.
Start light to learn the path.
zh-Hans: 务必有保护 — 反握易脱手.
从轻重量开始熟悉轨迹.

en: Lie face down on pad, hips at edge.
Legs straight, hold handles.
Raise legs to body height.
Squeeze glutes, lower slow.
zh-Hans: 俯卧靠垫, 髋部在边缘.
腿伸直, 抓握把.
腿抬至身体水平.
收紧臀部, 缓慢下放.

en: Don't hyperextend lower back at top.
zh-Hans: 顶部不要过度反弓下背.

en: Sit facing machine, chest against pad.
Grip handles with arms forward.
Pull handles back and out — squeeze shoulder blades.
Return slowly.
zh-Hans: 面对器械坐, 胸贴垫.
手握把, 手臂前伸.
向后向外拉 — 收紧肩胛.
缓慢还原.

en: Sit, forearms on thighs, palms down.
Curl wrists up (extension), squeeze top.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 坐姿, 前臂贴大腿, 掌心向下.
腕伸, 顶部收紧.
控制下放.

en: Sit, forearms on thighs, overhand grip on bar.
Extend wrists up, hold briefly.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 坐姿, 前臂贴大腿, 正握杠.
腕伸, 短暂保持.
控制下放.

en: Plunge hands into rice bucket.
Open/close fingers, twist wrists.
Train for time, multiple directions.
zh-Hans: 双手插入米桶.
开合手指, 旋转手腕.
持续时间, 多方向训练.

en: Rings just above floor, plank position.
Lower chest to rings, body straight.
Press up — turn rings out at top.
zh-Hans: 吊环略高于地, 平板姿势.
下降至胸接近吊环, 身体保持直线.
推起 — 顶部外旋.

en: Rings are unstable — master fixed push-ups first.
zh-Hans: 吊环不稳定 — 先掌握普通俯卧撑.

en: Hang from rings, body angled to floor.
Pull chest to rings, body straight.
Lower under control, full stretch.
zh-Hans: 悬挂吊环, 身体倾斜.
拉胸口至环, 身体保持直线.
控制下放, 充分拉伸.

en: Lie on bench, dumbbells over chest.
Lower to forehead (skullcrusher), then roll back behind head.
Press from behind head — combined motion.
zh-Hans: 平躺凳上, 哑铃举胸前.
下放至额头, 然后滚至脑后.
从脑后推起 — 复合动作.

en: Sit and roll backward.
Use momentum to roll back up.
Land in deep squat position.
Stand up explosively.
zh-Hans: 坐下后滚.
借惯性滚回.
落地至深蹲位.
爆发起身.

en: Low pulley, rope attachment, neutral grip.
Curl up, twist palms out at top.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 低位滑轮, 绳索把, 中立握.
弯举, 顶部掌心外翻.
控制下放.

en: Sit, feet strapped, grab handle.
Drive with legs first, then back, then arms.
Reverse: arms, back, legs — return slowly.
zh-Hans: 坐姿, 双脚扣紧, 抓住手柄.
腿先发力, 然后背, 最后手臂.
回程顺序相反: 手臂, 背, 腿 — 缓慢返回.

en: Don't yank with arms first — leads to back strain.
zh-Hans: 不要先用手臂拉 — 容易拉伤背部.

en: Set damper 6-8, all-out 250-500 m intervals.
Explosive leg drive — drive through heels.
Rest 1:1 or 1:2 work:rest ratio.
zh-Hans: 腿部爆发蹬出 — 脚跟发力.

en: Maintain form even at high pace — back stays braced.
zh-Hans: 高速时也要保持动作标准 — 背部始终绷紧.

en: Loaded pack 10-30% bodyweight.
Brisk walking pace, upright posture.
Pack high and tight on back.
zh-Hans: 负重包 10-30% 体重.
快走速度, 上身挺直.
包贴近背部高位放置.

en: Start light, build load over weeks.
Maintain posture — don't hunch under load.
zh-Hans: 从轻到重, 周周增加.
保持姿态 — 不要被压驼背.

en: Find a 30-60s hill, moderate grade.
Drive knees high, arms strong.
Walk down for recovery, repeat 6-10x.
zh-Hans: 找一个 30-60 秒坡道, 中等坡度.
高抬膝, 手臂强力摆动.
走下坡恢复, 重复 6-10 次.

en: Don't sprint downhill — high injury risk.
zh-Hans: 不要冲下坡 — 受伤风险高.

en: Alternate hard 400-800 m with easy jogs.
Push 85-90% effort during the hard.
Active recovery: light jog, not walk.
zh-Hans: 400-800 米快跑和慢跑交替.
积极恢复: 慢跑, 不要停下来.

en: Build base mileage before adding intervals.
zh-Hans: 先建立基础跑量再加入间歇.

en: Conversational pace, 60+ minutes.
Fuel and hydrate for longer efforts.
Focus on consistency, not speed.
zh-Hans: 聊天速度, 60 分钟以上.
长距离需要补给和补水.
重点是稳定性, 不是速度.

en: Watch for overuse injuries — knees, IT band, shins.
zh-Hans: 注意过度使用伤 — 膝盖, 髂胫束, 胫骨.

en: Steady aerobic pace, can hold conversation.
Land mid-foot, short stride.
Relaxed arms, gaze forward.
zh-Hans: 稳定有氧速度, 可以聊天.
前脚掌落地, 步幅适中.
手臂放松, 目视前方.

en: Build mileage gradually — 10% rule per week.
zh-Hans: 逐步增加跑量 — 每周最多加 10%.

en: All-out effort 40-100 m intervals.
Drive knees high, arms pump aggressively.
Full recovery: 2-3 min between sprints.
zh-Hans: 全力 40-100 米间歇.
高抬膝, 手臂强力摆动.
充分恢复: 冲刺间 2-3 分钟.

en: Warm up thoroughly — hamstring strain risk.
Don't sprint on cold muscles or hard pavement only.
zh-Hans: 充分热身 — 容易拉伤腘绳肌.
肌肉未热不要冲刺, 避免硬地面.

en: Sit on floor, lean back, feet up.
Rotate torso side to side.
Keep core braced, chest tall.
zh-Hans: 坐地, 上身后倾, 双脚抬起.
上身左右转体.
核心收紧, 挺胸.

en: Sit on floor, lean back, hold ball.
Rotate torso, tap ball each side.
Feet up, controlled tempo.
zh-Hans: 坐地, 上身后倾, 握药球.
转体, 球两侧轻触.
双脚抬起, 节奏可控.

en: Sit on floor, lean back, holding weight.
Rotate torso side to side, tap weight.
Keep feet up, core braced.
zh-Hans: 坐地, 上身后倾, 握重物.
上身左右转体, 重物两侧轻触.
双脚抬起, 核心收紧.

en: Hang from bar, arms straight.
Depress scapula — pull shoulders down without bending arms.
Slow return to full hang.
zh-Hans: 悬挂杠上, 手臂伸直.
肩胛下压 — 不弯臂下沉肩.
缓慢回到完全悬垂.

en: Push-up position, arms locked straight.
Squeeze shoulder blades together, chest dips.
Push apart, chest rises — arms stay locked.
zh-Hans: 俯卧撑姿势, 双臂锁直.
肩胛骨内收, 胸部下沉.
肩胛打开, 胸部上抬 — 手臂保持锁定.

en: Bent over, arms out at sides, elbows 90°.
Rotate forearms up — like a scarecrow.
Hold briefly, lower slowly.
Use very light weight.
zh-Hans: 俯身, 双臂侧伸, 肘部90°.
前臂向上旋转 — 像稻草人.
短暂保持, 缓慢下放.
用很轻重量.

en: Lie on back, legs straight, just off floor.
Cross legs horizontally — scissor pattern.
Lower back flat, controlled motion.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 双腿直, 微抬起.
双腿水平交叉 — 剪刀动作.
下背贴地, 动作可控.

en: Lie face down, arms out wide.
Swing one leg over to opposite side.
Hold 20s, alternate sides.
zh-Hans: 俯卧, 双臂张开.
一腿翻向对侧.
保持 20 秒, 交替进行.

en: Sit at vertical-side preacher bench.
Curl EZ-bar full range with strict form.
Lower to full extension.
zh-Hans: 坐于直立面牧师凳.
全程严格弯举EZ杆.
下放至完全伸展.

en: Lie face-down on raised bench, barbell below.
Row bar straight up to bench.
Lower under control, strict form.
zh-Hans: 俯卧高凳上, 杠铃在下.
直拉杠至凳底.
控制下放, 严格动作.

en: Sit on bench, dumbbells at sides.
Curl both up to shoulders.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 坐凳, 哑铃在体侧.
双臂弯举至肩.
控制下放.

en: Sit on incline bench, dumbbells hanging neutral.
Hammer curl up to shoulders.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 坐上斜凳, 哑铃中立下垂.
锤式弯举至肩.
控制下放.

en: Light bounce on balls of feet.
Throw combos — jab, cross, hook.
Rotate from hips, exhale on each punch.
zh-Hans: 前脚掌轻巧跳动.
打组合拳 — 刺拳, 直拳, 勾拳.
髋部转动, 每拳呼气.

en: Don't hyperextend elbows at end of punch.
zh-Hans: 出拳时不要过伸肘关节.

en: Stand or sit tall, opposite arm braces.
Slowly trace largest possible circle.
Forward, up, back, down — controlled.
zh-Hans: 站姿或坐姿挺直, 对侧手稳定身体.
缓慢画出最大圆.
前, 上, 后, 下 — 控制好.

en: Hold band wide overhead, arms straight.
Rotate band from front to behind back.
Reverse — smooth, controlled motion.
zh-Hans: 宽握弹力带于头顶, 手臂伸直.
弹力带从前向后翻至背后.
反向重复 — 动作平稳可控.

en: Wide grip on PVC/stick in front of body.
Lift overhead, pass behind back.
Reverse — no shrugging, slow.
zh-Hans: 宽握 PVC/棍于身前.
上举过头, 至身后.
反向 — 不耸肩, 缓慢.

en: Pull one arm across body at chest height.
Opposite hand grips elbow, pull gently.
Hold 20-30s, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 单臂横跨胸前.
对侧手扣住肘部, 轻拉.
保持 20-30 秒, 换边.

en: Side-lying, bottom arm out, elbow 90°.
Use top hand to push forearm down.
Hold 20-30s, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 侧卧, 下方手臂前伸, 肘 90°.
上方手向下推前臂.
保持 20-30 秒, 换边.

en: Don't force — shoulder is delicate. Stop if sharp pain.
zh-Hans: 不要强压 — 肩部脆弱, 锐痛立即停止.

en: Stand on one leg, other foot grabbed behind.
Squat down until back knee touches floor.
Stay balanced and upright.
Drive up to standing.
zh-Hans: 单腿站立, 另一脚在身后抓握.
下蹲至后膝触地.
保持平衡和直立.
起身站立.

en: Very demanding — progress slowly.
zh-Hans: 难度极高 — 渐进训练.

en: Bar at thighs, shoulder-width grip.
Shrug shoulders straight up toward ears.
Squeeze at top, lower slowly.
Don't roll shoulders.
zh-Hans: 杠铃在大腿前, 与肩同宽握.
肩部直接向上耸至耳.
顶部收紧, 缓慢下放.
不要转肩.

en: Don't roll shoulders — straight up and down only.
zh-Hans: 不要转肩 — 只上下.

en: Bar behind glutes, hands at hip-width.
Shrug shoulders up toward ears.
Hits traps from different angle.
Lower slowly.
zh-Hans: 杠铃在臀后, 与髋同宽握.
向上耸肩至耳.
斜方不同角度.
缓慢下放.

en: Stand facing low cable, straight bar attachment.
Grip bar in front of thighs.
Shrug shoulders up to ears.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 站面对低位绳索, 直杆把.
握杆在大腿前.
向上耸肩至耳.
控制下放.

en: Dumbbells at sides, neutral grip.
Shrug shoulders straight up to ears.
Squeeze, lower under control.
zh-Hans: 哑铃在体侧, 对握.
肩部直接上耸至耳.
收紧, 控制下放.

en: Smith bar at thigh level, grip just wider than shoulders.
Shrug straight up toward ears.
Squeeze at top, lower slowly.
zh-Hans: 史密斯杆在大腿高, 握距略宽于肩.
向上耸肩至耳.
顶部收紧, 缓慢下放.

en: Stand inside trap bar, neutral grip.
Deadlift to standing, then shrug.
Squeeze traps at top, lower slowly.
zh-Hans: 站六角杠内, 对握.
硬拉至站立, 然后耸肩.
顶部斜方收紧, 缓慢下放.

en: Stand sideways to cable, low pulley.
Grip handle, bend away from machine.
Return upright, controlled motion.
zh-Hans: 侧对绳索, 低位滑轮.
握把手, 向远离机器侧屈干.
返回直立, 动作可控.

en: Stand, dumbbell in one hand at side.
Bend laterally toward dumbbell side.
Return upright by squeezing opposite oblique.
zh-Hans: 站立, 单手持哑铃于体侧.
向哑铃侧屈干.
对侧腹斜肌发力起身.

en: Side-lying, legs stacked.
Raise top leg straight up.
Hold briefly, lower controlled.
Switch sides.
zh-Hans: 侧卧, 双腿叠放.
上腿向上直抬.
短暂保持, 控制下放.
换边.

en: Ankle strap on cable, side stance.
Raise leg out to side.
Squeeze hip muscles at top.
Lower controlled, switch.
zh-Hans: 脚踝绑绳索, 侧向站立.
腿向侧抬.
顶部收紧髋部肌肉.
控制下放, 换边.

en: Stand wide, shift weight to one bent leg.
Other leg straight, foot flat.
Hold 20-30s, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 宽步距站立, 单腿屈膝下蹲.
另一腿伸直, 脚平贴地.
保持 20-30 秒, 换边.

en: Side plank position, body straight.
Lower hips toward floor, then raise.
Squeeze obliques at top, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 侧平板姿势, 身体直线.
髋部向地面下沉再抬起.
顶部收紧腹斜肌, 换边.

en: Side plank position, forearm down.
Lift top leg toward ceiling.
Hold briefly, lower controlled.
Complete reps, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 侧平板位置, 前臂着地.
上腿向上抬.
短暂保持, 控制下放.
完成后换边.

en: Stand perpendicular to landmine bar.
Pronated grip on bar end, hinge forward.
Row bar to hip, controlled descent.
zh-Hans: 垂直站于地雷杆.
正握杠端, 前屈.
拉杠至髋, 控制下放.

en: High pulley, single handle, arm straight.
Pull arm down to hip, lat squeeze.
Return slowly to overhead.
zh-Hans: 高位滑轮, 单手把, 手臂伸直.
拉至髋, 收紧背阔肌.
缓慢回到头顶.

en: Stand on step, one foot only.
Dumbbell in same-side hand.
Heel drops below step, full stretch.
Rise on toes, peak squeeze.
zh-Hans: 踩台阶, 单脚.
同侧手持哑铃.
脚跟低于台阶, 充分拉伸.
踮脚尖, 峰收缩.

en: Stand on one leg, hinge forward.
Back leg extends, arms hang free.
Return to standing, control balance.
zh-Hans: 单腿站, 前屈.
后腿伸展, 双臂自然下垂.
回到站立, 控制平衡.

en: Lie on back, foot on elevated bench.
Other leg extended straight.
Drive hips up on one leg.
Squeeze, lower controlled.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 脚踩抬高凳.
另一腿直伸.
单腿髋部上顶.
收紧, 控制下放.

en: Stand on one leg, hop forward.
Stick the landing on same leg.
Switch legs each set, 6-10 hops.
zh-Hans: 单脚站立, 向前跳.
同一只脚稳定落地.
每组换腿, 6-10 跳.

en: Master double-leg landings first.
zh-Hans: 先掌握双脚落地.

en: Stand on one leg, dumbbell in opposite hand.
Hinge forward, back leg extends back.
Return to standing, control balance.
zh-Hans: 单腿站, 对侧手持哑铃.
前屈, 后腿向后伸.
回站直, 控制平衡.

en: Balance challenges form — use lighter weights.
zh-Hans: 平衡挑战大 — 用轻重量.

en: Hold TRX handles, stand on one leg.
Hinge at hip, back leg extends.
TRX gives balance support.
Drive hip up to stand, switch.
zh-Hans: 握 TRX 把手, 单腿站立.
髋部铰链, 后腿伸展.
TRX 辅助平衡.
髋部上顶起身, 换边.

en: Stand on one leg in front of box.
Squat down to tap glutes on box.
Other leg extended forward.
Drive up to standing.
zh-Hans: 单腿站箱前.
下蹲至臀触箱.
另一腿前伸.
起身站立.

en: Dumbbell goblet position.
Stand on one leg, squat down.
Other leg extended forward.
Drive up, complete reps each side.
zh-Hans: 哑铃高脚杯位置.
单腿站立, 下蹲.
另一腿前伸.
起身, 完成每边.

en: Stand tall, hold something for balance.
Lean back, rise on toes, knees forward.
Lower until thighs near horizontal.
Drive back up squeezing quads.
zh-Hans: 站直, 扶物保持平衡.
后仰, 踮脚尖, 膝盖前推.
下降至大腿接近水平.
收紧股四头起身.

en: Hard on knees — skip if you have knee issues.
zh-Hans: 对膝盖压力大 — 膝盖有伤勿做.

en: Strap calves into machine pads.
Lean back, knees travel forward.
Lower to full quad stretch.
Drive up to standing.
zh-Hans: 小腿固定在器械护垫中.
后仰, 膝盖前推.
下降至股四头完全拉伸.
起身站立.

en: Lie on back, knees bent, feet flat.
Sit up fully — torso to thighs.
Lower with control to start.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 屈膝, 双脚平放.
完全坐起 — 上身贴近大腿.
控制下放回起始.

en: Lie on decline bench, ankles hooked.
Sit up fully against decline angle.
Lower with control, full range of motion.
zh-Hans: 躺下斜凳, 脚踝勾住.
对抗角度完全坐起.
控制下放, 全程动作.

en: Lie on back, arms overhead, legs straight.
Sit up while keeping legs and arms extended.
Lower with control — keep abs braced.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 双臂过头, 双腿伸直.
保持手腿伸直, 完成坐起.
控制下放 — 腹部持续收紧.

en: Sit, hands behind, legs straight up at angle.
Lower torso back as legs lower.
Return to V — abs in constant tension.
zh-Hans: 坐姿, 手撑后, 双腿斜上方.
上身后倒同时双腿下放.
返回 V 形 — 腹部持续紧绷.

en: Lie on back, knees bent, plate on chest.
Sit up fully — torso vertical.
Lower with control, plate stays on chest.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 屈膝, 杠片放胸前.
完全坐起 — 上身垂直.
控制下放, 杠片保持胸前.

en: Hop sideways, land on one leg.
Other leg sweeps behind in skater pose.
Push off landing leg to opposite side.
Continuous side-to-side.
zh-Hans: 侧跳, 单腿落地.
另一腿滑冰姿势后摆.
用落地腿蹬到对侧.
持续侧向切换.

en: Bound side to side, land on outside foot.
Other foot crosses behind.
Swing arms naturally for momentum.
zh-Hans: 侧向跳跃, 外侧脚落地.
另一只脚从后方交叉.
手臂自然摆动.

en: Stand on one leg, other knee bent behind.
Squat down, back knee toward floor.
Arms forward for balance.
Drive up through standing leg.
zh-Hans: 单腿站立, 另一膝弯曲在身后.
下蹲, 后膝向地面.
双臂前伸平衡.
站立腿发力起身.

en: Stand tall, grab handles overhead.
Hinge hips, pull down to thighs.
Lats and core drive — not arms.
zh-Hans: 站姿挺直, 双手抓住顶部把手.
髋部铰链, 下拉至大腿.
背阔肌和核心发力 — 不是手臂.

en: Hinge from hips, don't round back.
zh-Hans: 髋部铰链, 不要圆背.

en: Lie on bench, hold barbell over chest, shoulder-width.
Lower bar to forehead by bending elbows.
Press back up — elbows stay tucked.
zh-Hans: 平躺凳上, 杠铃举胸前, 与肩同宽.
屈肘下放至额头.
推起 — 肘部保持内收.

en: Bar over forehead, not face — use spotter on heavy sets.
zh-Hans: 杠在额头上方, 不要砸脸 — 大重量需保护.

name.zh-Hans: 颈后臂屈伸 (过头, EZ-杠)

en: Lie on bench, EZ-bar held over face.
Lower bar past forehead to behind head.
Maximum long-head stretch, extend back up.
zh-Hans: 平躺凳上, EZ 杠举脸上方.
下放越过额头至脑后.
长头最大拉伸, 伸直推起.

en: Use lighter weight — increased shoulder leverage.
zh-Hans: 重量减轻 — 肩部杠杆增大.

en: Decline bench, feet locked, EZ-bar over chest.
Lower bar to forehead — constant tension.
Extend triceps to press up.
zh-Hans: 下斜凳, 脚固定, EZ 杠胸前举起.
下放至额头 — 持续张力.
三头发力推起.

en: Have spotter hand bar up — decline angle awkward.
zh-Hans: 让保护递杠 — 下斜起身不便.

en: Lie on bench, dumbbells over chest, palms facing.
Bend elbows to lower dumbbells beside head.
Extend triceps to press back up.
zh-Hans: 平躺凳上, 哑铃举胸前, 对握.
屈肘下放至头侧.
三头发力推起.

en: Lie on bench, EZ-bar held over chest, narrow grip.
Hinge at elbows, lower bar toward forehead.
Extend triceps to return — keep elbows fixed.
zh-Hans: 平躺凳上, EZ 杠胸前举起, 窄握.
肘部铰链, 下放至额头.
三头发力伸直 — 肘部固定.

en: Keep elbows tight — flaring increases shoulder strain.
zh-Hans: 肘部内收 — 外翻容易伤肩.

en: Set bench to 30-45° incline.
EZ-bar over chest, lower toward top of head.
Extend back up — extra stretch on long head.
zh-Hans: 卧推凳调至 30-45°.
EZ 杠胸前举起, 下放至头顶.
伸直推起 — 长头额外拉伸.

en: Lower EZ-bar to forehead, press halfway up.
Lower back down, then press to full lockout.
Counts as one rep — extra time under tension.
zh-Hans: 下放 EZ 杠至额头, 推至半程.
再次下放, 推至完全锁定.
算一次 — 额外张力时间.

en: Standard skullcrusher setup, EZ-bar.
Lower to forehead, pause 2 seconds — full triceps stretch.
Extend back up under control.
zh-Hans: 标准颈后臂屈伸姿势, EZ 杠.
下放至额头, 停 2 秒 — 三头充分拉伸.
控制推起.

en: Standard skullcrusher setup, EZ-bar.
3-second eccentric, 1-second pause at bottom.
Explosive concentric — strict form.
zh-Hans: 标准颈后臂屈伸姿势, EZ 杠.
3 秒下放, 底部停 1 秒.
爆发推起 — 严格控制.

en: Face sled, attach harness or grip rope.
Walk backward in half-squat.
Quads load heavily.
Knee-friendly — good rehab.
zh-Hans: 面对雪橇, 系腰带或抓绳.
半蹲位后退行走.
重点刺激股四头.
对膝盖友好 — 适合康复.

en: Lean forward, hands on sled handles.
Drive with legs, short choppy steps.
Body angled forward — like sprinting.
Push through full extension each step.
zh-Hans: 前倾, 双手握雪橇手柄.
腿发力, 小步快速推进.
身体前倾 — 类似冲刺.
每步髋膝完全伸展.

en: Heavy on cardio and legs — pace yourself.
zh-Hans: 心肺和腿压力大 — 注意配速.

en: Set Smith bar low, single dumbbell or single arm grip.
Use bar as anchor for cross-body fly motion.
Squeeze chest at end range.
zh-Hans: 史密斯杠置低位, 单手握杠或加哑铃.
杠作支点做交叉飞鸟动作.
末端收紧胸部.

en: Stand under Smith bar, hinge forward.
Pull bar to lower chest.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 站于史密斯杠下, 前屈.
拉杠至下胸.
控制下放.

en: Very wide grip, bar on floor.
Drop hips low, chest up.
Pull bar to hip, full lockout.
zh-Hans: 极宽握, 杠在地面.
髋部下沉, 挺胸.
拉杠至髋, 完全锁定.

en: Wide grip + heavier ROM — common spine flexion error.
zh-Hans: 宽握加大幅度 — 常见脊柱屈错误.

en: Snatch grip, bar on floor.
Pull bar explosively from floor.
Drive hips through, shrug high.
Bar reaches sternum height.
zh-Hans: 抓举握距, 杠铃在地面.
爆发从地面拉起.
髋部推过, 高耸肩.
杠铃达胸骨高度.

en: Olympic lift assistance — needs coaching.
zh-Hans: 奥举辅助 — 需要教练指导.

en: Sit in chair, feet flat.
Keep heels down, push knees up.
Forefoot stays planted.
Slow controlled tempo for soleus.
zh-Hans: 坐椅, 双脚平踩.
脚跟保持落地, 膝盖上推.
前脚掌保持踩地.
缓慢节奏刺激比目鱼.

en: Stand near wall, one leg back, knee bent.
Sink hips, both heels stay on floor.
Hold 20-30s, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 近墙站立, 一腿后撤屈膝.
下沉髋部, 双脚跟贴地.
保持 20-30 秒, 换边.

en: Start in plank, lower to forearms.
Press back up to plank using triceps.
Forearms touch floor each rep — pure triceps.
zh-Hans: 平板支撑, 下放至前臂.
三头发力推回平板支撑.
每次前臂触地 — 纯三头发力.

en: Chest on incline bench, arms hang vertical.
Curl dumbbells up, focus on peak.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 胸贴上斜凳, 双臂垂直下垂.
弯举哑铃, 重点峰值.
控制下放.

en: Chest on incline bench facing cable.
Curl bar with constant tension.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 胸贴上斜凳面对绳索.
弯举杠, 全程张力.
控制下放.

en: Seat height at hip, slight forward lean.
Mix seated and standing climbs.
Add resistance for hills, drop for sprints.
zh-Hans: 座位高度与髋同高, 略前倾.
坐姿和站姿爬坡交替.
爬坡加阻力, 冲刺减阻力.

en: Don't bounce on saddle — keep hips stable.
zh-Hans: 不要在坐垫上蹦 — 髋部保持稳定.

en: Sit, one leg straight, other bent across.
Twist torso, opposite elbow on outer knee.
Hold 20-30s, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 坐姿, 一腿伸直, 另一腿屈膝交叉.
上身扭转, 对侧肘抵膝外.
保持 20-30 秒, 换边.

en: Lie on back, arms out wide.
Drop bent knees to one side.
Look opposite way, hold 20-30s.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 双臂张开.
屈膝双腿落向一侧.
头看反方向, 保持 20-30 秒.

en: Stand or sit tall.
Trace biggest possible circle from torso.
Lean forward, side, back, side.
zh-Hans: 站姿或坐姿挺直.
用躯干画最大圆.
前倾, 侧倾, 后倾, 另一侧倾.

en: Bar at shoulders, slight dip.
Drive bar overhead, split legs simultaneously.
Catch bar overhead, in split stance.
Recover to stand.
zh-Hans: 杠铃在肩, 略下沉.
推杠过头, 同时分腿.
在分腿位接住杠铃.
回收站立.

en: Olympic lift — coach required for safety.
zh-Hans: 奥举动作 — 需要教练保护.

en: Lunge position, front knee at 90°.
Jump up, switch legs in air.
Land in opposite lunge, repeat.
zh-Hans: 弓步姿势, 前膝 90°.
起跳, 空中换腿.
落地变成相反弓步, 重复.

en: Knee tracks over toes, no inward collapse.
zh-Hans: 膝盖跟脚尖方向, 不要内扣.

en: Bar on back, split stance.
Lower back knee toward floor.
Front thigh parallel at bottom.
Drive up through front heel.
zh-Hans: 杠铃放背上, 分腿站立.
后膝下降近地面.
前腿底部水平.
前脚脚跟发力起身.

en: Front knee tracks over toes.
zh-Hans: 前膝盖跟脚尖方向一致.

en: Bar on back, rear foot on bench.
Front foot 60-90 cm forward.
Lower front thigh parallel.
Drive up through front heel.
zh-Hans: 杠铃放背上, 后脚放凳.
前脚向前 60-90 cm.
下降至前腿水平.
前脚脚跟发力起身.

en: Balance harder than dumbbell version.
Front knee tracks over toes.
zh-Hans: 比哑铃版本难以平衡.
前膝盖跟脚尖方向一致.

en: Rear foot on bench, front foot 60-90 cm forward.
Lower until front thigh parallel.
Drive up through front heel.
Keep torso upright throughout.
zh-Hans: 后脚放凳, 前脚向前 60-90 cm.
下降至前腿水平.
前脚脚跟发力起身.
全程躯干保持直立.

en: Front knee tracks over toes.
zh-Hans: 前膝盖跟脚尖方向一致.

en: Rear foot on bench, front foot 2-3 feet ahead.
Lower until front thigh parallel to floor.
Drive through front heel back up.
zh-Hans: 后脚放卧推凳, 前脚距凳 60-90 cm.
下降至前腿大腿与地面平行.
前脚脚跟发力起身.

en: Front knee should track over toes, not collapse inward.
zh-Hans: 前膝盖跟脚尖方向一致, 不要内扣.

name.zh-Hans: 保加利亚分腿蹲 (史密斯机)

en: Bar on back, rear foot on bench behind.
Front foot forward under bar.
Lower until front thigh parallel.
Drive up through front heel.
zh-Hans: 杠铃放背上, 后脚放凳.
前脚踩在杠铃正下方.
下降至前腿水平.
前脚脚跟发力起身.

en: Stand front foot on raised platform.
Rear leg on floor behind.
Lower deep below platform.
Drive up through front heel.
zh-Hans: 前脚踩抬高平台.
后腿在地面.
下放至低于平台.
前脚脚跟发力起身.

en: Dumbbells at sides, split stance.
Lower back knee toward floor.
Front thigh parallel at bottom.
Drive up through front heel.
zh-Hans: 双手持哑铃, 分腿站立.
后膝下降近地面.
前腿底部水平.
前脚脚跟发力起身.

en: Dumbbells at sides, split stance.
Lower into split squat.
Pause 2 seconds at bottom.
Drive up explosively.
zh-Hans: 双手持哑铃, 分腿站立.
下放至分腿蹲.
底部暂停 2 秒.
爆发起身.

en: Standard bench setup, grip just past shoulders.
Lower bar, pause 1-2 inches above chest.
Hold pause, then press up.
zh-Hans: 标准卧推姿势, 握距略宽于肩.
下放, 停在胸口上方 2-5 cm.
维持暂停, 然后推起.

en: Pause hover requires control — start light.
Use safety pins or spotter.
zh-Hans: 悬停需要控制 — 从轻开始.
使用安全杠或保护.

en: 100-400 m at near-max effort.
Walk or jog half the distance to recover.
6-10 reps, scale to fitness.
zh-Hans: 走或慢跑一半距离恢复.
6-10 次, 根据能力调整.

en: Thorough warm-up — hamstrings are at risk.
Avoid concrete — use track or grass.
zh-Hans: 充分热身 — 腘绳肌易拉伤.
避免水泥地 — 用塑胶跑道或草地.

en: Bar on safeties at parallel depth.
Bottom up — no eccentric, dead start.
Drive up explosively.
Return bar to safeties each rep.
zh-Hans: 杠铃放保护杠, 平行深度.
底部启动 — 无离心, 静止启动.
爆发起身.
每次回到保护杠.

en: Hold TRX handles, lean back slightly.
Squat down deep.
Use TRX for light assistance.
Drive up to standing.
zh-Hans: 握 TRX 把手, 略后倾.
下蹲到底.
TRX 提供轻度辅助.
起身站立.

en: Bar on upper traps, feet shoulder-width.
Brace core, sit hips back and down.
Descend until thighs parallel to floor.
Drive through heels to stand.
zh-Hans: 杠铃放上斜方肌, 双脚与肩同宽.
核心收紧, 髋部后坐下蹲.
下降至大腿与地面平行.
脚跟发力起身.

en: Keep knees tracking over toes — don't collapse inward.
Don't round lower back at bottom.
Use safety bars in rack for heavy sets.
zh-Hans: 膝盖跟脚尖方向一致, 不要内扣.
底部不要圆下背.
重量大时使用保护杠.

en: Feet shoulder-width, arms forward for balance.
Sit back and down, chest up.
Thighs parallel or below.
Drive up through heels.
zh-Hans: 双脚与肩同宽, 双臂前伸平衡.
髋部后坐, 挺胸.
大腿平行或更低.
脚跟发力起身.

en: Box behind you at parallel height.
Sit back onto box, stay tight.
Pause briefly — don't relax.
Drive hips up to stand.
zh-Hans: 箱子在身后, 高度齐大腿.
向后坐到箱上, 保持紧绷.
短暂停顿 — 不要放松.
髋部发力起身.

en: Don't crash onto box — control the descent.
Don't rock back or use momentum off box.
zh-Hans: 不要砸到箱子上 — 控制下放.
不要后倒或借惯性起身.

en: Stand in front of chair, feet wide.
Squat down to lightly tap chair.
Stand back up.
Use chair as depth guide.
zh-Hans: 站椅前, 双脚宽距.
下蹲至轻触椅子.
起身站立.
椅子作为深度参考.

en: Bar on back, stand tall.
Cross one leg behind diagonally.
Lower into curtsy.
Drive back to stand, alternate.
zh-Hans: 杠铃放背上, 站直.
一腿向斜后方交叉.
下蹲屈膝礼位.
蹬回, 交替.

en: Bar across front delts, elbows high.
Stay upright through the descent.
Sit straight down — knees travel forward.
Drive up keeping chest tall.
zh-Hans: 杠铃架在前三角肌, 肘部抬高.
下蹲过程保持躯干直立.
垂直下坐 — 膝盖向前推.
起身时挺胸.

en: Wrist mobility needed — use straps if rack position hurts.
Don't let elbows drop or bar will roll forward.
zh-Hans: 需要手腕灵活性 — 不舒服用握带辅助.
肘部不要下沉, 否则杠铃前滚.

en: Hold dumbbell vertical at chest.
Feet shoulder-width, toes slightly out.
Squat between heels — elbows inside knees.
Drive up through heels.
zh-Hans: 竖握哑铃于胸前.
双脚与肩同宽, 脚尖微外展.
下蹲 — 肘部在膝内侧.
脚跟发力起身.

en: Hold kettlebell by horns at chest.
Squat down, elbows track inside knees.
Keep chest tall, full depth.
Drive up explosively.
zh-Hans: 双手抓壶铃柄于胸前.
下蹲 — 肘部在膝内侧.
挺胸, 蹲到底.
爆发起身.

en: Step into split squat stance.
Lower to bottom position.
Hold for prescribed time.
Don't drift up or shake.
zh-Hans: 迈入分腿蹲位.
下放至底部位置.
保持规定时间.
不要上飘或晃动.

en: Quarter squat, swing arms back.
Explode up, fully extend hips.
Land softly, absorb in next squat.
Repeat with continuous bounces.
zh-Hans: 四分之一蹲, 双臂后摆.
爆发跳起, 髋部完全伸展.
轻柔落地, 缓冲入下一蹲.
连贯反复.

en: Land softly — heavy landings stress knees.
Skip if you have lower-body joint issues.
zh-Hans: 轻柔落地 — 重落地伤膝.
下肢关节有伤勿做.

en: Dumbbells at sides, quarter squat.
Explode up, dumbbells anchor weight.
Land soft, immediately repeat.
Keep dumbbells controlled.
zh-Hans: 双手持哑铃, 四分之一蹲.
爆发上跳, 哑铃压住.
轻柔落地, 立即重复.
哑铃保持稳定.

en: Use moderate dumbbells — control matters.
zh-Hans: 用中等哑铃 — 控制重要.

en: Kettlebell goblet position.
Quarter squat, explode up.
Land soft into next squat.
Continuous bouncing.
zh-Hans: 壶铃高脚杯位.
四分之一蹲, 爆发跳起.
轻柔入下一蹲.
连贯弹跳.

en: Hold landmine sleeve at chest.
Squat down keeping torso upright.
Sit back into hips.
Drive up to standing.
zh-Hans: 握地雷套筒于胸前.
下蹲, 躯干保持直立.
髋部后坐.
起身站立.

en: Hold landmine sleeve at chest.
Side step into lateral lunge.
Sit hips back, working leg bends.
Drive back up, alternate sides.
zh-Hans: 握地雷套筒于胸前.
侧向迈步入侧弓步.
髋部后坐, 工作腿屈.
起身, 交替两侧.

en: Bar across rear delts, below traps.
Lean torso forward more than high-bar.
Sit hips back, hinge at hips.
Drive hips up to stand.
zh-Hans: 杠铃放后三角肌, 斜方肌下方.
比高杠位躯干前倾更多.
髋部后坐, 髋关节铰链.
髋部上顶起身.

en: Shoulder mobility required — uncomfortable for some.
Don't let the bar slide down your back.
zh-Hans: 需要肩部灵活性 — 部分人不适应.
不要让杠铃顺着背滑落.

en: Snatch grip, bar locked overhead.
Squat down keeping bar over mid-foot.
Stay upright, full depth.
Drive up keeping bar overhead.
zh-Hans: 抓举握距, 杠铃锁过头.
下蹲, 杠铃在脚中位.
保持直立, 全深度.
起身, 杠铃过头.

en: Demands extreme mobility — work up slowly.
Easy to lose balance — drop weight if needed.
zh-Hans: 需要极强灵活性 — 渐进训练.
易失衡 — 必要时弃铃.

en: Bar on back, descend to parallel.
Pause 2-3 seconds at bottom — stay tight.
Drive explosively from dead stop.
No bouncing out of the hole.
zh-Hans: 杠铃放背上, 下蹲至平行.
底部暂停 2-3 秒 — 保持收紧.
从静止位置爆发起身.
底部不要借反弹.

en: Use lighter weight than standard squat.
Don't lose tightness during pause.
zh-Hans: 重量比标准深蹲轻.
暂停时不要松懈.

en: Hold dumbbell goblet position.
Squat to full depth.
Pause 3-5 seconds at bottom.
Drive up explosively.
zh-Hans: 高脚杯握持哑铃.
下蹲至最深.
底部暂停 3-5 秒.
爆发起身.

en: Set pins at sticking point depth.
Bar rests on pins from dead start.
Squat up from pins explosively.
Reset bar on pins between reps.
zh-Hans: 保护杠设在卡顿深度.
杠铃从保护杠上静止启动.
爆发起身.
每次重置杠铃回保护杠.

en: Demanding starting strength variation.
zh-Hans: 起始力量变体, 难度高.

en: Squat down to parallel.
Pulse up and down 2-3 inches.
Stay low, don't fully stand.
High reps, quads burn.
zh-Hans: 下蹲至平行.
上下脉冲 5-8 cm.
保持低位, 不要起身.
高次数, 股四头灼烧.

en: SSB on back, handles in front.
Hold handles or rack handles in front.
Squat down — bar pushes torso forward.
Drive up, fight bar pulling you down.
zh-Hans: 安全杠放背上, 手柄在前.
握住手柄或扶架.
下蹲 — 杠铃推躯干前倾.
起身, 对抗杠铃下拉.

en: Bar on upper traps, feet slightly forward.
Unrack with a twist of the bar.
Squat down — fixed bar path.
Drive up, rerack with twist.
zh-Hans: 杠铃放上斜方肌, 双脚略前置.
扭杆出杠.
下蹲 — 固定轨迹.
起身, 扭杆挂回.
