en: Don't forget to twist bar to lock when done.
zh-Hans: 结束时记得扭杆挂回.

en: Box at parallel-thigh height.
Squat to lightly touch box.
Don't sit down fully.
Stand back up explosively.
zh-Hans: 箱与大腿平行高度.
下蹲轻触箱.
不要完全坐下.
爆发起身.

en: Bar in crook of elbows, hands clasped.
Stand tall, brace core hard.
Squat down keeping torso upright.
Drive up keeping bar locked in arms.
zh-Hans: 杠铃放肘窝, 双手交握.
站直, 核心强力收紧.
下蹲, 躯干保持直立.
起身, 杠铃锁在臂弯.

en: Use sleeve or pad — bar bruises arms.
Keep moderate weight, very demanding on core.
zh-Hans: 用护臂或软垫 — 杠铃压臂淤青.
重量适中, 对核心要求极高.

en: Dumbbell vertical in crook of elbows.
Stand tall, brace core.
Squat down, torso upright.
Drive up, dumbbell locked.
zh-Hans: 哑铃竖立在肘窝.
站直, 核心收紧.
下蹲, 躯干直立.
起身, 哑铃锁定.

en: Lie on bench, press dumbbells together throughout set.
Press up while squeezing dumbbells.
Maintain inward pressure on every rep.
zh-Hans: 平躺凳上, 全程将哑铃夹紧.
夹紧哑铃同时推起.
每次重复都保持向内挤压.

en: Find a multi-flight staircase.
Full foot on each step, push through heel.
Don't grab railing — let legs work.
zh-Hans: 找多层楼梯.
整脚踩稳, 脚跟发力.
不要扶栏杆 — 让腿发力.

en: Watch footing going down — easy to trip.
zh-Hans: 下楼留意脚下 — 容易踩空.

en: Step fully — let heel touch each step.
Stand tall, no leaning on rails.
Steady cadence, drive through glutes.
zh-Hans: 完整踩步 — 脚跟着步面.
站姿挺直, 不要靠扶手.
稳定节奏, 臀部发力.

en: Don't hunch over rails — defeats the workout.
zh-Hans: 不要趴在扶手上 — 失去训练效果.

en: Stand tall, hinge at hips forward.
Let head and arms hang heavy.
Soft knees, hold 30-60s.
zh-Hans: 直立, 髋部前屈.
头和双臂自然垂下.
微屈膝, 保持 30-60 秒.

en: Unrack bar at lockout, hold straight-arm position.
Maintain tension for 20-60 seconds.
Rack carefully — fatigue is real.
zh-Hans: 出杠至锁定位, 保持伸臂.
维持紧张 20-60 秒.
小心放回 — 末段易力竭.

en: Always have a spotter for static holds.
Set safety pins at chest level.
zh-Hans: 静态保持务必有保护.
安全杠设在胸口高度.

en: Sit back fully, back supported.
Feet flat on pedals, smooth circles.
Lower-impact option — good for joints.
zh-Hans: 完全坐靠, 背部贴紧靠背.
脚平放踏板, 顺畅画圆.
低冲击选项 — 对关节友好.

en: Adjust seat: slight knee bend at bottom.
Hands light on bars, core engaged.
Steady 70-90 RPM at moderate resistance.
zh-Hans: 调座椅: 蹬到底时膝盖微弯.
双手轻扶把手, 核心收紧.
中等阻力, 稳定 70-90 RPM.

en: Stand tall, hands on hips.
Step one leg back, knee toward floor.
Drive front heel to return.
Alternate.
zh-Hans: 站直, 双手插腰.
一腿后撤, 膝盖近地.
前脚脚跟发力返回.
交替.

en: Stand on box, one leg.
Slowly lower other heel to floor.
Don't put weight on lower foot.
Drive back up, switch legs.
zh-Hans: 单腿站箱上.
缓慢下放另一脚跟至地.
下方脚不要承重.
起身, 换腿.

en: Bar on back, face the box.
Step up, drive through working heel.
Stand tall on top of box.
Step down slowly, alternate legs.
zh-Hans: 杠铃放背上, 面对箱.
踩上箱, 工作腿脚跟发力.
顶部完全站直.
缓慢下落, 交替腿.

en: Face a box or sturdy step.
Step up, drive through working heel.
Stand fully tall on top.
Step down with control.
zh-Hans: 面对箱或台阶.
踩上, 工作腿脚跟发力.
顶部完全站直.
控制下落.

en: Dumbbells, face high box.
Step up, drive top leg.
Don't push off bottom foot.
Step down with control, switch.
zh-Hans: 持哑铃, 面对高箱.
踩上, 上方腿发力.
不要用下方脚蹬地.
控制下放, 换腿.

en: Stand on box, one foot.
Drop other leg diagonally behind.
Drive up, glute squeeze.
Alternate legs after set.
zh-Hans: 单脚站箱上.
另一腿向斜后下放.
蹬起, 收紧臀部.
完成后换腿.

en: Dumbbells at sides, face the box.
Step up driving through working heel.
Stand fully tall on top.
Step down with control, alternate legs.
zh-Hans: 双手持哑铃, 面对箱.
踩上箱, 工作腿脚跟发力.
顶部完全站直.
控制下落, 交替腿.

en: Don't push off bottom foot — use top leg only.
zh-Hans: 不要用下方脚蹬地 — 只用上方腿发力.

en: Dumbbells at sides, face high box.
Step up with one foot.
Drive up, don't push off bottom foot.
Step down with control.
zh-Hans: 双手持哑铃, 面对高箱.
一脚踩上箱.
蹬起, 不要用下方脚.
控制下落.

en: Face box, one foot on box.
Drive up explosively.
Other knee shoots up high.
Land back, alternate legs.
zh-Hans: 面对箱, 一脚踩箱.
爆发蹬起.
另一膝高抬.
落回, 交替腿.

en: Face box, one foot on box.
Drive up, switch legs in air.
Land with other foot on box.
Continuous alternating.
zh-Hans: 面对箱, 一脚踩箱.
蹬起, 空中换腿.
另一脚落到箱上.
持续交替.

en: Stand sideways to box.
Step laterally up onto box.
Stand fully tall.
Step down with control.
zh-Hans: 侧向站立箱旁.
侧向踩上箱.
完全站直.
控制下落.

en: Stand sideways to box.
Step up sideways onto box.
Stand tall, then step down.
Alternate legs each set.
zh-Hans: 侧向站立箱旁.
侧向踩上箱.
站直, 再下落.
每组交替腿.

en: Bar on back in Smith machine.
Box in front, step up.
Drive up through working leg.
Step down, alternate.
zh-Hans: 杠铃在史密斯机背上.
箱在前, 踩上.
工作腿发力起身.
下落, 交替.

en: Sit on floor, legs out wide.
Hinge from hips, reach forward.
Hold 30-60s, breathe deeply.
zh-Hans: 坐地, 双腿大幅分开.
髋部前屈, 双手前伸.
保持 30-60 秒, 深呼吸.

en: High pulley, straight bar, arms extended.
Pull bar down to thighs, arms straight.
Return slowly to overhead position.
zh-Hans: 高位滑轮, 直杠, 手臂伸直.
拉杠至大腿, 手臂保持直.
缓慢返回头顶位置.

en: Attach rope to high pulley, neutral grip.
Arms straight, pull rope down past hips.
Squeeze lats, return slowly.
zh-Hans: 绳索接高位滑轮, 中立握.
手臂伸直, 拉绳过髋.
收紧背阔肌, 缓慢回.

en: Grip single heavy dumbbell on one side.
Walk while bracing core to resist lean.
Switch sides midway.
zh-Hans: 单手握大重量哑铃.
行走时核心抗侧倾.
中途换边.

en: Bar on back, wide stance.
Toes 45° out, sit straight down.
Chest up, knees over toes.
Drive through heels to stand.
zh-Hans: 杠铃放背上, 宽站位.
脚尖外展 45°, 垂直下坐.
挺胸, 膝盖跟脚尖.
脚跟发力起身.

en: Wide stance, toes 45° out.
Squat down keeping torso upright.
Knees track toes, full depth.
Drive up through heels.
zh-Hans: 宽站位, 脚尖外展 45°.
下蹲, 躯干直立.
膝盖跟脚尖, 蹲到底.
脚跟发力起身.

en: Wide stance, toes 45° out.
Hold dumbbell vertical between legs.
Squat down keeping chest up.
Drive up through heels.
zh-Hans: 宽站位, 脚尖外展 45°.
腿间竖握哑铃.
下蹲, 挺胸.
脚跟发力起身.

en: Wide stance, kettlebell between legs.
Squat down keeping chest up.
Lower kettlebell to floor.
Drive up through heels.
zh-Hans: 宽站位, 壶铃在腿间.
下蹲, 挺胸.
壶铃接近地面.
脚跟发力起身.

en: Lie face-down, arms extended overhead.
Lift arms and legs together off floor.
Hold briefly, lower with control.
zh-Hans: 俯卧, 手臂前伸.
同时抬起手臂和双腿.
短暂保持, 控制下放.

en: Lie face down, arms overhead.
Lift arms, chest, and legs together.
Hold — squeeze glutes and back.
zh-Hans: 俯卧, 双臂前伸.
双臂、胸部、双腿同时抬起.
保持 — 收紧臀部和背部.

en: Sit on chest-supported row, grip handles.
Pull handles to ribcage, squeeze back.
Extend slowly under control.
zh-Hans: 坐于胸支撑划船机, 握手柄.
拉手柄至肋部, 收紧背部.
控制缓慢伸展.

en: Stand holding plate between palms at chest.
Press plate forward, squeezing throughout.
Return slowly — maintain plate squeeze.
zh-Hans: 站立, 双掌夹片置胸前.
向前推, 全程挤压.
缓慢回程 — 持续夹紧.

en: Lie back, hips up, body level.
Alternating arm pull, pinky enters first.
Steady flutter kick, head still.
zh-Hans: 仰躺, 髋部上浮, 身体水平.
交替手臂划水, 小指先入水.
稳定打腿, 头部不动.

en: Watch lane line position — no walls to look at.
zh-Hans: 注意泳道位置 — 看不到墙.

en: Glide phase between pulls.
Whip kick, heels to butt then snap.
Breathe at top of pull cycle.
zh-Hans: 划水之间有滑行阶段.
蛙腿: 脚跟到臀部然后蹬开.
划水顶端换气.

en: Both arms pull together, recover over water.
Two dolphin kicks per arm cycle.
Wave-like undulation from chest.
zh-Hans: 双臂同时划水, 水面上回臂.
每一次划水配两次海豚腿.
从胸部发起的波浪动作.

en: Highly technical — build skill in short sets.
zh-Hans: 技术要求高 — 短组练习.

en: Streamlined body position, head neutral.
Rotate from core, high elbow catch.
Bilateral breathing — every 3 strokes.
zh-Hans: 流线型身体, 头部中立.
核心转动, 高肘抓水.
双侧呼吸 — 每 3 划一次.

en: Never swim alone in open water.
zh-Hans: 开放水域不要单独游泳.

en: Straddle T-bar, hinge at hips, grip V-handle.
Pull handle to chest, squeeze back.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 跨T杠, 髋部前屈, 握V把.
拉把至胸部, 收紧背部.
控制下放.

en: Keep back flat — don't round when going heavy.
zh-Hans: 背部保持平直 — 大重量不圆背.

en: Lie chest-down on angled pad, grip handles.
Pull to chest, retract shoulder blades.
Lower with control, full stretch.
zh-Hans: 俯卧斜垫上, 握手柄.
拉至胸部, 后缩肩胛.
控制下放, 充分拉伸.

en: 20 s all-out work, 10 s rest.
Repeat 8 rounds = 4 minutes total.
Pick a cyclic movement (sprint, burpee, bike).
zh-Hans: 20 秒全力, 10 秒休息.
8 轮 = 共 4 分钟.
选周期性动作 (冲刺, 波比跳, 单车).

en: Maximum effort required — warm up well first.
zh-Hans: 要全力以赴 — 先充分热身.

en: Lie on bench, dumbbells over chest, palms forward.
Bend elbows out, lower dumbbells to touch chest.
Extend triceps to press up — elbows flare out.
zh-Hans: 平躺凳上, 哑铃胸前, 掌心向前.
肘外展, 下放哑铃触胸.
三头发力推起 — 肘部外展.

en: Unusual elbow path — start light to learn.
zh-Hans: 肘部轨迹特殊 — 从轻开始.

en: Sit, hands behind, knees bent.
Lift hips, rotate one hand under to opposite side.
Reach high with rotating arm, then alternate.
zh-Hans: 坐姿, 双手后撑, 双膝弯.
髋部抬起, 一手从下方穿向对侧.
另一手高伸, 左右交替.

en: Side-lying, knees bent, arms stacked.
Top arm sweeps open like a book page.
Eyes follow hand, rotate from upper back.
zh-Hans: 侧躺, 双膝弯曲, 双手叠放.
上方手如翻书般打开.
眼睛随手, 上背带动旋转.

en: Hold sledgehammer end vertical at arm's length.
Tilt hammer back, then forward with wrist only.
Control through full ROM.
zh-Hans: 前伸竖握大锤.
腕部前后倾, 仅腕部用力.
全程控制.

en: Start on all fours.
Slide one arm under body, shoulder to floor.
Hold 20-30s, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 四点跪姿.
单臂穿过身体, 肩部贴地.
保持 20-30 秒, 换边.

en: Bar at front shoulders, feet shoulder-width.
Squat down to parallel.
Drive up explosively — press bar overhead.
Lower to shoulders, repeat.
zh-Hans: 杠铃在肩前, 脚与肩同宽.
深蹲至大腿平行.
爆发起身 — 推举杠铃过头.
下放至肩, 重复.

en: Maintain front rack — don't lose bar position in squat.
zh-Hans: 保持前架 — 蹲时不要松.

en: Dumbbells at shoulders, feet shoulder-width.
Squat to parallel.
Drive up, press dumbbells overhead.
Lower to shoulders, repeat.
zh-Hans: 哑铃在肩, 脚与肩同宽.
下蹲至大腿平行.
起身推举哑铃过头.
下放至肩, 重复.

en: Stand against wall, heels touching wall.
Pull toes up toward shins.
Squeeze front shin muscles.
Lower slow, repeat.
zh-Hans: 背靠墙, 脚跟贴墙.
脚尖向上勾起.
收紧小腿前侧.
缓慢下放, 重复.

en: Anchor band low, loop around toes.
Sit with leg extended.
Pull toes up against band.
Slow lower, full ROM.
zh-Hans: 弹力带低位固定, 套脚尖.
坐姿, 腿伸直.
脚尖对抗弹力带上抬.
缓慢下放, 全幅度.

en: Sit, dumbbell vertical on toes.
Heel stays planted on floor.
Lift toes up against weight.
Lower slow, full ROM.
zh-Hans: 坐姿, 哑铃竖立放脚趾上.
脚跟保持踩地.
脚尖对抗重量上抬.
缓慢下放, 全幅度.

en: Sit in machine, foot under pad.
Pull toes up against pad.
Squeeze shin, lower slow.
Strict tempo for full benefit.
zh-Hans: 坐器械, 脚在护垫下.
脚尖向上对抗护垫.
收紧胫骨, 缓慢下放.
严格节奏获最佳效果.

en: Lie on back, legs straight up.
Reach hands up to touch toes.
Lower with control, repeat.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 双腿垂直抬起.
双手向上触脚尖.
控制下放, 重复.

en: Hang from bar, slight kip swing.
Drive toes up to touch bar.
Lower under control, repeat.
zh-Hans: 悬挂单杠, 微微摆动.
脚尖向上踢碰杆.
控制下放, 重复.

en: Use chalk and a strong grip — risk of tearing hands.
zh-Hans: 使用镁粉和稳定握法 — 防止手部撕裂.

en: Drape towel over pull-up bar.
Hang from towel ends with bent elbows.
Hold for time.
zh-Hans: 毛巾搭在引体杠上.
握毛巾两端悬挂, 肘部微屈.
保持时间.

en: Lie chest-down on incline bench, dumbbell in hand.
Raise arm at 120° angle overhead.
Lower under control, isolate lower traps.
zh-Hans: 俯卧上斜凳, 持哑铃.
手臂120度抬至头上.
控制下放, 分离下斜方.

en: Sit tall, one hand under thigh anchored.
Tilt head to opposite side, hand on head.
Hold 20-30s, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 坐姿挺直, 一手压大腿下.
头侧倾, 另一手扶头.
保持 20-30 秒, 换边.

en: Incline 8-15%, speed 4-6 km/h.
Lean slightly forward from ankles.
Don't hold rails — let glutes do the work.
zh-Hans: 从脚踝处略前倾.
不要扶把手 — 让臀部发力.

en: Set speed 8-12 km/h, steady aerobic pace.
Land mid-foot, relaxed shoulders.
Breathe rhythmically — nasal in, mouth out.
zh-Hans: 速度 8-12 km/h, 稳定有氧速度.
前脚掌着地, 肩膀放松.
节奏呼吸 — 鼻吸口呼.

en: Step off the belt at the end — don't jump off mid-stride.
zh-Hans: 跑完先按停再下 — 不要跳下来.

en: Set speed 3-6 km/h, comfortable pace.
Walk upright, swing arms naturally.
Hold rails only for balance, not support.
zh-Hans: 速度 3-6 km/h, 舒适步速.
上身挺直, 自然摆臂.
扶把手只是为了平衡, 不要靠它支撑.

en: Adjust seat, grip handles, elbows on pad.
Press handles down to full extension.
Squeeze, slow return — full stretch at top.
zh-Hans: 调整座椅, 握手柄, 肘部置垫.
下推至完全伸直.
收紧, 缓慢回程 — 顶部充分拉伸.

en: Adjust machine, one arm at a time.
Press handle to full extension.
Slow return, full stretch — work side independently.
zh-Hans: 调整器械, 单臂操作.
推至完全伸直.
缓慢回程, 充分拉伸 — 单侧独立训练.

en: Anchor band overhead, grip with both hands.
Elbows tucked, push down to thighs.
Resistance peaks at lockout.
zh-Hans: 弹力带固定头顶, 双手握紧.
肘部内收, 下推至大腿前.
锁定时阻力最大.

en: Face cable, high pulley, straight bar.
Pull elbows behind body as bar comes down.
Lock arms at sides — increased ROM.
zh-Hans: 面对绳索机, 高位直杆.
下推时肘部后移过躯干.
锁定体侧 — 加大幅度.

en: Attach EZ-bar to high cable pulley.
Grip angled bend, elbows tight.
Push down — wrist neutral, squeeze bottom.
zh-Hans: EZ 杠装高位绳索.
握斜把, 肘部内收.
下推 — 腕中立, 底部收紧.

en: Sit at triceps machine, grip handles.
Push handles down to full extension.
Squeeze triceps, slow return.
zh-Hans: 坐三头机, 握住手柄.
下推至完全伸直.
收紧三头, 缓慢回程.

en: Face cable, high pulley, straight bar, underhand grip.
Elbows tucked, push down to thighs.
Emphasize medial head — lighter weight.
zh-Hans: 面对绳索机, 高位直杆, 反握.
肘部内收, 下推至大腿前.
强化内侧头 — 轻重量.

en: Face cable, single handle, underhand grip.
Elbow pinned, push handle down to hip.
Strong medial head contraction at bottom.
zh-Hans: 面对绳索机, 单手柄反握.
肘部固定, 下推至髋部.
底部强烈刺激内侧头.

en: Face cable, high pulley, rope attachment.
Push rope down, separate hands at bottom.
Squeeze hard — pronate wrists outward.
zh-Hans: 面对绳索机, 高位, 绳索附件.
下推绳索, 底部双手分开.
用力收紧 — 手腕外旋.

en: Face cable, single-handle high pulley.
Elbow at side, push handle down to hip.
Squeeze, slow return — full range.
zh-Hans: 面对绳索机, 高位单手柄.
肘部固定, 下推至髋部.
收紧, 缓慢回程 — 全程.

en: Stand facing cable, high pulley, straight bar.
Elbows pinned at sides, push bar down to thighs.
Squeeze triceps at bottom, control return.
zh-Hans: 面对绳索机, 高位定滑轮, 直杆.
肘部固定体侧, 推至大腿前.
底部收紧三头, 控制回程.

en: Face cable, high pulley, V-bar attachment.
Grip V-bar, elbows tucked, push down hard.
Lock out triceps, slow return.
zh-Hans: 面对绳索机, 高位, V-杆附件.
握 V-杆, 肘内收, 用力下推.
三头锁定, 缓慢回程.

en: One hand reaches over shoulder, other below.
Clasp hands behind back.
Hold 20-30s, switch arms.
zh-Hans: 一手过肩, 一手从下穿过.
背后双手相扣.
保持 20-30 秒, 换手.

en: Reach one arm overhead, bend at elbow.
Hand drops behind head.
Opposite hand pulls elbow, hold 20-30s.
zh-Hans: 单臂过头, 屈肘.
手掌下放至背后.
对侧手拉肘, 保持 20-30 秒.

en: Grip TRX, lean forward, arms forward together.
Open arms wide in arc, lower chest.
Squeeze chest to close — slight elbow bend.
zh-Hans: 握 TRX, 前倾, 双臂前并拢.
弧线打开双臂, 胸部下沉.
胸部发力合拢 — 肘部微屈.

en: Grip TRX handles, lean forward — body straight.
Lower chest to handles, control descent.
Press back up to start.
zh-Hans: 握紧 TRX 手柄, 前倾 — 身体保持直线.
胸部下降至手柄, 控制下放.
推回起点.

en: Feet in TRX foot cradles, hands on floor.
Push-up with elevated, unstable feet.
Stabilize core throughout.
zh-Hans: 双脚扣 TRX 脚环, 双手撑地.
在抬高且不稳定的支撑下做俯卧撑.
全程稳定核心.

en: Grip TRX handles, lean back, body angled.
Pull chest to handles, elbows back.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 握TRX把, 后倾, 身体倾斜.
拉胸至把, 肘部后拉.
控制下放.

en: Stand tall, jump explosively up.
Tuck knees to chest mid-air.
Land soft, repeat immediately.
Continuous bouncing tempo.
zh-Hans: 站直, 爆发上跳.
空中屈膝至胸.
轻柔落地, 立即重复.
连续弹跳节奏.

en: Land softly to protect knees.
zh-Hans: 轻柔落地保护膝盖.

en: 7 half curls bottom to middle.
7 half curls middle to top.
7 full range curls.
zh-Hans: 7次半程 (底到中).
7次半程 (中到顶).
7次全程弯举.

en: Significant biceps fatigue — use lighter weight.
zh-Hans: 二头疲劳大 — 用轻重量.

en: Bar at thighs, hands slightly wider than shoulders.
Pull bar up along body to chest level.
Elbows lead, stay above bar.
Lower slowly.
zh-Hans: 杠铃在大腿, 握距略宽于肩.
沿身体上拉至胸高.
肘部引领, 在杠铃上方.
缓慢下放.

en: Don't go above chest level — risks shoulder impingement.
Use wider grip if shoulders feel cramped.
zh-Hans: 不要超过胸高 — 可能撞击肩部.
肩紧用宽握.

en: Low cable, straight bar at thighs.
Pull up along body to chest.
Elbows higher than wrists.
Lower slowly.
zh-Hans: 低位绳索, 直杆在大腿.
沿身体上拉至胸.
肘部高于腕.
缓慢下放.

en: Dumbbells in front of thighs, palms back.
Pull up to chest, elbows lead.
Stop at chest height, lower slowly.
zh-Hans: 哑铃在大腿前, 掌心朝后.
上拉至胸高, 肘部引领.
停在胸高, 缓慢下放.

en: Don't pull above chest level.
zh-Hans: 不要拉过胸高.

en: From L-sit, raise legs higher.
Body forms V — legs above 45°.
Hold — extreme core strength.
zh-Hans: 从 L 支撑开始, 双腿抬更高.
身体呈 V — 腿高于 45°.
保持 — 极强核心.

en: Master L-sit before attempting V-sit.
zh-Hans: 先掌握 L 支撑.

en: Lie flat, arms overhead, legs straight.
Simultaneously lift legs and torso to V.
Touch hands to feet, lower with control.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 双手过头, 双腿伸直.
上身和双腿同时抬起成 V 形.
手碰脚, 控制下放.

en: Counter-movement: quarter squat fast.
Reach for ceiling — arms drive up.
Land soft, reset fully between reps.
zh-Hans: 反向蹲: 快速四分之一蹲.
向天花板伸手 — 手臂上摆.
轻柔落地, 每次完全恢复.

en: Stand at landmine handles, both hands.
Press up and slightly forward.
Lock out, lower under control.
zh-Hans: 站立握地雷管把手, 双手.
向上略向前推.
锁定, 缓慢下放.

en: Hold dumbbell vertically by one head with both hands.
Curl up to chin level.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 双手捧哑铃顶端 (像端盘).
弯举至下巴.
控制下放.

en: Stand facing wall, forearm against wall.
Step forward, rotate body away.
Hold 20-30s, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 面对墙, 前臂贴墙.
前迈一步, 上身向外转.
保持 20-30 秒, 换边.

en: Face wall arm's length away, hands at chest height.
Lean in, lower chest to wall.
Push back to start, body straight.
zh-Hans: 面对墙一臂距, 双手胸高.
前倾, 胸接近墙面.
推回起点, 身体保持直线.

en: Back flat against wall, feet forward.
Slide down until knees at 90°.
Thighs parallel to floor — hold.
Press back through heels to stand.
zh-Hans: 背贴墙, 双脚向前.
下滑至膝盖 90°.
大腿与地面平行 — 保持.
脚跟发力起身.

en: Back flat against wall, knees 90°.
Dumbbells on thighs.
Hold position — quads burn.
Push back through heels to stand.
zh-Hans: 背贴墙, 膝盖 90°.
哑铃放大腿上.
保持 — 股四头灼烧.
脚跟发力起身.

en: Wall sit position, 90° knee.
Extend one leg out straight.
Hold on single leg.
Switch legs after hold.
zh-Hans: 靠墙静蹲位, 膝盖 90°.
一腿伸直前抬.
单腿保持.
保持后换腿.

en: Stand back against wall, arms in 'W' position.
Slide arms up to 'Y' overhead.
Keep elbows, wrists, back touching wall.
zh-Hans: 背靠墙站, 双臂呈 W 字.
双臂沿墙上滑成 Y 字.
肘, 腕, 背始终贴墙.

en: Plank with feet on wall, knees off floor.
Walk hands and feet up the wall.
Reach near-handstand, walk down.
zh-Hans: 脚撑墙的平板, 膝盖离地.
双手脚交替上爬.
接近倒立后, 倒爬下来.

en: Warm wrists thoroughly, build slowly.
zh-Hans: 充分热身手腕, 循序渐进.

en: Bar at hip height, wide overhand grip.
Pull chest to bar, elbows wide.
Lower under control, body straight.
zh-Hans: 杠在髋高, 宽正握.
拉胸至杠, 肘部外展.
控制下放, 身体直线.

en: Wide stance, arms in T.
Hinge to one side, opposite hand to floor.
Top arm reaches sky, eyes follow.
zh-Hans: 宽距站, 双臂呈 T.
向一侧铰链, 对侧手触地.
上方手指天, 眼随手.

en: Lie on back, arms out, legs straight up.
Rotate legs side to side — like wipers.
Shoulders flat, controlled tempo.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 双手张开, 双腿垂直举起.
双腿左右摆动 — 像雨刷.
肩部平地, 节奏可控.

en: Hang from bar, raise legs to 90°.
Rotate legs side to side.
Controlled motion — no swinging.
zh-Hans: 悬挂单杠, 直腿抬至 90°.
双腿左右摆动.
动作可控 — 不要借力.

en: Lunge forward, opposite hand on floor.
Reach inside-arm up to ceiling, rotate.
Hold 5-10s per rep, alternate sides.
zh-Hans: 前弓步, 对侧手撑地.
内侧手向上伸, 旋转上身.
每次保持 5-10 秒, 换边.

en: Arms extended, hands clasped or open.
Slowly trace circles with wrists.
10 each direction, prep for handstand work.
zh-Hans: 双臂前伸, 双手相握或张开.
缓慢画圆.
每方向 10 次, 倒立前准备.

en: Sit, forearms on thighs, palms up, wrists hang.
Curl wrists up, contract forearms.
Lower with control, full stretch.
zh-Hans: 坐姿, 前臂贴大腿, 掌心向上, 手腕悬空.
腕屈, 收紧前臂.
控制下放, 充分拉伸.

en: Step on band, grip ends, palms up.
Forearms on thighs, curl wrists up.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 踩弹力带, 握两端, 掌心向上.
前臂贴大腿, 腕屈.
控制下放.

en: Sit on bench, forearms on thighs, underhand grip on bar.
Curl wrists up, full contraction.
Lower with full extension.
zh-Hans: 坐凳, 前臂贴大腿, 反握杠铃.
腕屈, 完全收紧.
下放至完全伸展.

en: Stand, hold bar behind back, palms back.
Curl wrists up by flexing forearm.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 站立, 背后握杠, 掌心向后.
前臂屈, 腕弯举.
控制下放.

en: Kneel facing low pulley, grip bar underhand.
Forearms on bench, curl wrists up.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 跪面低位滑轮, 反握杠.
前臂贴凳, 腕屈.
控制下放.

en: Sit, forearm on thigh, kettlebell in hand.
Flex wrist up against KB weight.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 坐姿, 前臂贴大腿, 持壶铃.
腕屈对抗壶铃重量.
控制下放.

en: Sit, single forearm on thigh, palm up.
Curl wrist up, full forearm contraction.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 坐姿, 单前臂贴大腿, 掌心向上.
腕屈, 前臂完全收紧.
控制下放.

en: Low pulley, grip bar overhand.
Forearms on bench, extend wrists upward.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 低位滑轮, 正握杠.
前臂贴凳, 腕部上伸.
控制下放.

en: Hold dumbbell by one end (offset weight).
Rotate wrist palm-up to palm-down.
Control through full rotation.
zh-Hans: 单端握哑铃 (重量偏置).
腕部从掌心向上转向下.
全程旋转控制.

en: Hold dumbbell vertically by one end.
Tilt wrist toward thumb side (radial).
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 竖向单端握哑铃.
腕部向拇指侧倾 (桡侧).
控制下放.

en: Hold roller out at arm's length.
Roll weight up by alternating wrist flexion.
Roll back down with control.
zh-Hans: 前伸持卷绳器.
交替屈腕卷起重量.
控制卷下.

en: Extend arm forward, palm up.
Other hand pulls fingers back gently.
Hold 15-20s, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 手臂前伸, 掌心朝上.
另一手轻拉指尖向后.
保持 15-20 秒, 换边.

en: Extend arm forward, palm down.
Other hand pulls fingers down.
Hold 15-20s, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 手臂前伸, 掌心朝下.
另一手轻拉指尖向下.
保持 15-20 秒, 换边.

en: Hold dumbbell vertically by one end.
Tilt wrist toward pinky side (ulnar).
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 竖向单端握哑铃.
腕部向小指侧倾 (尺侧).
控制下放.

en: Torso 70° upright, underhand grip.
Pull bar to lower abdomen.
Lower under control, slight stretch.
zh-Hans: 躯干70度直立, 反握.
拉杠至下腹.
控制下放, 轻微拉伸.

en: Sit on floor, legs straight in front.
Bar at shoulders, narrow grip.
Press strictly overhead — no leg help.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 坐地, 双腿在身前伸直.
杠铃在肩高, 较窄握距.
严格推举过头 — 不借腿力.
缓慢下放.

en: Requires solid hip flexor mobility.
Brace core, no back arch.
zh-Hans: 需要良好的髋屈肌灵活性.
核心绷紧, 不要反弓.

en: Sit on floor, legs straight forward.
Dumbbells at shoulder height.
Press overhead — keep torso vertical.
Control back down.
zh-Hans: 坐地, 双腿在身前伸直.
哑铃在肩高.
推举过头 — 躯干保持垂直.
缓慢下放.

en: Don't lean back to compensate for tight hip flexors.
zh-Hans: 不要因髋屈肌紧而向后倾.

en: Curl dumbbells up with underhand grip.
At top, rotate to overhand grip.
Lower with overhand grip, repeat.
zh-Hans: 反握弯举哑铃上来.
顶部翻转为正握.
正握下放, 重复.
